Si no es familia del dueño, poco sentido tiene que la tengan de cara al público…","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"DogFame","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVw1qvqwX7AN1dNB2OfbG0TxL0Uvnqcj4ztyXqgxcZrcRtSRx9vXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"El nombre es una trampa, que nadie vaya a pensar que si deciden ir, van a escuchar una sesión de postpunk de la Movida madrileña (Parálisis Permanente, Décima Víctima, Derribos Arias, Aviador Dro, etc.) o un oro viejo rockero (Ñu, Leño, Mermelada, Coz, Asfalto, Siniestro Total, etc.) Las cosas claras desde el principio! Los puertas invitan ya a que unx no quiera cruzar la puerta paradójicamente pero si decides hacerlo pq no te importa tirar 7 euros al río Mnzanares, la experiencia de cliente es tan negativa con el personal de hostelería q solo te quedan ganas de q el ridículo dedal de alcohol q sirven por copa sea cicuta para acabar con tanto sufrimiento acústico y ambiental. Ah! Y eso de ir limpiando la sala es una utopía. Nosotrxs tuvimos casi q salir con una radial para q se nos despegaran los pies del suelo. VERGONZOSO de la R a la A. Cambien el nombre al menos y llamen a su local “Suciola” o “Sala TodoMal”.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paloma Ferres Martín","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXko5MkSRqmyM7bWoMVEzeWIy2NU1yRNf0qzYr98cyZaZ053ND7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Buen sitio para tomarte algo. I really wish I had checked the reviews before going to this place. Please DON’T GO — especially if you’re a woman.
I felt completely disrespected and unsafe. While I was waiting in line for the bathroom, staff treated me with shocking aggression just because I voiced a complaint about the conditions. They kicked me out because I was complaining. I am a woman who is 1.56m tall! They treated me like a criminal.  Their attitude was completely unacceptable, and I’ve now seen many comments from other customers describing similar experiences with the security team. I regret going, and I hope others can avoid the same experience. [{"Name":"Louise Mulhern","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZFPgrT3TS77nxXQiN4NlSbi8e2Xm-K8jMBmP9wNYBZwIeu392LQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everything we tried food wise was delicious, definitely need to go here, drinks options were great music and dj after were also amazing","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA4pvcqfshK9EI_DeRdLtFE&fid=0x0:0x13eb3e18147250c1"],"When":"2025-9-23"},{"Name":"Deborah Laks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI3grBV_SHuXFTJao3Rutge7Qtph1-vhD5tPBYjbJL4SV7esFjt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went as a group of 6 friends. The place is a restaurant that turns into a bar with DJ at 11:00pm. The food was pretty surprising for a place like this, specially the meat. The avocado was ok but it not like it’s advertised. The best part were the deserts. Both the hot cookie and the cheese cake were delicious.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQ99j2HQ&fid=0x0:0x13eb3e18147250c1"],"When":"2025-3-15"},{"Name":"Emmanuel Keates","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQ5qWjYuJoWWWX6-002ewKGutedTXR90RVylYxjUf0gplddqTy=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I go here whenever I am in Madrid. Love the relaxed cosy-chic atmosphere and the kind staff. However today I had some hommous that tasted like the one you get in supermarkets, with a retro-acidic flavour which appeared to be just dressed after coming out of a packet. The croquetas were amazing as usual, among the best in Madrid.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elvira P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUyCAW-M2vIRa3A-vVJXm3NJL-6j4A49R3QIt-Sy8QHHWgGxoQY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We enjoyed our dinner in this well decorated restaurant which becomes a club at the weekends during late hrs.

My favourite dishes were the roasted avocados, the tortilla and the steak.
Definitely good value for money, great for bringing people who are visiting, you will never go wrong!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDT1cSQhgE&fid=0x0:0x13eb3e18147250c1"],"When":"2024-5-26"},{"Name":"Tullia Pimpinella","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhPqIQgNzkRo0uAk0n1nGSAJ14RMPGz0OS9mWdChf8_obD0Uuq8g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best experiences in Madrid. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Nia Williams","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLdr4sjLxHuyeDR24EoL6X2K_Mo7NCHg263axuD0BKwIOHYwAk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Went on Saturday and they played old school Hip Hop and R\u0026B. When I ordered my drink (vodka redbull) the female bartender said that the redbull would be €1 which was fine. I gave her my drink voucher and she started preparing my drink. Because I was paying with card she got the card reader ready and before I realized it she had charged me €13 instead of €1. Then when I was trying to explain her mistake she still wasn’t understanding so she got another bartender who then tried to issue a refund which I don’t know if it even worked. Pretty much ruined my mood. Still hoping the refund will go through.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carolina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUEzEhxziwc43UBckLdJsyOs5xaQ43_XxSkmaYXfCS_iILyoi8I=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I've been here a couple of times for stand-up comedy gigs. It is quite well organised when you go I'm. However, I very much dislike that you can't order a drink and pay at the bar. It is table service only. The staff made a lot of noise during the set. So much so that the comedian had to stop and ask them to make less noise a few times. Then towards the end, before the act had finished, they came round with everyone's bills and we were all distracted in the dark having to pay which was a huge distraction for the comedian.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vaishnavi Bhartia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRA1nP5pDzygssVjhLZ7SLsb4xw_R9AVsAJMhQi_Iltfo8G-dSAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A 10/10 space but this random guy started smoking and messed up the entire environment 😮‍💨😮‍💨😮‍💨😮‍💨 Otherwise worth a visit. Hats off to the person who replies to all the reviews so funny 😂😂😂😂😂","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Coco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIuUYrKtexJ7KvwDAsK74UAfD_y9lb8uw-v59tRtNNVp1hGZNGF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Not suitable for bigger concerts and events in which you actually want to be able to see the artist or performance. There are giant pillars/columns in the way - very uncomfortable space because of this. Sound quality is not very good either.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura Gema Haro Giner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXnca2_qL11arItzHA6xXEluM3HWPPn-DWvXB7Lz4e7jf-DxaCBw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What could I say about the temple of jazz in Madrid... And the best part is you can play pool(billiards)!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Natascia Parisi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgn9YZAvqk9lB4XNlOHUlhmA1Mzh2dqMN98OwGc_bK5EA2LDUi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cool","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kiko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjL1w3Y2Ms-u89kXoCzGEXOvYmk1iGgJ4FgydcJkc91eHuXv0iwg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lugar divertido y de buen ambiente.
Fuimos a un cumpleaños y la verdad que estuvo muy bien.
Para mí ha sido un gran descubrimiento.
Volveré.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDS7r8i1bKxuxJwNDH1PcfZ&fid=0x0:0x83a9bae9d97d05b4"],"When":"2025-12-6"},{"Name":"Fatima González Canut","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIQ7w9N-Fm3Jw0_TyZYuQ0fNYgg9Z8w2T7p3Gvy0bZkyD-d1w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Celebramos el 30 cumpleaños de mi pareja allí con reserva un sábado de 20.30 a 23.00 en horario de cierre al público.
La verdad es que fue todo perfecto. Nos ayudaron en todo para que el cumpleaños saliese de 10 y nos sintiésemos cómodos.
Muchísimas gracias chicos por vuestra implicación y atención en todo momento.
Sin duda repetiremos en futuras ocasiones y os recomendaremos siempre. 🥰","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Angela Montoya Caballero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIBhf7oavFVPLCDA1x-HDWnwLvAA3dTvQd5wAPMgnAg5IN5N7E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un sitio con muy buen ambiente, copas bien preparadas y música que invita a quedarse con un equipo que sabe hacerte sentir agusto desde que entras. Se nota cuando un bar está hecho con cariño y buen gusto. Totalmente recomendable para pasar una noche agradable. Se ha convertido en mi bar favorito. 100% RECOMENDABLE.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Patricia Casado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtyhSc8zvVUZfM4I3O1CE_6Ps1RrZwEZ2u73Rp_rMFkYfJbZv0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sitio ideal para celebrar el cumpleaños, estuvimos allí el 26 de Dic y fuimos unos 20 y pico, tuvimos el espacio para nosotros hasta las 23:00h y Jesús y Daniel fueron atentos con todo y simpatiquísimos. Nos dejaron poner nuestra música, decorar la sala y es un puntazo tener el billar y el futbolín! también pudimos llevar la comida y sin ningún problema. Después fue viniendo gente y la música estuvo muy bien con buen ambiente! Un placer! Muchas gracias :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luis W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKs9HNPfW9C4LApiwOLFSSnauKFVg1xtKe-7SEK3DFTcJnb6w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sitio super recomendable y muy atentos a cualquier detalle. Me dejé una noche una sudadera y al día siguiente me la encontraron cuando acudí a ver si la tenían. Muy amables en todo momento.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ramyi Gossen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDuWnhSEtNi6WVO1UJG62GPlg_rsDrwmloDqTddhZ9ZyXUPTJX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hay billar y futbolín. [{"Name":"Frida Chico Sanchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKQcGIGQCwEreLUSPnPhjfG7-Fc6CYHf3mehL8GV6u1A9BakA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Overall pretty mid, there's a dress code but they let us in with jeans and the bouncer was pretty nice.

We got there at 3am and they charged 20 euros with a drink included, the bartender was extremely rude but my local friends told me overall service in Madrid is not super good/friendly.

As for the people inside no one was really dancing just kind of awkwardly standing with drinks in their hands. My friend and I still had a good time but I will probably go to another club when I go back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mikaely Vaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXIzfmmj92sW8eK8ihRUjF1PbMv-xAhHnQYvwJg1KUSAkKxMjZDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I am Brazilian and visited Madrid for New Year's Eve. Unfortunately, my husband and I had a terrible experience with POSH on this important trip for us.

The deciding factor for choosing POSH for New Year's Eve was the promise of an open bar party. When we arrived, they delayed opening for almost an hour, which already dampened the good vibe we had from the New Year's countdown at Puerta del Sol. But okay... we entered at 2:00 AM, quickly grabbed a drink because we were among the first to enter. Then, we spent another hour in line at the coat check. After checking our coats, we were excited to finally start the night, so we went to get drinks. That's when the biggest frustration hit us; we spent an hour in line, completely squeezed in the midst of so many people, and couldn't move an inch because the line simply didn't move. There were three people serving drinks for about 700 people. So we went to talk to the organizers, and all we heard was 'that's just how it is.'

In the end, we left at 4:00 AM after paying 100 euros for an open bar party where we stayed for two hours, had 1 drink, and didn't dance to any music amidst the chaos and disorganization. At every open bar party we've been to in Brazil, we didn't have an empty glass for a minute, so we never expected to go through this. Complete waste of money. We only got a ruined New Year's night, full of stress and losses.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ilan Ergas Morgheinstern","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVmZ9Qie-RwLFXQD9OOThh6L279jkD69xQrj-C_Xe3mA_VAyqZ0Vw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Pretty bad experience overall. 20EU for a pre online ticket with 2 drinks. However, the place has a max capacity of 700, when we arrived security said 200 where already inside, nevertheless... we had to wait for 50 mins in freezing conditions to get passed security. Then another 20 mins to get inside. I won't cone back here soon, not at least till summer. Proportion men/women 70/30. Women free till 1a.m. not very nice from a moral point of view","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christer Noren Florez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqopTF3_-atx6hcI4TJtm4aBRDv6dZxUlWf3DwZn9dBRMybw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We got a invitation card stating that it was 5€ the entry and did the line. After waiting we were badly treated and asked our documents.  One of us had an official document that they didn't recognize and even though he had 18 years, he was asked impolitely and roughly to step out. Then meanwhile we were asked to pay 30€ even though the invitation said it was 5€ and said it didn't matter. It ended up asking the whole group to leave. I do not reccomend, bad treatment, discrimination to foreigners and the worst experience I've had in Madrid. Instead I reccomend to got to the Sol metro station and search for a disco over there.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"anna Carvajal Beitelhoff","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKDzOmTj_Ul_eD3WWmGweu7d8yPJcYrQrZx4lN4XhJQmSilXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Top","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"diana lopez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIMPdcn4OrwKJm1fS5ZxFm432iPOXmZ3O2N7sQaiYulsae4ZQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"andrea genial !!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lucía Soriano Míguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcwF_lm5yFGa1EOafewZDhMXAF1xlPUaWVkkOVPYt5jWFYX7M=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"cool","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paula Jimenez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIYbAkwGENNq3Azuc40Sh3-lV6qs9IQspuf8XoDR7q7hCO1=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"andrea top","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Christian B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI6foGA3nPpgMBCYC1J7DkFYI3J1uAqZ4zU4w0U3KGU5QlTPg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Ridiculous people.
One is not allowed to go out to smoke.
Staff is very inpolite.
Under any circumstances avoid this awful place.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alec Gonzalez Whitsell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-e3kHnXy7cv94WMBMPfW51bt7FT0XxkjE3eBebULY9cy6mAM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The actual club is okay. A little empty at 2/3 am. The drinks are average and the music is fine to dance. HOWEVER, they charge you several Euro extra to step out and grab a smoke. I don't even smoke. I just wanted to keep my friend company.

Then, when I tell them I am not gonna pay that and I rather go home they have the nerve to take it personally and tell me not to disrespect them. If you want customers, make them feel comfortable.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Allison Escobedo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJHF7euMSZ_ZcNl8xZ_mSbygcp6M1ozCOZ2wz5E31ftf4VWUZpmg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"10/10 fully recommended","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDRyewgrRJmWcTja7NAgvKo&fid=0x0:0x2390068ea5434496"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Tshepiso Tlhabyane","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuZjWFoZnNCW38e46k0I6HLCrGFjnFMST3lbzPWYtbbur2B2bD=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"AMAZING CLUB!!!. It's super fun and the staff are really nice as well. The only problem was that when it got crowded the club was really hot. Other than that I would 100% recommend to both Spanish or foreign people.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura Martin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLM05RN8TeEyiioU9uVL-fVa9JT5FleIjQjlRQ1_tiat0uXzw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Horrible.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nicholas Clark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4tzmlBM_tP10ZWSxrndPl4C-xvcoJNdAZDBU-eVlGz-V6kVQA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice spot","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Silvia López Jiménez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXybhGAtAjxYMH_Wt-pubod8G2odC7M2O-5GAblyejNL-ZsyU0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Celebramos en la discoteca EPOKA el evento que organizábamos, COMPIMUN, un evento masivo universitario, y no podríamos estar más satisfechos. Los dueños fueron encantadores desde el primer momento y nos facilitaron muchísimo el trabajo. Lo mismo ocurre con el equipo de seguridad, que se portó fenomenal con nosotros: siempre atentos, comunicativos y manteniéndonos informados de todo lo que ocurría.

La música fue excelente y creó un ambiente increíble durante toda la noche. Además, todos los trabajadores fueron un encanto: desde la mujer de la entrada, pasando por los camareros, hasta la responsable del ropero.

De verdad, es un lugar al que recomiendo muchísimo tanto para salir un fin de semana como para organizar un evento. Nosotros, sin duda, repetiremos.

Todos los participantes de nuestro evento nos estuvieron diciendo lo contentos que estaban con la fiesta.

¡Gracias, EPOKA, por hacerlo todo tan fácil y por hacer que fuera un evento inolvidable!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sandra Ramirez Aznar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5g0It0xa8CsDMNlDCurX-DUhpHbjvFSP0wih6MB9sPRzPMJ14=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Muy mala experiencia en la discoteca Epoka. Estuvimos más de 40 minutos esperando fuera, habiendo pagado 22 euros por la entrada, para al final entar casi en los últimos momentos sin consumición. Además, no incluía ninguna copa después de las dos,habiendo esperando más de una hora para quitarnos esa copa , cosa que tampoco se avisó claramente.
Da la sensación de que vendieron más entradas de las que realmente cabían, porque no es normal que la gente tenga que esperar tanto tiempo después de pagar.
Sinceramente, una muy mala organización y una falta de respeto hacia quienes habíamos pagado. No recomiendo para nada esta discoteca.
Gracias.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Reservamos el sitio con barra libre, pagando casi 50 € por persona, y aun así el servicio fue pésimo. Éramos menos de 80 personas —ni siquiera llegábamos a 70— y, aun así, el alcohol empezó a acabarse a la media hora. El ron se agotó rapidísimo, el refresco de limón igual, y al final nos quedamos prácticamente sin opciones de bebida, algo totalmente inaceptable después del precio que habíamos pagado.

Además, la música dejó de funcionar y estuvimos cerca de 40 minutos sin música, lo cual rompió completamente el ambiente y la experiencia. Nadie dio explicaciones ni se preocupó por solucionar la situación con rapidez.

A esto se suma que el local abrió con muchísimo retraso: estaba previsto para las 12, pero no abrieron hasta 40 minutos más tarde, sin dar ninguna explicación ni disculpa.

Lo peor, sin embargo, fue el trato recibido. Tanto el personal como los porteros mostraron una actitud muy desagradable. Hablaron mal, con muy malos modos, incluso cuando no había ningún motivo. En mi caso personal, llegaron a insultarme directamente y a meterse conmigo, algo intolerable en cualquier establecimiento que pretenda ofrecer un mínimo de profesionalidad y respeto hacia sus clientes.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Blanca Moreno Martín","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLXF2voz1ZzBYrwzb25JHSkh_Qz_1uOJDPWNkbinaQIl9My5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Lamentable experiencia. Reservamos la parte de arriba del local para un evento de más de 80 personas, a medida que se iba acercando el día del evento nos iban poniendo más y más pegas, primero que si la música iba a depender del evento que había en la sala de abajo porque eran más y ellos decidían, luego que si cuando terminara la barra libre no consumíamos nos echaban, además, a pesar de que consumiéramos pagando copas nos terminaron echando 3h antes de lo pactado inventándose una excusa, y más de este estilo. En fin, muy poco profesional y unos maleducados la verdad. No volveré ni lo recomendaré.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Max Sánchez Terradas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJfzzZgNiF4ZfaBGcKoCTMkxMvIrOxzyq-pnAYaNj5nJiYc6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"No reserveis nunca este local para organizar ningun evento, fiesta porque el trato fue pesimo los porteros unos verduleros insultandonos sin razon alguna ademas de haber problemas con el alcohol habiendo cogido barra libre en fin pesima experiencia si teneis suerte nunca piseis este local.","Images":null,"When":""}]

The dj's and the place itself - superb!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Zack Whye Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUzjA3dSdV26TZ6myoNg5iMQw5i-SyzGN5L13dYI5-SBXBHhhE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The one biggest gripe about this place I had, early adults smoking on the floor, which is illegal in Spain. They have a smoking room in the back of the club. But no one cares, no staff stops people from smoking.
If you like some techno with your lung cancer, go ahead. My clothes stank for days.

Here's something for perspective: I told some locals about my experience and they were also surprised that people were still doing it in 2024.

More examples of people just not caring about the rules: one guy asked me if he could take a video with me. We were under the red lights on the dance floor. Their policy is no camera, especially on the dance floor. I asked if that was allowed, just to see what he would respond. He said, yeah it's fine, everyone is doing it. (yes, they all were lol 🙄🙄)

Vibe is subpar. Seems like the locals don't know how to dance to techno. It's always in a circle of friends, mushrooming. Or take off your shirt and swing your biceps side to side. Ego chamber.

There is a girl at coat check, she clearly hated her job. Gave everyone a dissatisfied face, shouts at people. When I came up to the counter, she made this "ugh" face like I'm bothering her (because no one was in the queue). Clearly, she preferred chatting with her male colleague instead. She also yelled at another girl after me because she showed a picture of the ticket. "Pictures of ticket invalid!" (in spanish)

A bartender with tattoos and obviously gyms, makes faces if you order water. Don't bother him unless you want a drink! 3 euros for water is not high enough for profit margin to bother him!

There are reddit threads about this place. I cannot agree more with some of the points and comments made.

I was there for Grace Dahl. But I think I lost 5 years of my lifespan to second-hand smoking.

I will not be back. I don't have photos or videos because I actually followed the rules.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Isabella Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLjdSdBElDzi3AYJaMaFZFxSS5lkUxW9It3eqgZo_NK-fjH5pM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best sessions in Madrid so far. The venue and its atmosphere, the concept and the artists are always on point.
Highly recommended!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Roman Alonso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGznRxG-kDFEQLQp7LnYz4z_sZ1g_JwywPvMv07q0XjD-yj1YE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Take a flight to berlin it will likely be cheaper than laster","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mohamed Hisham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7tMXt6zIknEAldP-LDNbhYe-h2F7657mbUx19hXz90wQxeyUMDw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best party in Madrid","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Victor Troncoso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLOomCGgPULZLVsaESxV-Cnn30_EpWQjKD6ndR9TdgPCYwzCg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice techno sessions, big club for +1k people","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tony Abascal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJwT_O7XStV4UhGPCiF9QEb5-9tDi4cp08vsYy45WsfgSZsjQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dark, Techno, Open Minded, simply amazing","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Manu De Hoyo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVw2aws1OgTJbuOVb6YglaqZDOJmoDgXKsxo3Zbu1ZZJmqR0qIn=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best night ever","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"António Aroso Menezes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4_S7_rYOjMEEA1yG1nyeWG3-Z5hcNAVbkz23cN6bxVJLe8mroug=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Every 30 seconds the DJ changed songs in a weird succession of styles. From rock balads to house music, from pop hits to spanish folk, he took us through a rhythm rollercoaster full of unexpected turns.

Felt like I was having a stroke. 1/5, I do not recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Isabella H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIRzBUlb6zPM59yGRFy0HcWNluMDfRes9UVfysHFn-JWbfcbA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Absolutely the worst nightclub ever and so unsafe! They charge you a fortune to get in and me and my friend both got robbed. Then the staff was beyond useless and started yelling at us. The security was so awful and rude and had massive rage issues. This is by far the worst club in Madrid and so expensive. The only good worked in this whole club was a bartender with red hair. She seems to actually be a genuine intelligent human being. Everyone else, just awful and incompetent. Even the coat rack lady had rage issues. The staff just dismissed me at every occasion stating that I must have just lost my phone because their club is so prestigious... why are you lying? My friend's bracelet got stolen off of her wrist. Please avoid for your own safety and I was very vigilant of my belongings, ive gone to many other clubs which had more people and none of this was happening.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Valentin Paul","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVoyPxEjuxgC7RiaI25vO99-b6Cr70vMmraO2rcYTb1U3DATRKWjA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Your classic, middle fancy mainstream club.
One dancefloor with mainly charts, pop and classics and a little bit of reggaeton. Nothing too crazy, could be a bit more intense.
The crowd is on average end twenties and moderately chic. Good men / woman ratio. Drinks and entry is pricey, but the drinks are generously mixed.
Fun for a average night out!
35€ entry incl 2 drinks.
One drink around 15€
Wardrobe 2€","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jasenko Hal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXcL2qvvW5TVChcOAFf1qLka-XwetbMbfFizyMjIsyoMhOMHjLb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The staff at the entrance was professional. The style inside is cool and the bar is average however, service was fast. The best thing about Gunilla is the music and the atmosphere it creates!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICB_o3VVw&fid=0x0:0xf76f1688fab431c7"],"When":"2022-12-27"},{"Name":"Santiago “Yago” Murube Tabanera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWT53fLo0ZquPyPJ0e4H2XGDQik4_ok2C_ifbYYoADEcAxAk-4D=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great vibe, good ambient, quality","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDr8sWdSw&fid=0x0:0xf76f1688fab431c7"],"When":"2024-7-16"},{"Name":"Beryl Nyamemba","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOkHxIfDrlXwmSPMrq_Oyo5G2heNiOl5uA4QEfx89hLcnEiHcI5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Such bad service, truly
We were in the line for 45 minutes, we reached the door at 12:25 (free entry ended at 12:30) but they wasted time telling stories and holding the line so that 12:31 would reach and we would have to pay. They were so mean and so inconsiderate. The staff at the door is literally the worst I’ve ever encountered in Madrid, if I could give 0/5 stars I would.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gio Umali","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIO9b_KSaiz-LbEH6R9Q_QiP4AXvnzmhg_9E1rILgQw4Jrtcw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Club confirmed that we were on the list through their official Instagram page and denied us at the door saying it wasn't confirmed. How then do we confirm that we can get in? I'm from Australia and it was my last night in Madrid cancelled all my plans cause I heard that this club is supposedly good. Ruined my night. Fix your service mate, fire your social media coordinators. They don't deserve the job if such a simple yes isn't even a yes","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bla Bla Bla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWI9jxWTm9fpviUJMD39NHqDmzh8NGJKF9_CN8D06bWbJiIVFW5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Nice environment, nice club, nice music and professional people behind the bar. I would have rated this place 4 stars, maybe 5.
Such a shame the guy at the tables is incredibly rude. I wanted to get 2 bottles and smoking pipes for my birthday and ended up taking my friends to a much better place.
One star goes to that man that thinks he can speak to customers as if they were his street pals.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Inside it was a bit difficult to navigate in the dim light because of random steps near the bar area. But as far as seeing a band there. It was a great sized location. Lots of places for a good view of the band.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDLhsbFkAE&fid=0x0:0x24eb987ea2343c8c"],"When":"2024-6-27"},{"Name":"Marcus Bond","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwzxEsEU7xc6uJfksl71zcbBuGPUlka6y8kqh2Fvccv1dKCrRTDA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great intimate gig venue.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC0XN8Jy71o_NtiYXR4RMTp&fid=0x0:0x24eb987ea2343c8c"],"When":"2025-12-10"},{"Name":"Jason Whittle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWucP4xYJaQIyfaM98cSZjbmnGyhsWj_5N5cehl7vHGwzLAcg2dQw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent music venue with a good sound and not overly expensive.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICvk-7i9wE&fid=0x0:0x24eb987ea2343c8c"],"When":"2024-12-14"},{"Name":"Josh Pádua","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVl1biHkeRVeTys3EHdK6wJpYl0cvSh61kkpBb0fkXbd4zoSAk1og=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The worst experience that happened to me. I was leaving a nightclub with my friends Fernanda and Débora when we were suddenly held under suspicion of stealing 20 smartphones. We were the only ones who were held, and no Spanish or European people were stopped. We asked for documentation to the bouncer to prove they're cops, but they just advised us to go with them outside to investigate. I started a livestream on my phone to document what was happening.

During the investigation, the police touched me and my phone, demanding that I stop recording. My friend was also recording, and they almost took her phone, demanding that she delete the video. It was a humiliating experience, and we had no support from the police who should have been protecting us. They checked our documentation, searched our bags, and checked our pockets. We were clearly not the suspects they were looking for, yet we were targeted because of our race and appearance.

Even though I remained calm and asked if I needed a lawyer, they still held my two girl friends. One of them was wearing a short dress, and the cop was touching her to check if she had phones on her. I stayed behind to demand answers, and eventually, we were all released. It was a traumatic experience, and we were only targeted because we didn't fit the description of the suspects.

I want to use video to speak out against racial profiling and discrimination. No one should be targeted and humiliated based on their race or appearance. It's important that we stand up for justice and equality, and hold those accountable who perpetrate such injustices.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDRiPW_JA&fid=0x0:0x24eb987ea2343c8c"],"When":"2023-4-16"},{"Name":"Игорь Мусорин","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLdhfSG9egsnwXJnTXgFOteAEVCNz_uNKPK_SBtASWtoYHw_TT9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everything is fine, sound, light, atmosphere, and most importantly, an excellent program and beloved UDO","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID-iu3PeA&fid=0x0:0x24eb987ea2343c8c"],"When":"2022-11-26"},{"Name":"Inday Love Daily Living","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_Ec-orR2crLrO258ZdD6fA1iFGccxk5XNbqCqq3-QRS8EOId7aQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an unforgettable night at this bar, the perfect way to end our time in Madrid. This fantastic venue offered a variety of halls, each with its own unique ambiance, and the incredible lineup of DJs kept the energy alive throughout the night.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDP7PSMgQE&fid=0x0:0x24eb987ea2343c8c"],"When":"2024-11-29"},{"Name":"Maya SL","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIw2sC_Uw0dP8YCYJ-lPKIPzZfsYvO-99GFHqx4ndlQGVSBJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came for a concert. I was a bit hesitant given the mixed reviews but it was 100% worth it. None of us had anything to drink so I can’t comment on pricing and we kept our coats given the bad experience of other reviewers. Regarding the sound, the sound was terrible for the opening act, and I feared it was a problem of the venue, however, the main artists had different equipment and the sound was absolutely flawless. The space is relatively small, so you are as close to the artists as it can be, the caustics are amazing and the energy is through the roof. As a concert venue I recommend it. Only drawback is that it was impossible to contact the venue prior to the concert. The never pick up the phone.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Emre Ç.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKsz5u6GLiyPG4h4yKQwy1ZgaAMDVZu6m_xr1hR-4nQMktM6hG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"WARNING TO ANYONE THINKING OF GOING TO FITZ OR BUYING TICKETS

I had a terrible experience at Fitz in Madrid. Even though I was entitled to a free drink, I was charged €15. First they took my ticket, then they pretended I never gave it to them. The staff were completely inexperienced and unprofessional. To make things worse, there was even a fight in the club that night. If this is how the owner wants the staff to behave, it says a lot about the place.

The only good thing about here is the second DJ was good!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDvpxogwy4BP5quX5f8EqJc&fid=0x0:0x601c7e8dc4eed195"],"When":"2025-8-25"},{"Name":"Jaqueline Gonçalves","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKav2Ms_aW_dfWeCe6iDY6FVcL2Daqnm2glnHz0YlFcXRJe9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just amazing. Fitz it's a very good vibe. Went with some friends and we had so much fun.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB3bQdrDt1T0HT2M2JZk6WJ&fid=0x0:0x601c7e8dc4eed195"],"When":"2026-2-8"},{"Name":"Ana Cwb","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJ_dVcU7rVWeSDeWt94gQzcy7HeV01eC1D1UY2iBbJmJVOPzYW=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I recently visited the club and, upon arrival, there was an extremely long line. In order to get in, we had to purchase a table in the VIP area, as it was clear that priority is given to guests who buy tables. Otherwise, we likely wouldn’t have been able to enter.
Once we were at the table, I ordered a shisha, which arrived without any issues since it was included in the minimum spend. After finishing it, I asked for a second shisha. I made the request to three different waiters, and one of them even told me that the shisha was out of stock. However, after waiting two and a half almost three hours, a group at the table next to ours ordered a shisha and received it within seconds.
At that point, I questioned the waiter again. The situation was extremely unpleasant and felt like negligence and prejudice. We are women, we had paid around one thousand euros for a table, and it seemed as though he assumed I wouldn’t be able to pay 30 euros for a shisha. I never asked for anything for free only for something I was fully willing to pay for.
I eventually had to ask a man at the neighboring table to place the order for me. Only then did the shisha arrive, and I paid for it without any issue. This was an embarrassing and completely unacceptable experience.
On a positive note, the club’s structure is impressive, the sound system is excellent, and the music is very good.
However, a very serious negative point was the discriminatory service, particularly because I am a woman, and the refusal to sell me a product that was clearly available.
Unfortunately, this significantly compromised the overall experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Oscar Hinojosa Landero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKp2Ik-lDn475wX573zsxAb6AJ2ttjwUY0Hb7gAuOGAGNhR0kA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"My first impression for someone well traveled is that the club has great sound system and visuals. The staff at the door are really cordial and diligent. The male bartenders are super nice but females have a  less positive attitude. In general the audience is 18 -25 max. Music selection is only Latin reggaeton which makes it super local and less international. This to improve 1) International music selection with good bangers 2) Female staff at the bar better attitude. I’m not planning to visit it again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura Fernandes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmwfz8Mf1j41IVQTRQMQaA5qmfA4rWTpBr_WkaYd6fThED0VX4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We went to Fitz Club yesterday and had an awful experience. My friends’ phones were stolen directly from their bags while we were inside the club. When we spoke to a security guard, he told us that at least 20 other people had their phones stolen the same night.
One of our friends paid 35 euros just to get in, only for this to happen. It’s truly unacceptable that so many thefts can occur in one night with apparently no proper prevention or responsibility taken.
This completely ruined our night and I would not recommend anyone to come to this club, especially if you value your belongings and your safety.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Beatriz Correia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocID84il50KgY8Dv8uYw8Twwn2QDm_wB9fcaFDQ_y4xKLNoMQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Very unpleasant experience at Fitz Club in Madrid. Our phones were stolen from inside our bags while we were inside the club, and we later found out that at least 20 other people had the exact same thing happen that night. When we reported it to security, they did absolutely nothing about it.

It honestly feels like a scam that so many thefts can happen in one night without any action taken. There was zero support, zero responsibility, and no sense of safety. A club where dozens of people get robbed in one night and staff ignore it is not a place I would  recommend. Be very careful if you decide to go.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ehsan Heidari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVja9keG5jCsFHsT7pdHV7ldUm4WUaofgGMyoPhdPVeFiAufI6A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great disco, huge side . user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jacqueline Bressan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWp1saDTmXzUcZCFg7wX6CnJdCxOHy6pr_U_0aqxUNcZH5tIL1-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"No one speaks English there. They’re not mean only about skin color as you can see and other comments, they also treat white internationals poorly.
The girl at the bar with braids on last Saturday was extremely rude.
She doesn’t know basic English and thought my friend called her a b word

She then asked security to remove her from the club simply because she didn’t understand English.

I understand that Spain is not as strong economically as other European countries, and it’s fine not to speak English… but lying and treating people badly?

Don’t go to this club if you’re an international, no matter your skin color. We were American, Italian, and Brazilian — all white - and the treatment was the same. They simply dislike internacional people.

Shameful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emine Mutlu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLhHilW_qMLGhmCU8vq0xB7409Ektmlke29xBCEFyft2YfGlG92=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This club racially profiled my friends brother at our graduation party. Before he was even at the front of the line, the bouncers told our group his hairstyle and outfit didn’t fit the “profile” of the club. They said this directly to me and my boyfriend at the front of the line, pointing down the line at my friends brother. When a mixed race woman who worked at the club came out to see what was happening (because I obviously demanded to see the clubs dress code which they didn’t have, and I started pointing out other people in line who were in shirts and jeans) the bouncers quickly stopped repeating his hairstyle as being as issue, but they doubled down that his “profile” wasn’t right for the club because they were “classic” style. He was the only black man in our group, and his sister and our class were there to celebrate our graduation. Once some of us got into the club, it was filled with white boys in wrinkled t-shirts and jeans. Some wearing hoodies, it was obvious the bouncers targeted my friend’s brother. On top of that, one of my friends that same night went up to the bar to ask for a glass of water and the female bartender threw an empty glass at her and told her to fill it in the bathroom. In the bathroom. Don’t support this club, the music is shit, the djs don’t know how to mix, the service is awful, and the employees are either racists or cowards or both. Spend your money elsewhere this place is trash.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Caroline Westberg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3lkul7R9m5PfcRITeXlV94McZf5G8iUQcbua8YiXY_KchwFf5=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Went here for the first time; one of my close friends (black American) had her brother visiting. Out of hundreds of people they let in, they called him out and said he didn’t fit the “profile” of the club because of his (btw, incredibly stylish) street wear outfit, despite every other white man wearing hoodies and jeans. Don’t spend your money at this club.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bryce Reece","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURad7R_aQJq8-36vIrCCASvkVrWj-GGWfYHGgDhmfVVNKa78Vmkg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"club is clearly racist. they have no dress code listed on website but let white boys in wearing whatever but will turn around black men wearing the exact same, even better clothing. much better off going somewhere else","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"A Nastazja","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgRQnAjZse0YKDzCIM5szSa0sug6pPxsSRfDjjUd6TznTE56U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Racist workers and place. The worst club I have ever been. This place thinks it’s illegal to be a decent human being. Also disgusting and dirty inside. The owner should be ashamed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emma Storck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgGiUBnRo7lyZm_bCmDfR8gc9StPP8rLvzzgyrDMN5-4lL70h2=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This was the worst club experience of my life. The bouncers tried to snap my friends real ID, and required us to show passport, state ID, and credit cards to enter. When our male friends attempted to come in they were turned away for having sport shoes on while every other man inside was wearing sneakers. Once inside drinks are 16€ each. For this expensive of a drink and with the unacceptable treatment we left immediately and will not be returning. I hope none of you go unless you are looking to have a bad time.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jenna Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkPtrrsrKPNx0FwX1tNclUem0FRGGw-aKZqDzmU69ziiOfxzGEwA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Staff is low-key so rude but I mean the music and the drinks were good I guess","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tilli Weissenberger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXntf8N8dfd9AFvREG0HBdVDQHY_JiXBtDCH5KZC2h4zUI2eRhuuA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A nice and clean dance club. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Carlos Zapata","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlGTvo5YV5HakvUbz4t4fNPBaQaTNtoeP7F3stZD0GBAZX1jztMw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un lugar espectacular para disfrutar de la vida nocturna latina en Madrid. Desde que entras, el ambiente te atrapa con su buena energía, luces vibrantes y música variada: salsa, vallenato, reguetón, bachata y tropical, siempre con la mejor selección para no dejar de bailar en toda la noche.

Lo que más destaca es la atención cercana del dueño, que se preocupa porque todos pasen un buen rato, algo que hace la experiencia más especial y auténtica. Además, tienen buenos tragos y unas picadas deliciosas para acompañar la fiesta.

El horario es perfecto para los que buscan rumba larga: de jueves a martes de 22:30 a 06:00.

🔊 Buen ambiente
🍻 Buenas bebidas
🎶 Música latina toda la noche
🙌 Excelente atención

Sin duda, un sitio recomendado para vivir la verdadera rumba latina en Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBHnooUu_pJPSbRfavaDsF7&fid=0x0:0xa442d56fe1c2a01c"],"When":"2025-8-24"},{"Name":"CAROLINA HERRERA HENAO","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocILfhfmEL3YtKTJEmKosccjfrvrbFHXOqGth5s2HtqOESkNPw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excelente atención,  muy buen sitio para compartir, buena música, ambiente agradable, comida deliciosa, recomendadisimo 100%","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDN_ujnNQ&fid=0x0:0xa442d56fe1c2a01c"],"When":"2024-1-22"},{"Name":"Yuzu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmPe_rEcwwCYkdJkBI4IkhuZ7gg361TuLE0Lkmv2HI0sD65wjl=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"La primera vez que entré, me pareció bastante decente. Claro que hay un pilar en medio que obstaculiza un poco la vista de la sala completa.
No sabría decir, pero hay más gente adulta/mayor que jóvenes, por lo que el ambiente es un tanto distinta.
Si no fuera por los que cuidan afuera, no lo encontraríamos así que *preguntad* siempre que podáis.

Solo espero ver a más gente joven y darle más vida con música más actual.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alfon Cuadrado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXM1EAsOHqfaX5AY8rGx7HHH8BJurSZKqTF-euFT2EXH2e5TUUf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Reservamos para una graduación el local, en concreto la parte de abajo. No nos dijeron q tenían que entrar personas externas porque el baño de hombres está ahí. Y además el aire acondicionado estaba roto. Arriba se estaba genial, pero abajo era un infierno.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"cristi_102_","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTBlp3_PHTkeAD-6Iz-4Zzz8sw8kAlw4H-pN7By8RJw8fsfLy8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Reservamos para una graduación y nos reservaron la parte de abajo "exclusiva" para solo gente de la graduación. No nos comentaron que los baños masculinos para todo el local estaban abajo por lo que entraban desconocidos todo el rato. Y encima no nos dijeron que se les había estropeado el aire acondicionado. Hacía muchísimo calor q era insoportable, y arriba si funcionaba perfectamente.
La próxima vez estos detalles se podrían avitar para q elijamos si queremos reservar o no en esas condiciones.
Por no hablar de que quedamos en un precio con barra libre y unas botellas en concreto y no había todo lo acordado.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Miguel C.a","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIiKVjoELM4G1gwHMEAZ6KiN1KBCcgihNLCV88s45jLmrmb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Es un antro, cutre, caro, sucio y peligroso. Nose como la policía no ha cerrado algo así todavía. Los vecinos tienen que flipar con las peleas que hay dentro y luego fuera y el mal ambiente que genera. No volveremos más con 2 veces ya hemos visto bastante.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mel Jiménez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXKBfMB2qCLfwOtaw8PcNd9vToC5ADXfVgCoWzFqJHQ1FwAFjs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Es la única discoteca bar que hay por el barrio, quizá por esto es que la gente entra, he ido un par de veces, asusta un poco el aspecto al entrar, por lo oscuro, los baños tienen lo justo, no he visto peleas o algo parecido, también es que no estuve mucho tiempo, era plan para terminar la noche e irse a casa, esta sitio es para latinos, música colombiana sobretodo, los precios de las copas son las mismas q en otras discos, en fin.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sergio Molina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIBTvSVqwbI05jD8o7VQVd4e571VpoIfoGYtitGuF1gWoDzag=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Los cócteles son deliciosos y van muchas chicas lindas, el servicio, 20/10, muy amplio el lugar y hay billar.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Interesting decor and setup. There are also dance performers who were disguised as monkeys and who appear have a good show in between sets, including some gymnastics and ceiling hanging from a steel frame structure. Cover was €20 and included one drink. Shoutout to the barmaid that served me up with a very generous portion of vodka for the vodka soda I ordered.

I was debating between giving three or four stars, and ended up giving three with the main reason being that the sound system quality is (imo) below average. Maybe I’m slightly biased as I would consider myself a semi-audiophile, but I do think that sound quality has a big impact on the vibe in any venue.

Music played was a mix of reggaeton, top 40 and old hip-hop classics.

Cool interior decor, interesting concept
and artistic performance.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dan C (danny)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXl3gGFKvvwZlqT1q_h6OXdPbRxvOp85zkP9Kt2ecAU6O0hfkWYyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The floating pool is really cool. I was visiting Madrid from the UK and attended with my Spanish friends. Everything was going great before a security violently pushed me without any warnings at all.  I was shocked and I asked him why he did that and he was right in front of my face pushing and been very aggressive. I strongly believe he abused his position of power at the club believing he can get away abusing club goers and getting away with it. We complained to the who we believe was the manager or the appropriate person at the entrance of the club and to our surprise, the lady was defending the security guard and even lied in the complaint form that he was attending to an emergency at the time. To make this clear, if he was attending to an emergency, he wouldn't have not continued to attack me for 3 minutes after he has originally violently pushed me.  Una's Chung Lee, it is important for you to respect the people at attend your club because without them, there is no Unas Chung Lee. Your staffs can not be getting away with violent behaviours under the premise of  "I'm working" according to the security guard. What the security guard did was crime and it is unacceptable.  This incident happened on the 27th November 2022 between 4am and 4.25am. Check your security camera footage inside the club ( the main hall) to confirm this incident. [{"Name":"Scott Lloyd","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUNm8RdukZgh8sPY3zpoZHxgTRSTckJTT1W7WlnOzLXUQZWRR3og=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"More club than restaurant but ok option for groups who want to do some dancing after dinner. Don't expect to sip coffee and chat after dinner. The tables are gone. Jackets dispersed and DJ starts rolling in five minutes.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Quentin Randis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUu7eAAGkCaXccom956c46Afg3l9efGb04aaKbuDaAqz_rfpsd2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Terrible experience. Went for a birthday, ended up being extremely disappointed.
Food was overpriced to say the least. Basic bread will cost you 4.20€ 😂.

Plus, left with a bonus stomach ache.
Never seen toilets so disgusting in a restaurant in my life.

Couldn’t even see the “show” from our table, if you wanna call this a show.

I could say more but I will stop here for their sake. For the same price you can book a faaaaar better place in Madrid. 👎🏻","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lucia brave","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIC8qg8ynLJaXPz1EQoRsY5o-3GzkAf8coDx2j6IS1yUaInjA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing experience from start to finish. The food was delicious, with fresh ingredients and perfectly balanced flavors. The service was impeccable—attentive and friendly at all times. The ambiance is cozy and well-maintained, making the visit even more special. Without a doubt, this is a place I will return to and highly recommend. Thank you for an exceptional dining experience!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kianyi Norwood","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYHFjb_UqxxN1ZSSln50uMR46vf0u4KXRffEMm7LP7d7-_5_g81Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came to Marabú on a Thursday night.
The staff was very nice and accommodating to my Spanglish speaking. Lol
The food was great.
I had the seabass.
Overall Marabú creates a very fun atmosphere for their guests.
I came by myself and still had a great time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJib2u6wE&fid=0x0:0xec80372dfa2031a8"],"When":"2023-6-29"},{"Name":"JAVIER RIVAS RONCERO","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJclV_FrIpHkszaZ4qFnChtCR8aa38PUzraIuHbFHzB2QGFfk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Place to dance and dinner , live performance when you take dinner , average quality food as the service is completely overwhelmed , but it was just simple as a good place and average food quality","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICWxrmMHw&fid=0x0:0xec80372dfa2031a8"],"When":"2022-2-25"},{"Name":"karthikeya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSRBGm8F0s6Q5HcTpY65Q1ch067N2Pn-x0PMbIZggh0MrkS8d93w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place has a really chill vibe, the best part it has a night club in it too …low-key hidden","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICOweCbGQ&fid=0x0:0xec80372dfa2031a8"],"When":"2022-6-11"},{"Name":"Bla Bla Bla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWI9jxWTm9fpviUJMD39NHqDmzh8NGJKF9_CN8D06bWbJiIVFW5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Customer Experience: Not happy at all, sorry!
First of all the receptionist is quite distant and not welcoming at all. We arrived quite early but no one informed us on the dynamics or if we knew there was going to be a live show so half of the table couldn't see the performance while other tables were empty during the whole night. ( Not a smart move ) A drunken girl kept screaming at the bar with her friends but no one took action.
The waitress: She was so rushing on taking the order we had to tell her 2 times to wait, when she brought the drinks and food we almost felt like we owed her an apology, her very bad attitude resulted in no tip at all.
Food: Most of the dishes came in transparent bowls and very little inside, average food quality with discrete presentation.
Venue: Very cosy , well lit and nicely decorated, they have one of the best suspended bars in Madrid.
Price : They brought us the bill before even asking because they had to switch from restaurant to club ( Are you kidding? Who cares?)   Expect to spend about 45 to 50 Euro per person including wine.
Music: Very pleasant Soulful house DJ set + live act.
Advise to management: Train your staff ! It's such a shame we won't get back just because for that.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"A M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7S19NO51IBz1lkKQAjF5A7A734a98YUTkzcv1KVTWASFNRhF8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went to Marabú for the dinner show and was absolutely blown away! The talent is truly one of a kind and I had such a wonderful time. Special shoutout to performer Paula for making this such a special and fun evening!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Jamaica Aali","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2olQenDcp7iHvIvIQmc5K6hRjZYJHBkwfsXV_jbHph6Z-jP4CXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Definitely a vibe. My girls and I stopped in because a promoter outside mentioned that they played Afrobeats. Sold!  It ended up being a mix of sounds, but they played a few of our faves and we had a great time.

The reviews confused me about what the vibe would be, so here’s some detail. It’s a small but not minuscule club with hookah in the front and the dance floor focused in the back. On a Tuesday we paid a 12 euro cover that included a sugary welcome shot and a drink of our choice from the bar.

The place looks cool—think neon lights styled to say “Black Lived Matter”, a New York theme, and lots of posters of hip hop legends. It was a diverse crowd, but we were among the only Black women.

Certainly not a place with universal appeal, but it appealed to us!  The DJ was raucous, the people friendly, and at midnight things were really just getting started. Before we left we all said, “we’re definitely coming back here”.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mert Yüksel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMNCjW0yj4qdBbhf6x0ytUCdkYIGQAh1ywjgFfzjmYxh2LU6Pa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"That was definitely insanely bad for me. But the interesting thing is that is exactly what they offer. There are strippers inside and lots of people ordering hookah. Drinks are also insanely expensive(5€ for small beer). However, the staff was sooo nice, the music was cool and design of the place was very impressive. I think the place is on wrong hands. It really has great potential but bro……… don’t serve hookah in the club and get rid of the strippers….","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-76DX4QE&fid=0x0:0xb49f2b9e7757e8f4"],"When":"2022-11-17"},{"Name":"Anna May","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3ZM5MvF757Tp1mC19k7maCmFhPiSIxk_8Q6sEqcg820NiHpqY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stopped here on the pub crawl. We had a great time here. Super cool cocktails the way they are presented and tasted delicious. Highly recommend. The staff were lovely as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDv5PitpgE&fid=0x0:0xb49f2b9e7757e8f4"],"When":"2024-12-17"},{"Name":"Bojana Chapkunovska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLCiWXQ7iQElawD0Prny3_L9glkrCYk8fyVf0sK-ctGBuzuv_o=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The worst club I have ever been to. The smell was unbearable, the staff were incredibly rude, and the entire place felt filthy and unpleasant.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leonardo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVeIa32b9UdGQyvgDqCtJXWSKEeIZ1IVQePVAgMDmU6R_SsyvjU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Drinks: ⭐️⭐️⭐️
Service: ⭐️
Price:⭐️

It is a place that attracts very weird people. It has go-gos inside (not necessary) and the prices are not transparent. The attention is horrible and they asked us to change places in a forced way. The experience was generally unpleasant. just say that the shisha was not bad.

not recommendable at all.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICpr7r8gQE&fid=0x0:0xb49f2b9e7757e8f4"],"When":"2023-8-12"},{"Name":"Volodia Kotylo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVuSJBItdVemy9Vqp699KXn10HXVFb8AiFINxM2xe97sPHCjSCF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The club is veerry small. The screen is looping a 3 minutes long clip with advertising of ecstasy and sexy girls. Water is in the glass bottle, there is a small corner where you can leave it while dancing (and hope no one else drinks it))). That were so-so things. Good is your nice vibe, good company, local girls that know all words for Spanish songs. If you want to have fun, you will.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDEl7DFxwE&fid=0x0:0xb49f2b9e7757e8f4"],"When":"2019-4-16"},{"Name":"Ross Lewis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVsXs7EYBfTkHk2IU6BT1dpYixBJB047gPOoIxPtuJKTdIdDiskVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Our first discoteca experience in Madrid. It's smaller than we expected, maybe only 20ft wide, but long, with 3 bars. Cover was 12€ per person but that gave you 2 drink tickets, which was actually cheaper than buying the drinks outright. It's one of the few clubs that opens early. We got there around 10pm and were afraid we would be the only people there. We weren't but it wasn't crowded yet at that time. By 11:30 pm the place was pretty packed. If you're not into the really late club scene but still want to experience a discoteca this is a fun place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDczaO14wE&fid=0x0:0xb49f2b9e7757e8f4"],"When":"2018-6-1"},{"Name":"Bash M.T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5VVzJbaw08qglqJOHSqjFAdkxsd6ObgUZcxLjmUYdhOWL6g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worst place in Madrid, full of smokers and bad people inside, feels like a cloud of smoke. Avoid it by any chance","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Charlotte P.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsk5NpwW7E2CauOvSEQrXWiTHw26xs_mpZ_xWDIouytr5UdSs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went there a Thursday. Pre class was good even though the level was a bit too high.

Please note that they open almost at the same time as the class is supposed to start. Don't come 25 min early, as I did. The doors will be closed 😆.

15e for entrance including class and a cocktail is a very good price! Wardrobe was 2e.

The staff both in the wardrobe and the bar was really nice. The guy at the bar asked where I came from and made jokes.

Gender ratio was good and the atmosphere warm and welcoming. Many people spoke English and I was invited to dance equally often as I invited people to dance. Nobody rejected me. However, I learned that here people dance only one dance with each person. Where I live, it is two. So don't take this as a sign they didn't like dancing with you.

There was a good mix of skill levels. Some beginners, some improvers and several advanced dancers. Age wise I would say most people were in their 30s or 40s.

The dance floor was big and there was enough space. Was also enough of sofas and chairs to sit on. However, the toilet could have been a bit fresher and with more than one place to dry the hands.

All in all, I had a lot of fun and would be happy to come back again next time I am in Madrid","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emma’s Log of Places","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5qLG_Ysepae5uFQL2vlJ3AIFGRBJDvhfmBpxLrrVIMjLN-sI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Went to get my social dancing kick, cost €15 for entry but also got a free pass for next day! The instructors were very welcoming and kind, spoke more English than I can of Spanish. We were taught Zouk, and then it was a Zouk Bachata social afterwards. Very welcoming environment and nice dance space. A bit sparse of a crowd but we did leave around midnight, on a thursday. So maybe thats on us.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDb8vCupAE&fid=0x0:0x5eeb31aec1666a2f"],"When":"2024-8-3"},{"Name":"laura Lalla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLxfTTlC7kZsfK3ki-WX2wwWX898Z0FtspsFUvQJ3WErO9aY8RS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"They write Friday before 19pm free entrance if u share the flyer, but it isn’t true, be careful!!
I arrive on time, i share it and i took them 5 friends arriving later , but it wasn’t enough, they wanna charge me.
Super unfair lady at the entrance. Plus if you are ‘friend of’ you can enter..didn’t like the behaviour. I went to another disco, bigger and free entrance for real, not bullshit.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bartek","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU39HWrsxuBFcP_DS5J2toaTDDcY-0H88d27Y8vQdXQ8DJPggw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place for all the Bachata and Salsa lovers. Music is of a good choice and sound quality is great. You get a drink included in the entry ticket. The room is pretty big and the floor is good for dancing.

Also the are workshop classes before parties included in the ticket. All in all that is a great place, Thanks for the party.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JOSE BORT","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWt94QnccFDD588CWGw55MsQM1Xb74z5ZPo2NkVxvnW6EdRVJ7m=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very nice club 👌 I would give then 5 start but the fact they only put Bachata sensual took that start away 🤣🤣🤣but if you love to dance sensual bachata style  , you would  definitely love this place 👌👌but as a Dominican I need my bachata to sound like Dominican Republic 🙌🙌🙌🤦🤦but that is just me","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christiana Stasa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwVas7rUqATegJdA27e2T1zArtITdSgG78kgaf6Xojk0Ch6bYe6A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It was great to dance, the dancefloor was huge! The only downside for me was really not selling proper water bottles. They only had a tiny bottle, which is not enough if you're dancing all night, you have to buy all the time and with the bar being so crowded is actually difficult. I just think water is very important in a place like that and was not expecting that tiny bottle to be all they had.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael McDonald","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVW58KYn-nU2TlLWtoPVpqaieNKN9xr7hrpLIxmXQ1GfLdaSY0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’m a salsa and bachata dancer from New Mexico USA. This place is on target and a big version of our best clubs. So many dancers. I felt I knew them all. Traditional salsa and smooth salsa. Totally fun.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Scott Chung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGbfgqfhgK3PI24KRCaNu5vg65tI-zsDUICBiDgkkagt5qkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dancers are very friendly and comfortable to ask to dance. It is like a bar.  Bachata 3: Salsa 1 ratio.  Cove $15 euro with one free soft drink.","Images":null,"When":""}]

One of the waiters was very rude because my friend was pushed by him (maybe without intention) and my friend just said be careful and the guy didn't like it. Then, the guy insulted and pushed my friend and challenged him to fight 😡.
Fortunately, a security guy saw everything and came to apologize for his college behavior.

I'm not an expert in Madrid but I believe this must be a very well known place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICMsNHxDg&fid=0x0:0xf7254b82d7c33d72"],"When":"2019-9-13"},{"Name":"Arnald","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9pzpCyk-ypFh8AWHt13pv9iNRA-5Y9ZlCyPz5tv2KqJwLdRz7LA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It's one of the best clubs in Madrid, amazing venue and amazing sound. I played saxophone at a party there and I totally recommend it if you're looking for a place to enjoy nightlife in Madrid.
SAXONARA","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICl25PbjQE&fid=0x0:0xf7254b82d7c33d72"],"When":"2023-11-27"},{"Name":"Thuy Nhi Lam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9HmthEDoNCBXiYzbgtu12yP11j1vxX20vWnV9VTBBRUVF_GQT1w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"First of all, we already had trouble entering the club even though we had a table. Secondly, the security inside acted way too self-important. Honestly guys, it’s just a security job — who do they think they are? Especially one guy who kept checking our table even though we were sitting right behind him.

I go clubbing all over the world and I have never experienced such an unfriendly security person. My sister accidentally dropped a glass because someone pushed her. She apologized three times, but they refused to accept it and kept acting overly dramatic. It clearly wasn’t done on purpose.

If you want to have fun here, you either need to spend a loooot of money or you’re better off going somewhere else. The music is good, but overall the place feels very superficial.

We still got drunk, had fun, and enjoyed many cocktails, but honestly it’s not really worth it.
That said, the guards at the entrance were very friendly, and the music was good.

2 stars for the music.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gina Patino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWWbT-Q4bcQM8M0jMcJmztDrGu8QhvrPvIP9boldVFvkF5ThKLc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I don’t understand why customer service is so bad in Madrid. I came here for my birthday, and I wanted to have a good time, but there is not caring, sympathy. I bought  a hookah for a table and drinks… someone promised me water. Never came. A Bar tender named Edward, refused to give the water, because he said, I had to pay for everything, even though I was promised for water.
I can’t believe the lack of sympathy in this world. What have we become these days?
Tap water is given anywhere! Especially if I paid for a table.
Don’t come to this club. Customer service is horrible!
Please do yourself a favor and don’t come here! I’m sure there are better clubs, hopefully.","Images":null,"When":""}]

The air conditioning is terrible, it is very hot inside. The bottom floor was like entering a sauna and filled with bad odors. People would vomit and there was no staff seen to sanitize the vomit so it reeked of vomit the whole night. The cloakroom charges you 2€ per coat and 4€ for bags. The entrance is 20€ for 2 drinks at 1:30 am. The water costs 4€ . [{"Name":"Macareno Sevillano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVAh7tFpwllxLmWKP-OquDsp312xgUlYepHwoPv2W7JU5SzKuR6=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fuimos ayer por primera vez desde Sevilla para el Madrid Break.El trato por parte de la dueña/encargada fue excelente desde la llegada , igual uno de los camareros que siempre estuve atento a nosotros.
El reservado en cabina merece la pena.
Estuvimos en todo momento con total seguridad y disfrutando por todo lo alto.
Gracias !!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAMAtMOzhjQZOpOC5SwRbZb&fid=0x0:0xf68cedbeddce58f4"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"Alex","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuHywWGs-6f8Igvns51OszWshXZ8lQpJSoflZBdpUplfaOah_O=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Fuimos a una fiesta de breakbeat. La entrada fue barata, 13 euros con consumición. Tardaron en ponernos la copa 15 minutos contados, los baristas más lento que el caballo del malo. Una botella de agua, 5 euros, una estafa. Los puertas parecían haber salido de una peli mala de Tim Burton. Bordes y antipáticos, estuvimos esperando en la puerta 10 minutos por la cara, la sala no estaba ni medio llena. 3€ por salir a fumar, atraco tras atraco. La música se escuchaba decente.
Eso si, la fiesta de breakbeat el mejor ambiente, por la fiesta, no por la sala.
VIVA ANDALUCÍA 💚","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Inés de la Paloma Povo García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9BqJ3-yoZI6mhpbdIK4eHl-uoASDRlQlcgFfN_Z15XfHp0MX-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Aunque la sala era bastante pequeña, el ambiente era bastante cómodo y el personal de staff era muy amable y se preocupan mucho por el bienestar del cliente.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAf6pQXH20DyPuVPuNTkeZ7&fid=0x0:0xf68cedbeddce58f4"],"When":"2025-11-14"},{"Name":"Guillermo Recio Rodríguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGfLygJgeN7_66uBQgQTI5XvJkZi5LXVQ0UOVPSBmgAKUcmybxjw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hay bonos de cerveza o refrescos y de copas que están entre los 15 y los 25 euros por 3 cervezas o refrescos o 3 copas","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB1AO8Qmf1KqOgafdPfptua&fid=0x0:0xf68cedbeddce58f4"],"When":"2025-9-8"},{"Name":"Lorenzo Nastasi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcn-OLKT_yNryFbvXuBPDIWCBlN4wcaM5a-n6oQYD7MHbR-P8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un club my simple que juega con los efectos de la luces y es perfecto asi pa mi tambien por la vibra,los suenos. merezca una noche de fiesta!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC9J7sCpB97F_Vokj4hIJp6&fid=0x0:0xf68cedbeddce58f4"],"When":"2025-8-19"},{"Name":"Noemi A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWsNPPhIeDSjCEaHh1hZfvR5ZvtPGczhUwXZEsLszoDMuizQc-o0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Estuvimos en una fiesta rewind.
Llevamos entrada anticipada con consumición incluida, para acceder, hay que esperar fila.
En general bien, con gente pero no agobiante.
Disponen de ropero 3 eur.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIt_agAg&fid=0x0:0xf68cedbeddce58f4"],"When":"2025-4-13"},{"Name":"Sara D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGU0Jkz5vMIz9RuCP8N6zRNJdLeOxJIlSZLfMFTo0-9POTJiSR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Fui por el cumpleaños de una amiga. Ofrecen reservado gratuito en el mes de septiembre para los que cumplen, eso está muy bien, pero tengo que decir que es el primer sitio en el que pedí un vaso de agua y me lo negaron. Se supone que es obligatorio 😱","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tatiana Beltran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVwyaDQCjyS1gKWwlAzDlez6tq4acT17V4E7RHFtwGW5g5J4GRr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Fui a un evento de UnderHell en NEXT Clubbing y la experiencia fue muy buena. El sonido y la curaduría musical estuvieron excelentes, se nota una propuesta bien pensada y con identidad.

Hay algunos aspectos a mejorar: el agua cuesta 5 € por una botella pequeña, lo cual me pareció excesivo. Los baños estaban limpios, pero no tenían picaporte en la puerta, así que no se podían cerrar desde dentro, lo que generaba cierta incomodidad e inseguridad.

También cobran 5 € por salir y volver a entrar, lo cual considero excesivo. Aunque el lugar cuenta con zonas de descanso, a veces es necesario salir para reducir el estímulo sonoro y tomar aire de verdad, especialmente en eventos largos o intensos  a veces no se trata solo de salir a fumar.

A pesar de esos detalles, es un lugar con una muy buena propuesta musical y volvería. Sería ideal que revisaran estas condiciones para mejorar la experiencia general.","Images":null,"When":""}]
