El ambiente es de clientes de más de cincuenta años,  la música es de los 70/80, tienen orquesta,  la acústica no es muy buena aunque le ponen corazón.  Hay una sala cerrada donde ponen sevillanas. Ponen buenos aperitivos, pasan bandejas de picoteo y hacen sorteo. Sitio tranquilo y agradable.
Gracias","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCtWC4tzRiiHGIQKGrzlJK2&fid=0x0:0x7ed868ac02b43959"],"When":"2026-1-13"},{"Name":"Maribel Charmelo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUU9lZKMZE_soeZNMn2Sa72sVLMUeI758rILT1jtmavOBB5bo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Anoche fui a esa discoteca, después de estar más de una hora de pie afuera para entrar, con mucho frío y unas señoras discutiendo por los puestos de la fila, se supone que hacemos fila para coger buenos asientos. Mi amiga y yo nos fuimos a la pista a bailar y y señoras se sentaban pero luego cuando dejábamos de bailar ellas se levantaban y nos cedían los asientos como es normal teníamos las bebidas en la mesa. Hasta que en otra ocasión nos fuimos otra vez a bailar. Y cuando dejamos de bailar estaba un hombre y le digo permiso que me voy a sentar y no se quiso levantar. Y decía que los asientos son libres. Pero y entonces después de estar haciendo una fila para estar sentada. Puede llegar alguien y se sienta y te quedas de pie y con la copa en la mesa? Me pareció de muy mal gusto. En otras discotecas no pasa eso.  De verdad me sentí tan mal. Y un caballero que de caballero no tiene nada.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Esperanza Lopez Diaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItlIDKkOmcJI70fbYO3ikYxu0GbrUwA_ZAVaM0uci0PIX70w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Es una discoteca para gente mayor ( > 45 ), pero la música es pésima, del siglo pasado,  de los 70/ 80 incluso más antigua,  y no sé dan cuenta q esa música ya pasó. Aunque nosotro@s tenemos una edad , la música nos gusta de este siglo,  aquel ya pasó.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Esther Rodríguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJTpnBAju3Ibp1Y0GOW_HGTcfQ7DWxQvbu5fZtQYFLSpZjDfg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un espacio acogedor, buena música, el personal de la sala, súper servicial. Es increíble encontrar los baños de mujeres a cualquier hora de la noche súper limpios y con un olor muy agradable, es de destacar la limpieza del lugar y el trato recibido.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pilar Huelves Ayuso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI5Q8rPI9LtyCzgATMmbS-LhLlTXng6KPP2gyukq0KUSHsiMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ayer martes estuve en la discoteca por primera vez,
Me pareció muy bonita,  moderna. Y lo que me gustó. Es que no hay orquesta. A .mi particularmente no me gustan , es como si estuvieras en una boda ...y por supuesto la música 🎶 disco suena muchísimo mejor 👍
La música pusieron de todo , me gusto bastante. Pero por favor más música 🎶 de los 80, 90..de nuestra época...música que  jamás pasará.de moda sobre todo la inglesa, todos más o menos allí somos de esa época.....un ambiente de gente madurita a la que nos gusta bailar y pasárselo muy bien 👍
En ,General todo muy bien. Sólo ese detalle","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Thomas Wash","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRxmlkQT3DUwBxteWKWgjWQDFs78O__UaEfvj_ANXeBRhEojM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The area looks a bit posh but it is generally a chill club. if you are into hip hop go on sundays the music is amazing. the only problem is that you may see some people that look kind of sketch but from my experience there is nothing to worry about. there is not a whole lot of places to sit so if you go be prepared to stand or dance.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shelaia Cook","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocILFRkET1jpTtkoBxiYzM6mbnlO0gKtdFJU9BExqEzsnutyYw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Saturday has Great music!!! Hip hop, old school, Dance Hall, and Reggaeton! Upon entry you get ur tickets for ur drinks and the bartenders were very attentive at the bar. You can buy a hookah/shisha for the night for about 20€ and somebody comes to refill your coals throughout the night. What great fun !! I might even see you there!!! 😉","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJQ_NLz23KeoHqyvvrxz7t76c7gnlNCKXOF3cTZF5Rl3DNxyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"AVOID! THEY PUNCH PAYING CUSTOMERS HERE AND THEY SELL FAKE ALCOHOL.

A group of three of us went here for what was meant to be a chill night out in Madrid with some good drinks and music.

Unfortunately, the experience was anything but good. We were accused of not paying for the bottle of gin we had ordered, at which point the waiter just took our drinks away. Upon trying to calm the situation down, and realising that maybe we had made a mistake, we paid again. Sadly, although we believe that we paid they never gave us a receipt so we had no proof. In trying to just continue the night and have a good time we paid again. The waiters and security however all continued to be incredibly hostile. We attempted to apologise over 6 times, and tried to shake hands to show that we did not mean any harm but the waiter kept acting hostile and not accepting our apology.

About an hour and a half before closing, one of the waiters then came and just took our shisha away. When we questioned why he took it away he just said they were closing, which we knew to be a lie. We asked why take our shisha then and not any of the others on the other 3 tables that had them and again he came up with some nondescript reply and then proceeded to call security on us, who then proceeded to kick us out of the establishment.

Again, trying to be polite and not wanting to look for trouble we left willingly but wanted to try to diffuse the situation. After all we didn’t do anything wrong, and we just don’t need that kind of negativity especially when all we wanted was to go out and have a good time. As we were trying to calm things down before leaving, the security guard assaulted one guy in our group by punching him square in the chest and winding him completely. The punch mark was red and visible for hours after. There were 9 of them threatening to beat us up, and only 3 of us (1 girl & 2 guys) trying to remain calm and respectful. Not wanting to start a fight, we left and instead we were followed for about 10 meters down the road by their biggest security guard.

To make things worse the alcohol that they sold us (a bottle of what was meant to be tanqueray gin) was most definitely a bottle of fake alcohol. We only managed to have 2 small glasses of it each before they aggressively kicked us out and we were all horrifically sick after. We hadn’t been drinking prior to going to the club, so it does not make any sense how 3 fully grown adults were so ill after 2 small drinks.

The people that run this establishment are a disgrace to humanity, they should not be allowed to represent Spain and Madrid in such a way. They were menacing and hostile from the get go.

When there are so many places to go and dance and have a good time, you do not need to go here. Serrano 41 should not have a license to operate. They treat their customers like they would treat criminals, if not worse, and they sell fake alcohol, which if mixed incorrectly could kill someone.

Absolutely disgraceful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MARÍA GÓMEZ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ7fQnSQlhDXXzboHcUKZ6KPHBAQfogfr3nJ8k9zAUN-JpnwA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Awful. I've been living in Madrid for many years now and this club is the worst I have ever been in. The line to enter is crowded, unorganized, and filled with minors carrying fake IDs. To skip the line, we paid 100€ for a "reservado" (supposed to be like a nice table with a couch and a bottle of alcohol) (we were 4 friends). The bartender gave us a tiny tall table in the middle with a side seat (we had to sit with people that hadn't paid at all) and brought us Gordon's Gin (6€ bottle, cheapest you can get) and 10 sodas. Absolutely A WASTE of money. The music was techno and latino, the crowd was very young (16-18) and there were a couple fights between drunk teenagers.
Never ever going to this place again.
Un zulo. Un timo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Boramy Huor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXfF-tzsY8IUU0FgCFaxLOPI_4sbRGD1PK6mvPmOcliAWPWvPmg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The place got much better lately!

Better lights, new bathrooms, premium beverages (Ciroc, Belvedere, Hennessy, Jack, black/green/Gold label, Moet, Dom P, Luc Belaire, veuve Cliquot, Cristal,  G Vine, Puerto de indias, RoSEE, ... the vip table got extended and will be even better beginning of january due to new Vip area extension.

Half the staff changed too, new hostess at the door with VIP list

Friday’s Hit Music at FORTY ONE party
Sunday’s FUNK KOMBAT party with Hip Hop, Trap, Urban music in general","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDE49HVvwE&fid=0x0:0xaae47f158b637563"],"When":"2017-12-20"},{"Name":"Samuel Akinin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3mZ0zfHo6aPF2PfOTu8NfeJZC_b6n9btF0yl7dxsXO5jIyoMQxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great young crowd! [{"Name":"Ray Recce","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVaLUzLvo5cjXZS1ZzCMxys31WGA7W0ybQPm3fN8OEkc5vtYjM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We went inside because of a well priced “menu del dia” they welcomed us with a glass Cava and the menu was okay regarding the price range. The restaurant had a nice atmosphere with jazzy lounge music. Toilets were clean and the staff were nice and helpful, they even started up a Beamer to see a football match.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOX_2du1qsODuQE&fid=0x0:0x727f4371f09b5e12"],"When":"2025-5-13"},{"Name":"Kenneth Liu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_XXcqXb7gYDRGJ6dkqV_F5ic9rk-KRF5mDdFKp_n8_jPqdHA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We went on a very quiet rainy Thursday and overall it’s a lovely bar/club with friendly service. The issue we had was the bar was extremely poorly stocked with hardly any drink options available, but the drinks that were available they were good.

I’d love to come back on a busier night to check it out","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex Comitale","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJe8g3MyFO4sKOfU_SVmLKBltb-9zBWBb1YKcaMrQ00SDxSMg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I came to this club on vacation for the first time in Europe. I came to have a good time and I always end up buying at least 1-2 bottles when I go to clubs. I came here and the bar tender was working and gave me so much attitude and did not want to serve me and was giving me a hard time just to get a drink . She made me want to leave and I ended up buying nothing because of the service and atmosphere she created . They should really train the bar tenders to be more friendly and helpful . I also speak English/Spanish/ and Italian so they could completely understand me . I don’t recommend this place .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark Ngavaite","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzIJA7GupeCMcbdHVAAcqCE3nYqhzrRr5RuLH05uXeh_BQidw-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Was looking forward to coming here when my friends told me they had booked a table. Took over 30 minutes to get someone to come and ask for the drinks, when they did come over they took one order them quickly went away and this was repeated again. Eventually we ordered our food, I ordered medium rare steak but it was delivered well done. Again paying was then hard to get someone to give us the bill.
Afterwards we went starlight down to the basement for the club and we had a table. Didn’t want to take payment before they gave us the drinks. I just wanted to get payment out the way early on. The music selection was good","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICRtOr6rwE&fid=0x0:0x727f4371f09b5e12"],"When":"2023-3-26"},{"Name":"Kathy Vela","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWP0Y8hokaVgI0weyOv8EBGKXJRiGRuJShPUJTJW1PKXX5zMXEMlA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We got in randomly. The food was extremely delicious: the Paella a la Mar and my drink was: Tinto de Verano. The first was a dish based of rice with seafood 🥘. And the drink was with Vermont, wine and lime juice. If you are not into red wine, it can be this an option. Of course the red wine Rioja was also good. The waiter was polite and cozy. We were there at 5.20pm and it was empty (which i like 😌).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDPrOqgWA&fid=0x0:0x727f4371f09b5e12"],"When":"2024-11-29"},{"Name":"Square Meters Digital","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxxFaj3y7ywh7eJjx6OD02trgbJhdqauTvYSWypHEVsFn0OngvSA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Stay Away! New year's Eve 96 euro entrance and scotch in a wine glass. The place is empty also smells like a toilet. To get our money they were so nice and when we went to ask for our drinks it was watered down . I've been all over the world and this place was the worse . I can't give negative stars. My 4.5 million followers will be watching . Shocking","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICf_dLzdg&fid=0x0:0x727f4371f09b5e12"],"When":"2024-12-31"},{"Name":"Raul","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDEn6lzHJucGhWaosce3_NsABMGcpB7jA7o4oZk9QNWwvoHOOU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"It’s a cute spot.. However, you can’t get a decent cocktail in the club. If you want a quality cocktail you won’t get it here. They want you to buy a bottle. You can’t get a drink made with an alcohol of your choice or a shot. You will be offered cocktails only with bottom shelf alcohol and they only had Heineken as a beer option. Better options in the area for a “club” experience in Madrid.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"George Fernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItPfxDuUdUqwmz3KhBUQiniKLY132-wf90nZUT4JIH3GMWlA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This place is a sham and a rip off. Whatever you do, stay far away. They have people that try to lure you in to the club  for drinks, dinner and music. And when you get inside, no one serves you any drinks after you pay for the entrance and for your first drink. They didn’t have any bartenders at the bar. These people should all be in jail. Stay away.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Nos vio salir a un amigo y a mí y se puso a decirle a los porteros que nosotros no entrábamos más, nosotros nos quedamos súper extrañados porque no entendíamos y empezó a decirnos que habíamos salido por la salida de emergencia de malas formas, sin ser así,  ya que salimos por la puerta de siempre y no sabíamos de que nos estaba hablando. Pero el sin saberlo seguro nos acusó como si vamos, hubiésemos cometido un delito por lo menos hasta repitiendo varias veces que no entrabamos más con súper malas formas.  Nos dio igual porque nos íbamos ya a casa pero vamos, deberían de tener un poquito más de cuidado con como se dirigen a la gente cuando éramos personas que solo habíamos salido un rato con amigos para pasarlo bien. Y antes de acusar a nadie y negarle la entrada, infórmate bien y menos poniéndose así de esas formas cuando igualmente alguien se puede equivocar sin ninguna maldad de salida, aunque repito que no fue nuestro caso porque éramos habituales. [{"Name":"Hegedu Peter - vid.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKHPe-eetdHcGqxib1cwLKMT_np1SSfw83FMmM_mO-UGl0Crw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great service, sound system and staff at the bar.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Don Ungaro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUd73BFAnfvNEIiybt3MXP_lk-N2ZdXi5IqW0Rvd43EXaf1D6TqGg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great concert venue","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw5OvKigE&fid=0x0:0x5a0449a706dd8bcd"],"When":"2025-3-23"},{"Name":"Martín Feldstedt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLEbjMz462_sFvAOqF-wgddQcisx-Y3iSgT2TliypxXXug5wA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So nice and good sound for concert","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pablitorm12_","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWmo-XOvY96aM1jwksWV01aOhM1leA6TimTvpgx5sQ1Dq9D8F6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Buena discoteca tanto para menores o para adultos. Muy recomendable sus fiestas que hacen y a los DJs que contratan y las colaboraciones que hacen. Sala principal muy grande y bastante bien equipada con luminosos. El sitio incluye ropero de pago extra y tambien hay reservados.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDtTEKzeA_CffrLSzbPezpm&fid=0x0:0x5a0449a706dd8bcd"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"Daniel Alejandro Bermúdez Calderón","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKMKoH07jGgG1KkSmTjr_opYJqGZleT9YzMTllYiVLJaehVdw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fui hace una semana con los compañeros de empresa.
Hubo un pequeño malentendido con el reservado, pero por lo demás todo genial.

Los porteros atentos a lo que ocurre y, quizás sea casualidad, no vi nada criticable en su trabajo. Al contrario, estaban presentes y la noche fue tranquila.

La señora de la limpieza es una crack. Estaba en todos lados asegurando que todo se mantenga lo mejor posible.

La pista central tenía una infinidad de vasos tirados, pero eso no es culpa del local sino de la gente.

Tanto los camareros como las camareras fueron muy amables y profesionales.

El ambiente es bueno, y sí, hay gente joven pero creo que cualquiera puede ir allí y encontrar su espacio.

Me comentaron que habían más salas o plantas, pero lamentablemente no estaba abierto todo ese día.

Los precios son lo normal en estos sitios.

Por último, decir que la chica que nos llevó desde la puerta hasta el reservado, Patricia, fue muy simpática, además de ser super atractiva.
Quizás el único punto negativo es que cuando alguien así te acompaña hasta la mesa, después es imposible fijarse en nadie más 😂.

En resumen, sitio agradable al que volveré para visitarlo al completo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daniela Gonzalez Cuenca","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKIw91VDrraT9lAeUfwk5oLFh5l4nzkrVZYJ-Cg4YASEmOa4w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Mi experiencia personal no fue buena. Durante la noche percibí un ambiente bastante tenso, con gente buscando conflicto más que divertirse, lo que me hizo estar más pendiente de evitar problemas que de disfrutar.
En algunas zonas la actitud de la gente no me pareció adecuada para un local de ocio nocturno. Además, la mezcla de edades tan dispares me resultó incómoda y poco apropiada.
El personal de seguridad es serio y firme; cumplen su función, aunque el trato me pareció poco cercano. En general no es un sitio en el que me sintiera segura ni cómoda. No volvería.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDUz3xHdRaN9ClAoloces7j&fid=0x0:0x5a0449a706dd8bcd"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"E.Alejandra Barrera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL93XqHJZ0KSvAT82WqL_hFtqQWrODF_2AcIdimCQJOxBvq3w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Hoy se organizaba un evento para menores de edad!! Lo cual en las descripciones ponía que los 100 primeros en pagar la entrada era a 1€ solamente ponía hora de entrada a las 17:30h y que finalizaba a las 22:00h .
Asisten los niños al lugar  a las 17:30 y resulta que había gente haciendo fila , cuando llega el turno de los niños ya con la entrada pagada con el supuesto descuento de 1€ les dicen que tienen que pagar otra entrada que eran 15€ .
Me parece increíble la falta de ética , organización y sobre todo que jueguen con niños de esta manera .
Sobre todo son unos estafadores!! De euro en euro que pagaron varios niños se hicieron su diciembre.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDgshuAQVzSGgzRoExQUvD2&fid=0x0:0x5a0449a706dd8bcd"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Diana Mardach","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI9PdsFChtU6n0l04GytlFmNP6N-JhPlaEnaddZG_rtRE6R=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Buen lugar para conciertos excelente acústica y sonido en una zona llena de bares y fácil acceso en metro y línea de buses","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD6wo4atpAU3jn9GB57hW2Q&fid=0x0:0x5a0449a706dd8bcd"],"When":"2025-10-5"}]

They started handing out the churros late (around 5:30 am) they were cold and sugar-free, and the hot chocolate delivery was a disaster. They didn't reach everyone and only gave them to people who had reserved a spot, chosen by Mr. Aris. There were places they didn't reach, and people left.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Willy “Sirscribble” Boot","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTOxJC-sTnzZ9-pi6KV0z-FALqVs9yui7FVUD3CkgiHWJdO7s=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"good music and nice people, but the staff (particularly bartenders) were incredibly rude to myself and other patrons. embarrassing behavior for a bar where people just want to dance and relax, turning it into a stressful experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ashton Diercks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3oKUJVS7DjYi-w_krE7q7ac1i4MlEHvC2ugaV6ggOL2UpczY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this discoteca you can dance bachata and salsa here","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sofia Vaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6sBAEKCoKl-85ENfsk98G3LLRW0D6bsZc2XfTrlAck_uhtBj2=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"GREAT music and energy. There was plenty of space to tear up the dance floor","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nataliia Bondarenko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUCWjtqoMCE5FvGzJpZz0G_BeHO5gHzPMF0iZEdi41793dNP-8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Joined a salsa/bachata night here. One of the worst experiences I had and won't return. The place is very small for the number of people they let in. People hit each other dancing, smashing people to walls. It is a mess of people dancing, people drinking, people walking from area to area and people waiting for a partner. Uncomfortable to dance. 3 salsas, 3 bachatas and 1 merenge. The price at the door was 13 euro, which is totally higher than the place deserves. The advantage is the location - stressless to reach.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anna Robbins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7nNz9rFGelAPhxzC4Q-OML-6fA7rSsl5VJmaigSsasHYsUxAE1Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I don't normally leave reviews for discotecas, but I really enjoyed this place! I was visiting Madrid for a few days, and I came here on Friday and Saturday nights to dance salsa and bachata. So much fun both nights - a variety of levels of dancers and all were fun to dance with. Overall a very friendly atmosphere. It did get super crowded and impossible not to bump into people! Most of all I loved the DJ - he played all the classics and most popular songs, so every dance was fun. I hope to return to Madrid and dance here again!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Naomi Sanft","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLovq7dhgVY32HNaSvT3Z2bER6-PcadHz4mZysrZfbZnD77aQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"My friends and I were having a great time dancing, feeling totally comfortable with the atmosphere and then it was completely ruined by an employee. One of the staff members, who was completely unidentifiable as such, asked a friend to dance and when turned down, he became aggressive and made up wild accusations in order to kick her out. After a long conversation with the manager, who refused to listen, we decided to leave. We feel lucky that we were in a large group, because as we explained this interaction could have ended very differently. I am disappointed in how management handled this situation. There are many places to dance in the city, don't risk it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Clare O'Reilly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWguUOrmj-n-XQoazZe9qusdVnFA9UkrQIBqEMCY3Ai4E4cxYsJ_g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Been here twice as a foreigner looking to try out the Madrid dance scene. Nice environment and people. The space is a bit small for the amount of people they had in the lessons. The main guy at the front door is quite rude. I don't speak Spanish and when I asked him if the class was here and at what time, he continued speaking, very limited, to me in Spanish almost brushing me off.  I'm also appalled that water is not freely served from the bar staff. They basically make you buy bottled water. I checked and it's illegal for any bar or restaurant in Spain to refuse you tap water. The older lady behind the bar was very rude when my friend asked her in Spanish and she was clearly talking about us negatively to her colleague when I asked in English to another bar staff.  The same guy from the front security also got involved. All pretending to not understand me in English and kept speaking to me in Spanish showing me a bottle of water. Considering this is a dance space and we're exercising this isn't OK! I understand the need for drinks to be purchased to keep the bar afloat but refusing tap water in a glass water is ridiculous.\n\nBecause of this, I won't be back or recommending people to go as I've been to otherwise amazing dance spaces in Madrid where they do provide free water!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Un saludo para Carla, mi striper favorita ;)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC4pb6pJA&fid=0x0:0x7aa6360c69cfd244"],"When":"2019-3-6"},{"Name":"Aaron Moronta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0nKsuxcoG8oQfMjIGoxKzLBwVoEKYiIJZ-VRW8TguEnCR7q4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"No interesa.
Comida fatal.
Bebida puro agua.
Chicas muy bordes la chica de trenzas.
Muy caro para lo q ofrece.
Hay lugares mucho mejores.
Pocas chicas, solo hacen caso a los grupos Grande.
Probar otro sitio.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDEufCghwE&fid=0x0:0x7aa6360c69cfd244"],"When":"2018-10-6"},{"Name":"David marin rodenas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkoGr9VaJSfpZByiFsVec3W8BEuM_8B6h4za-KL-D0v-qIeg1v=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Nos dirigimos a ustedes para expresar nuestra profunda insatisfacción con la experiencia vivida recientemente en su establecimiento. La calidad de la comida fue extremadamente mala, siendo la carne, en particular, absolutamente incomible. El precio que se nos cobró —cercano a los 1.000 €— resulta completamente desorbitado y no guarda ninguna relación con el servicio ni con lo que se publicita en su página web.

Consideramos que hemos sido víctimas de publicidad engañosa, ya que lo ofrecido no tiene nada que ver con lo que realmente encontramos: una estancia en lo que parecía un almacén, con instalaciones en un estado lamentable, impropias de un lugar que cobra esas cantidades.

Lo único rescatable de la experiencia fue el trato de la chica que realizó el baile, quien fue muy amable y profesional. Agradecemos su atención y comportamiento, que fue lo único positivo en toda la velada.

Un saludo","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Angéla Szücs","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGmTqC-VV115IzK9-K_HTUnj4fNnxOa9WHf35VbXCTBSN8hRfd=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The music was okay, the usual salsa and bachata which can be found in every place for dancers. The bar is nice and the 10€ entry fee which contains one drink is reasonable. The cloakroom charges 2€/item, which is outrageous in my opinion, as all of our stuff was put on one hanger, and we still had to pay 8€. Next time I will definitely bring a backpack and put everything there. There were no locks on the toilet doors in the ladies room, which is quite inconvenient. Apart from this, it was a nice experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQhOG-UQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x5155b3a9fe802516"],"When":"2025-3-2"},{"Name":"Neda Terzieva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPblCOl7_yBxj-2xpGz48pNrJpdooXCkm0PAv-Ir_DKvM95oCMmg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The best place in Madrid to dance salsa, bachata, merenge. Very kind staff also. The drinks are very well done. Nice atmosphere","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gelly Mikko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-ubTuyl-sl9naun9NxUYVzmMoCsBeCnhhXE6TtEjjOX58fC_k=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Entrance fee covers one drink, there were some girls giving out free passes in the front later on so keep an eye out for them.\nThe wardrobe charges per item (scarf, cardigan and coat separately)! But also bags are allowed so maybe put everything in one bag and be done.\nDrinks were good and music great. Got a bit packed later on but could still dance.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDF6uCjKQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x5155b3a9fe802516"],"When":"2023-11-5"},{"Name":"Laz Ranasinghe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXfzElhlKeZZoBLqNzKgDdYY6uDix1a8GFAyD6kxk52ONMo4QGRmw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great local place to try tapas and wine. This was part of our tapas and wine tour in Madrid. The tapas were great, the staff was friendly. We tried vermouth as recommend by our guide and it was really good too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICO-dbT3gE\u0026fid=0x0:0x5155b3a9fe802516"],"When":"2022-6-14"},{"Name":"Luis Alberto Gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7PIfKKxtlgssYIpqgSuMnbNFaAXow8uuX5m5lmHHoqZPxaz46mw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Needs a better DJ. The music felt more like someone's Spotify Playlist than a club DJ","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCnQjsPYvIXyfOVqe-jCg_A\u0026fid=0x0:0x5155b3a9fe802516"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"Judi Caruso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUs-R1N5mTY3i6GS_OnwxMyl2-UGArEZxvIwbCCewNABAvapomE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My daughter and I found this little gem on a Thursday night. . . last night of our Spanish holiday; first night in Madrid.  Luckily bumped into a local d.j. at another club who knew we were looking for the best place in Madrid for Latin dance.  He led us right to the door. This place, “el Son”, in the heart of the city did not disappoint. 10 euros cover charge, including a drink was very reasonable. Great atmosphere. Great music, with nice mix of salsa, bachata, merengue and some regaton. We got there at about 10:30 pm.  Fairly quiet with tons of space to move on the dance floor.  Warmed up at midnight with dance floor pretty packed by 12:30 am.  Dancers of all levels having fun. Wish we could have stayed all night but had a morning flight back to U.S. the next day and had to leave just after 1.  Would go back to el Son in a heartbeat and fully recommend to all Salsa (Latin dance) aficionados!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID6sNzNkQE\u0026fid=0x0:0x5155b3a9fe802516"],"When":"2021-9-18"},{"Name":"chad svastisalee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWeSnr_aSxwmv7hQ1UUhS_OAvzXlhMipOCV0Rcxsxtc4CK9910M=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Discoteqa El Son spins a variety of Latin music including salsa, bachata and merengue. Everything starts late, if you get there at midnight might be disappointed with the small crowd you may find. As time passes crowd does get bigger, and the floor gets full of dancers. Did see a range of mostly beginner to medium level dancers, and in a corner the pros doing crowd pleasing spins. Discoteqa El Son is a friendly welcoming place. There’s a 10 Euro cover charge to get in but it includes a free drink. Nice selection of hard liquors, specially rums. Options from Puerto Rico, Dominican Republic and Cuba among the rum selection.  Some reggaeton played as we were leaving. Too busy dancing than taking pictures.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICHmOHwmQE\u0026fid=0x0:0x5155b3a9fe802516"],"When":"2024-8-31"},{"Name":"Deborah Rosado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJQGw5ZfYAOqg4601gXbyKVbYWrLsP_deYM8CdNtAd5jdy3cA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were a group from Tenneseee, DC and Puerto Rico and we danced salsa bachata allll night!!! The dance Professor was a whole vibe absolutEly had a blast! Drinks were great aswell.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID5uLGmZA\u0026fid=0x0:0x5155b3a9fe802516"],"When":"2023-10-19"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Johann R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJVSE1EdFHQFJyFm_97lU6nOuOW6kG90V1TKBK949C6btMGqg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Great place to dance and meet people. They play different kind of music. Salsa, merengue, bachata. Also, you can order a hookah.

You can check -in your jackets for €2 euros.
Also, we were warmed by our tour guide to be careful with our belongings. Nothing happened to us but be aware of your stuff.

Three starts because we have to wait 20 minutes to get in and we couldn't get our drink in the bar we were seating, that bar was only for shots so we have go across the dance floor to get our drinks. They should sell the same drinks in all the bars that are inside de club.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICs_PXG8gE&fid=0x0:0xba7ea196e42354f3"],"When":"2020-1-26"},{"Name":"Noelle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8PVohiURSbwECqL_bjVPgf_-IvzoBwDE9AY4CwPasKaj9pdOs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Been here a few times over the years, its fine for a dance with friends. Fair warning - they apparently don’t give you tap water anymore if you need it. Only water you can get is bottled for 4€. Feels illegal to be refused a glass of water.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"miguel jansen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLQFlkpPi3PPUAZnkMlxP31f-1Gg6K8BThrcCzLTt95j7n6NQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Employees are rude and disrespectful. There were two guys outside the club trying to get you in who were obnoxious and rude. When in line we were pushed together like cattle. They were mysterious about the entrance fee when we asked. We think we paid more because one of the guys outside told the cassiere that we were there because of him, which was not true and we almost left because of that guy.
Inside drinks are expensive. Music and ambience inside are okay. One star because of rude personel who tries to get rid of your money anyway they can.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daeun Yoo (Dana)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ219hSxI21xsqBc2GPjA0U_ySdAG9RhU69BA7QocRkTC4Wuw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"They kicked us out for no reason without even explaining. They even pushed us out. My friends and I were having so much fun inside, but because of this incident it ruined my day. They didn't even apologize. I feel like they are racist. It was the second time and I even recommended to my friends, but now I won't go there again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gergő Danku","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVj3DX3S3pKQGSl-iQv4KKJJG3iUFUiH9O0FwCA2I0NHHm_ZhzZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I was inside, came out and when I wanted to go back again after 10minutes the bouncers wouldn't let me in. They made fun of me saying go home english, nothing else and told me to pay 50€ while I had the pass for tonight. Talked to me in Spanish only and waving. I dont drink or take durgs and I was wearing a white shirt with trousers. I was completely respectful and tried to explain how I need to get in because all my friend are in and I just came out few minutes ago. They didn't care and strated to act tuff on me.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJqpXyyQE&fid=0x0:0xba7ea196e42354f3"],"When":"2023-6-25"},{"Name":"Alisa Dimick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWWLqXuxcxrpphq7uOF4vvoQ1oxtR2Io-UN2qPuFzDemQZyqdFJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had two friends that had already gotten their phone stolen from this club, I came here against my better judgement and my phone got stolen too. The employees did not care at all to help or ask any questions about what my phone looks like if it does happen to show up. Aside from the massive thief problem, it is a cool club so only go if you plan on leaving all of your possessions at home.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rob Suters","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIdtIqSQtmTWWsOo4lSnbICX6HvWS1hxRdm9l7FNEVKf_Cw3dU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"In 30 minutes my phone got stolen. My whole bag was ripped open and the lock was torn. I tried to get the security guards to help me but they didn’t care at all. Also I know 3 other people who got their phone stolen here. The club doesn’t do anything about it. Almost as if they were working with some kind of gangs who rob you in clubs. Also I paid 30 euros to get in. Would not recommend going here at all since the costumer service is horrible.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lesh Mendoza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWIezMv6B7Ng8VVDrRmJd4Gho3f24yf2IAaH68lb1V9XroSuVRtCw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is undoubtedly one of the best places to go if you want to have FUN.
I went last Saturday with a couple friends and I couldn't be happier that I went there.
It was the DJ's Birthday and he sure knew how to turn on the party!
There was also DJ Luiser who was as good as the resident!
I'll surely come back!
Thank you all for that amazing night!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Allison Escobedo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJHF7euMSZ_ZcNl8xZ_mSbygcp6M1ozCOZ2wz5E31ftf4VWUZpmg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went with my friends on Halloween. Great music! The venue is a little small, people were leaving after 4-5 AM. Great experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCbvICMCA5ApUJ7nG7l8Rkg&fid=0x0:0x9c42021986cb18e4"],"When":"2025-11-26"},{"Name":"Tatiana Indge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4BTJ9qwlsvoPiTGVV6UBxtFRi8GkjIm2hW9PyGixksTloEuA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It's a fun place with great music. Very popular, so gets very busy. Outside around the club can catch a good deal, for entrance, drinks and free shots. Smoking is prohibited inside, but there is shisha (cachimba in Spanish). Not least important, can pay entrance with visa card.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICk3uH4MQ&fid=0x0:0x9c42021986cb18e4"],"When":"2018-6-10"},{"Name":"Amine Tbaik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0PBmcC4qO1zNc2-gQ0iotVvNxEllBIKDLCAz7cG2AT56RKeqD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The good things about the club:
It stays open until 6AM unlike other clubs they close at 3
The dance area is so perfect. The size is perfect. Not toooo big not too small, THE PERFECT size
Clock room = 1 euro
Entrance to clubs in madrid has a common system between all of them: no free entrance, you buy a ticket and the price for it depends on how many drinks you want. For this club entrance 12€ for 1 drink
If you want 2 drinks i think the price is 18€, so it gets cheaper.
Stuff and bouncers are so nice.
Music is awesome.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDMiJT_vQE&fid=0x0:0x9c42021986cb18e4"],"When":"2019-12-14"},{"Name":"Tom Harvey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIw7OkTCVG7Ud-QHdpiFQgGx6S4n5xN1wRzNp8sbRMK4JQ-vA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The club is the definition of a scam. The poor waitresses will need to try and justify the transaction went through but I have a transaction receipt for the first charge. Even when you show them the duplicate receipt with video evidence of you not leaving the bar management will deny double charging you. How sad they are. Please do not visit a bar that will try and use their countries poor technology as an excuse to scam you","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Foltinger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVOadvoxBQIggTctfufPf1Vej1yx8qMg4jxpzYXfjKRFkVZbvKq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I know that this isn’t the club’s fault, but they should know the type of clientele that they have partying at their club because I got spiked by a man on New Year’s Eve. Thankfully, I was with my friends and they helped me get home safely. But it’s really scary and they think they know who it was we think it was a man who was trying to grab me the whole time. I have absolutely zero memory of that half of the night, after I got spiked.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lisette Mazon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX2P9vGyaQcmy0MBzz3CfmNdx_8Q2J50773UqTARzwDzPVMCg0d=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Horrible service. Bartenders are rude and make you feel that you’re inconveniencing them when you ask for a drink. My friend’s phone and two other phones were stolen all within 15 minutes and the staff claimed to help but were not doing anything about it. We had to call the police ourselves to get a handle on things. Do not go to this place! Save yourselves!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"O Sow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXY5VAOaT91gwC828G_xr-dsrEGqVwjWhN3ozfUJAzO4jCGbCNk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sara held us down and was amazing host! Dope vibes if you are looking for a nice place with good Afro beats music","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Taliesin Carter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUk9j7A4SgR2qhukRxWVc3kkKiCby2Wydr6SxNkKGGX8o4UgJq4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Acting as promoter for Samsara, Wolves Tours represented a promotion at least 5 times as "Buy one drink get two 'free' drinks" (a shot, and a full-price drink) - I was charged full price by Samsara for 2 drinks *and* the bartenders did a routine where one pretended not to understand *took a ticket* and the second bartender that "interpreted" *took the other full price ticket*","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENLf2qfpqLqRFQ&fid=0x0:0x9c42021986cb18e4"],"When":"2025-6-4"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"David S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJnU9dphxbl4EubrzfSMzW7wcMlMjLy45938XX2zpqfF_DYkA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An excellent venue offering a first-floor balcony and a raised stage. We saw a techno dj there; the sound system was fantastic, and the ground attracted to that night was welcoming and fun.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAv8AF3ipDGM0qhkiX-ogWW&fid=0x0:0x7a731def889d4532"],"When":"2025-7-27"},{"Name":"Inday Love Daily Living","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_Ec-orR2crLrO258ZdD6fA1iFGccxk5XNbqCqq3-QRS8EOId7aQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An Unforgettable Experience!

We absolutely love this place! From the moment we arrived, we felt so welcomed. The staff went above and beyond to help us, which we truly appreciated.

And then we stepped inside... wow! We were completely blown away. Each room had its own vibe, with incredible DJs spinning unique beats. It felt like stepping into a whole new world every time we entered another room.

The venue is massive, vibrant, and so full of energy. Every corner of it is designed to amaze and keep the good times rolling. We couldn’t stop smiling the entire night!

Highly recommended – we can’t wait to come back in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDPpo2hkwE&fid=0x0:0x7a731def889d4532"],"When":"2024-12-1"},{"Name":"Anita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK9-n9JxrutvtsYJOHbzl4gr4ook99wgAzIhf2buLeR4DJ17g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"What a disappointment is this club. No good vibe, music not loud enough, very stressful bartenders. All about selling drinks. Soda water is 10 euros! Lots of reserved seating areas. Not enough reggaeton music. Very young people. Too much light due to large tv screens with drink commercials on it. Very unpleasant. I would not recommend this place","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICzpNHVqQE&fid=0x0:0x7a731def889d4532"],"When":"2024-5-31"},{"Name":"Diego.K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX2UlzXTRKTN-XWLV8YvQSG78RWXWroQmAUu5QqiUVsP2QgCNI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very good club, but as a Swiss guy who doesn’t really enjoy Spanish music that much (reggaeton). I would recommend going somewhere else, but none other the less this is a great club with a great vibe. One last comment would be the pretty cocky bouncers, but to be honest that’s normal in a club nowadays.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-k8zclAE&fid=0x0:0x7a731def889d4532"],"When":"2022-11-12"},{"Name":"ARANCHA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6wa9XeNnva0IqIbP-jse6Wm3sgDMYcpDfHevJAOFzNcr9D3X1tg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Amazing. We had some starters and then the paella valenciana. The service was very good although they did not have several desserts. If the weather is nice you can perfectly eat with a sea view. It was cost like deposit,  you pay for 8 euro and you can buy some drink at the bar. Personal is good","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICsiv7K8QE&fid=0x0:0xfc6148fb6b4bf68"],"When":"2020-1-28"},{"Name":"anvolu 77","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJLn1zjbait716B-SND_ImA5WX9ObCtq2q7OiOhC39rlIz8cg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"From the various times I have been there it is a pretty nice club to visit. It has plenty of people almost every weekend but never too many that you can't move. Drinks and prices are what you could expect, maybe a bit positively cheaper. Have to mention too that it is worth it going and waiting for the queue early as the first 50 people get a discount or sale, usually one more drink for the price of two (3x15).
As with every other club you might or might not get lucky with the DJ, they are usually ok and they change so that you are not stuck with one you dislike.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sil Chan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9bFG3Pn36wPCon_ZB58u-RgcQfTlxI7eI1jpLXKaLw-w66COn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Went there on a few a Sundays for their bachata and salsa workshops. Nice location and facilities and not too crowded for socials which is great.

Just for awareness, the dancers’ average age would be over 40yo.

Annoying that they only take cash to get in!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emilia Sokolowska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWoIAsw0F80LimRjNsu4dgc4xNckiO3Np-dRQcu8TTK5SM5xiE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The salsa workshops were super nice but I feel bitter about the entrance experience with a rude lady who charged us twice the amount that we were apparently supposed to pay, with a bad and unwelcoming attitude.
There were many old suspicious dudes around trying to dance. What saved us was meeting a friend there but I'd think twice about going back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Magal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVt8zx2vKpPJnojyGDmOlppzNejl-4MaObbuXaZVqhvsDtHsws=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I had seen better places for dancing","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sam Campbell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocILxEydTVPkorIzYT5k2NJwA8eQkEshElxiUPzQtwT8YoG8-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Would give a 0 if I could, this was the worst clubbing experience I have ever had. As a guy with an earring I was forcefully removed by 2 bouncers and not allowed back in until I took it out. I asked why I couldn’t wear it and they said it made me look gay. This is absolutely disgusting and shouldn’t happen in 2019, absolutely do not recommend going here.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matan Blatt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVa15icoVG9hmqRcM7LVc31wkuLevbUh-UEjvdY01zC5brCtCTFlw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The acoustics of the place could be better. It's a very loud place. It was very crowded.
The music was very diverse. I was expecting more Bachata music because it was an after festival party of Bachatea congress.

Unfortunately, my bag got stolen (I didn't put it the personal stuff storage). Lots of people left their personal belongings where I left it.
This never happened to me in any other Salsa Club in USA/Europe. There are no cameras in the club and it seems the selection was not tight enough","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Egon Balliere","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUT5av9JkcW9Ge7MWQi3T6fhFhwkOzzRL2R1oOauuVAg_9gWutl=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It was a nice place to go out, we went on a neon party night it costed 12 euros with 2 drinks inclusive. [{"Name":"Lucia iñigo jimenez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAgKWy_02I7qKTLZm9xK0JC-D_2zdbmog8shGEh1DyWdPoU7YBGw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Celebre mis 25 cumpleaños y fue genial. Los trabajadores muy amables y atentos, nos ayudaron en todo momento. Llevamos comida y bebida propios, para unas 50 personas, en todo momento nos ayudaron y facilitaron las cosas. Pusimos nuestra propia música y los altavoces funcionaron genial. Hasta pude hacer algunos juegos con mis amigos. Lo recomiendo!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marti Martínez Solís","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZ5WbiMB6Qwa0J77Is1kxspdACHEv5H1Ns7fSmddaBwL0r_uFJcA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"muy mala experiencia, nos cambiaron del local el mismo día y llegamos y compartimos con otro grupo y NADIE NOS DIJO NADA, los camareros maleducados, desagradables e irrespetuosos, el de seguridad no hizo absolutamente nada en toda la noche más que poner pulseras random a todo el que quisiera pasar.
Nos robaron 3 abrigos, bolsos, llaves, auriculares.
Nada recomendable, lo pasamos muy mal, decepcionante totalmente.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JUCAR","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgCf3JC69xuhu9yZmemjqTwR8HbHHzyTeO6viOZdbSwLhicdc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Celebración de 18 cumpleaños, Elegimos catering, muy bueno y llevamos nosotros la decoración y música. Todo fenomenal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEO_bj-um0Nq1gwE&fid=0x0:0xa46ff4a7f6397489"],"When":"2025-5-16"},{"Name":"Juan Juan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLej_CuUZ6z-FH3haar3mPOCGi2RPCuOVsrS1_2C87ph4JR=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Vaya mojón colega.

Ropero sin perchas.

Personal insoportable. No te dejan estar fuera hablando tranquilamente y tampoco te dejan estar afuera con una copa en la mano (aún estando a 1cm de la puerta)

El baño de chicos no tiene puertas y la cisterna está rota. (Pasa igual en el baño de chicas)

Serio que la peor experiencia de mi vida.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rosa González","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW29yMgRmdxx_i38RmRtkk4OFcrt2WaJr2_Be-FGlw_WoCim_6ITw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El sábado fue mi cumpleaños y me hicieron una fiesta sorpresa, lo pasamos genial, un trato increíble de todo el personal, en todo momento están pendientes de todos los detalles, el catering riquísimo y abundante, la  música variada y un buen ambiente. En definitiva, recomiendo este sitio para celebrar cualquier cumpleaños o para pasar un rato agradable con amig@s. nosotras repetiremos seguro.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICEycnarAE&fid=0x0:0xa46ff4a7f6397489"],"When":"2018-2-6"},{"Name":"Fernanda Griton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLnLFMsQG7eu5Y81KMZMe_4znlGzJxJnRvB7ZzxzUyR-1h9NA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Ya no doy cero estrellas porque no lo hay pero es la peor Discoteca de eventos que he pisado en mi vida no hay Ayre Acondicionado está pésimas condiciones, los baños está sucio las tapas del 🚾 se caen ni siquiera hay cadenas del batee  El Ayre Acondicionado no funciona estábamos empapado ya podrás imaginar no lo recomiendo muy cutre","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"gadea","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLbhQQKbjfSUV9tEBVEySs5u2OIHQwu1lsY0MjscKUh4-_jyE4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Si pudiera poner 0 estrellas, lo haría. Nos han estafado descaradamente. Prometieron un DJ y no había ni música decente, solo una playlist cutre. Dijeron que habría bebidas ilimitadas, pero ni de lejos, nos han timado con eso también.

La sala es enana, mucho más pequeña de lo que parece en fotos, nos han metido como sardinas. Los baños son un auténtico desastre: ¡ni siquiera tienen puerta! Una vergüenza total.

El personal, de lo más antipático y desagradable, parecía que nos hacían un favor por atendernos. Pero lo peor ha sido el dueño: cuando intentamos contactar con él para solucionar los problemas, apenas contestaba y, cuando lo hizo, estaba claramente drogado. Un comportamiento impresentable.

No caigáis en la trampa como nosotros. No merece ni un euro.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Iskander Brull","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUe3mCaAyWFt_tX3CtG4eSqW-BU0T45ZAmL6gh9WCtIkfQvQkRo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Ayer alquilamos el local para hacer una fiesta de aproximadamente 60 personas.
A pesar que los trabajadores que estaban allí fueron bastante dispuestos hubo muchos errores que no son admisibles cuando pagas 53€ por persona: el cóctel de baja calidad y muy poca cantidad, después hablando con el responsable de sala nos dijo que faltaron por servir 5 platos pero que no los habían traído y no podían hacer nada. También teníamos contratado barra libre durante un tiempo y bebidas tan básicas como Cocacola Zero o cerveza de barril no había y tuvieron que comprar latas y servirnos latas de cerveza. Los baños sucios desde el momento en que entramos a las 21.30h.
En conclusión, no recomiendo a nadie alquilar este local por el precio que solicitan además de hacerte pagar en efectivo la cantidad integra de toda la reserva a excepción de una señal de 400€.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Buen ambiente pero estar a 50 grados bailando..como que no. Ni aire acondicionado, ni unos ventiladores, aunque sea por vuestros trabajadores que estaban chorreando de sudor. Eso no puede ser, por eso pongo 2 estrellas. Cuidar esas cosas!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Natalia gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2EtrO638gpTzdslxS_b-LUK4pB7s3piRN7puW5y2ySGCU9JNj=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"He asistido al Tardeo Perreo Coffee Party y la experiencia ha sido muy decepcionante debido al servicio.

Lo más grave fue que mi amiga pidió un vaso de agua y le respondieron de muy malas maneras, diciéndole que no podían dárselo. Me parece totalmente inadmisible; hasta donde yo sé, negar un vaso de agua es ilegal.

Por otro lado, compré la entrada de 1 entrada + 1 consumición. No bebo copas, solo cerveza, así que pregunté si con ese ticket podían darme dos cervezas. Me dijeron que sí, rompieron mi ticket y finalmente solo me dieron una. Al preguntar educadamente, un trabajador (rapado por los lados, de unos 30–40 años) me contestó de forma muy desagradable diciendo que yo sabría lo que había pedido. Le expliqué que una cerveza no cuesta 12 €, y que por eso estaba preguntando, pero para evitar conflictos decidí dejarlo pasar.

En muchos otros locales este tipo de cambio nunca ha sido un problema. Aun así, aunque la respuesta fuera negativa, lo mínimo exigible es que se trate a los clientes con educación y respeto.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura Mobellán","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK3iU8BmLLL8FrORI_IJozL1oy-c5UcAHzbKIEudy9vVhR2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Muy buen tardes el domingo para pasarlo muy bien con música 100/10 y un camarero estupendo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDqoeiG4S1pLH7XAaMstQeo&fid=0x0:0x20121af6852bca94"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"Gema Solares Gutiérrez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURjJThn1g0pNhgMh2WNcLoAlPkxiEGo1p3hLcTTVW5TDN7FzDu=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Nunca me habían atendido tan mal en un sitio. Daniela, la camarera (creo que este es su nombre), nos ha negado un vaso de agua y una cerveza. Además, ha sido una maleducada. No entenderé los sitios que tratan al cliente como si les "debiese" algo, cuando tratamos a los empleados con educación. Fatal. Sin respeto no vamos a ninguna parte.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Johanna Mendoza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_INzjyiJl2Xr2q-yg5wOD2xeUCjvDpkeJSyHqRW1XQW7Tpw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"El ambiente super cutre, sofocante, incómodo, la música súper mala, el sonido terrible... Felipe, the manager, is very attentive and professional.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB4f9cNP-Hg6B3_gIEUPLRd&fid=0x0:0x4bc71c0dab80a911"],"When":"2025-9-14"},{"Name":"Sebastian Alverca","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGG6zZtDdLBcTDmPKjnYKHB2LCvALV9909jT7AAXZVn40-y0hIGw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good energy, great setting and a fun crowd. What truly stood out was Bernados’s  service. Sharp, professional and fully switched on all night. He made our night a bit more special","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sofia Reina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSFZtfQalQzB8l509Gd1fMcuZHsRyLLTpj6XFre9MyXM84UYCDyg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve had an amazing and incredible time at Istar since the very first moment I walked in. From the entrance, being greeted by Felipe as I go down the stairs and into the space, I always feel welcomed. The entire staff treats me with kindness and respect, and it’s something I deeply appreciate every time.

At the bar, Bernard is always attentive and aware, there have been moments when I suddenly needed water and he immediately noticed and helped, without hesitation. Even when I go to the bathroom, Sergio is there and makes sure everything is in order. And then there’s the attention and care from Leo, the way he supervises, plus Christina, and the special attention I’ve always received from Alex, Tania, Andrés, and Gustavo.

Every visit makes me feel like I belong, like I’m part of the Istar community, part of the ecosystem of the place. They make me feel welcome and comfortable, like I’m meant to be there. I know I’m in a safe space, and I know it’s going to be a good night every single time I go.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Everyone’s Connoisseur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW8eXNeWzb1lqLrwaBK_tmHc_-nykIs6CMJGs5GhSn6WZb3GMY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Only went once there. One Dominican colleague who literally lives there, brought me in very fast. The club is cute, clean and nice. It has a nice and chill vibe with teenaged people and some weirdos. Overall, good club but it is not worth it to wait more than 30min in line like other people do. Go daytrading instead or flirting on the streets idk","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sanaa Abou Antoun","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUAPPXJAULbfDHeGZKKp_91ZLderki5qsL772TmNE98HIrXz-8R4w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Everyone, this place was a HUGE mistake on my part to go to. A waste of money. They made everyone stand in line for HOURS. I waited an hour and 45 minutes in freezing temperature. 25 euros to enter with one free drink is so expensive. shitty lame mediocre music. one dance floor, low ceilings. two girls paid a total of 36 euros for two tequila sodas… so terrible. I AM NEVER GOING AGAIN! please save your money and go to a 10X better bar/ club in Madrid. they treat their customers here like not well. Never again. I included a photo of my hands in the cold towards the end. they were completely numb and losing circulation.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCAoeehLw&fid=0x0:0x4bc71c0dab80a911"],"When":"2025-2-1"},{"Name":"Melisa Velagic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1mGVECwmL-yNJGNyIddTmvMGvb4ItlO16cFuKr90lRMovbQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Very disappointing experience.
Chaotic organization and endless waiting — even with tickets or a reserved table. Rude, unprofessional behavior and no clear communication.
We were turned away despite having a table, and on another visit the music and overall vibe were not worth the wait.
A club focused on appearances rather than actually having fun. Would not recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Adriana Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKIIStv4kwaQYdEO2b9oHBlt9YqlSi5E5M1DMtOJ2s7ZiYlVQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Favorite place in Madrid by far! great music, great people and the staff is amazing! Bernard at the bar always makes sure to give us an excellent service! 100% recommend","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"אלון כהן","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJSlRkjljpmBY_f737CjzZo_D_od9D_4sWkXN9UXGbkQRga0g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I buy two tickets in the website for the party in 14/1 , i paid 60€ and we come to the entry, and the guard didn’t get us inside, i am asked my money back and he said to call or sent message to the place and refund me.
I am chatting with them, and he said me his checking. And after that he said they dont take responsibility about this.
Its a scam!!
I am loose 60€
And he didn’t answer any more.
Very shameful.
And after all they blocked me in WhatsApp.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDaanzgjScVjoNoFCpohUWO&fid=0x0:0x4bc71c0dab80a911"],"When":"2026-1-15"}]

[{"Name":"Juanjo Abad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVF-L8F2iH9Fjb7Rtx99jJr2UJXIqjzTRlQp1Nwt169J_1T64s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Se trata de una discoteca tipo sala de fiestas a la vieja usanza. me parecio un horror de lugar, especialmente por su musica. dejar una cazadora cuesta casi mas que una copa, que ya son carisimas de por si. las camareras y camareros no son precisamente muy simpaticos, parece que te salvan la vida al ponerte una copa. el ambiente es malo tirando a peor.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Javi Sánchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWt4vWf2m15JAK9dgvA0KPqlq5KBzAYEisv-CR_2Vh9K6R3o5o=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A cinco minutos andando del Bernabéu (en los bajos del hotel Eurobuilding) está esta discoteca frecuentada por gente con más de 30 años. En ella es posible disfrutar de noches de flamenco los martes, conciertos los miércoles (ambos días con música en directo) y un ambiente propio de una gran discoteca los fines de semana. Los fines de semana se llena de hombres y mujeres con ganas de hacer nuevas amistades. ¿Lo mejor? La situación, en plena Castellana y a poca distancia de muchas otras discotecas. #MadridMola","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Glayne Bax (Skryabin)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyuJscbDdNcVmVTVW_QemY8CUbBgJ3PpReGAQLqHVeI1UVR2Xw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Sitio para gente madura, sobre los 40 de media aprox. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ben Rad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVz9yaWGQwyt2cma0-UadpLaZU7JEikiuTfe08s17YwGlpMoJJ0Jg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is AWESOME! The main area is open and inviting, with a stylish bar to accompany it. In the back, there's a smaller room that they filled with smoke, making the strobe lights and EDM feel like something out of a dream. Finally, the graffiti all over the place brought a unique urban feel to the whole place. Not sure how I feel about the panda spraying people with a watergun, but I won't deny that it was pretty hilarious. Definitely not my last visit to this club!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICk8Y3P5AE&fid=0x0:0x787f6ae80a92980f"],"When":"2019-6-19"},{"Name":"Oliver Barnes-Morgan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVriX6nqCT074-fjGa1UhYcLZ9B_T04mRqin32ek-KyAVuk28w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If you want to experience what it was like to go to a dodgy small town club in the 90s, go here. This is just the type of place you used to find in a town of 20k people, far away from a city.

However they seriously wish this place was something special.

There's literally more "VIP" areas than there is dance floor. Which as a result means most of the club is empty, because nobody is in them, while the tiny dance floor (the size of your livingroom) is overcrowded.

This warm 200ml Pepsi (with nothing mixed with it) is €8!

There are so many better places that don't wish they were more. So go elsewhere.

On a positive note, if you're driving, there's a car park right outside the door. Handy when it's raining.

On a more negative note, most of the staff seem to be bored out of their minds. Presumably because nobody is buying drinks.

On a positive note, there's literally never a wait at the bar... Because nobody is buying drinks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDBq8bx9gE&fid=0x0:0x787f6ae80a92980f"],"When":"2023-1-29"},{"Name":"Christian Boustani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLntBYx98R3HchmX-6vGqWM5jLYKx1wrLeapquM6cqsodlu9w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This is the worst club I’ve ever been to. THE worst. And i’ve been to a lot. The guards were absolutely AWFUL to us. We got free QR codes on the website and they wouldn’t let us in
with them so we had to pay 20€ + a drink that was basically non alcoholic. They put us into a room with 15 people when there was a big room downstairs that was packed. In conclusion AWFUL service the guards literally kept pushing us and the ambiance was TERRIBLE. Sincerely do not recommend this club to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Audrey Jane Boustani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFyaIYAvMCUzIEZPM3NKgd3JBGY5FMonHxQs0rju3Yg7vKCX0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If I could give 0 stars I would. We paid 20€ for the entrance and since the big room was apparently “full” (which it clearly wasn’t) they put us in a room with 10 people when we paid the same price as the ones in the big room. My friends lost their bracelets and they kicked us out and were so RUDE!!! I spent 20 minutes in that club and paid 20 euros for an awful time and awful service. NEVER AGAIN.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dubravko Novak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-9OhBfjPRnguf7BwZE9tuKshcPLRTBdnG_ktJ8r6xpAOfLA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Vibrant club. Pleasant staff and security. Only reason why I'm giving 4stars instead of 5, is locker room. They don't accept card payment and queue to get your jacket gets pretty long.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Noble-Beeck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFNyIuz4uLoClMLsJ2-CMtxYIiGSeiXqzAiwnE8hhQroQ2w18IOA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Had reservation for my friend's party had shirt had everything necessary in the requirements given to us for the reservation and they didn't let three out of 19 of us go in. Tonight almost a month later same thing has happened six of us go and two of us can't get in because of our haircut styles including myself and another friend of mine. He had a army cut and I had long hair. Absolute garbage of a place. Unfortunately most clubs in Madrid are very discriminative.

Love the fact that these guys put sorry for your experience and yet have not refunded my money nor that of my friends for the 3 reservations we never were able to eneter at there club. If your a guy who has a beard, long hair, or peircings showing anywhere you won't get in to this club even if the promoters tell you it's ok, it's not their prerogative it's only those at the door who are the bouncers who only get told by the owner who has a very specific list of yes and nos they have to memorize. One of them started training at my gym and apologize for the amount of times he denied me and explained why he had too.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Natalia Bacariza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVR9Lc8sz5NabPgO_2R1YQ65FAcMaTXVj5EDNXb4p1EWzVuCNbb=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Music is absolutely horrible will never go back because of that. The security outside the club try and make it appear as if only super important people can get in when in reality the club is huge with horrible music and feels empty with the few people they let in. My group and I were lucky we got in but they were turning down so many people and separating friend groups.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tanaka Mawindi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0X0eeSDdXqGjQ-Q6CJ86pT2VON4HSwdjbM_1lII146-oK3waj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Absolutely disgusted by the bouncers at this club. They allowed only part of our party to enter and refused entry to the others for "smoking" outside in the line or being around people who smoked. How convenient that most of the members who were refused entry were Brown or Black people...Never in my life have I encountered such overt discrimination for club entry. Disgusting.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"paulgug’1","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOMlnbGD2TqkEA5bHZsfacjvuMFz8uST0VOAX7-LHqMvUiEKDc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The venue itself is nice.
But the way they organize is the shittiest.
No seats whatsoever, everyone in the theater is standing up, from top balcony to ground floor. First come first served, so only the first raws of people standing at each floor get to see something.
And they don’t turn off the bright large advertisement LED panels (whisky, beer, tequila, etc.) at each floor during the whole concert.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ozzy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBpawQWbhvkAQqLaQ7NsJFOBkG3JAvoQDKPf0Kmn7cGrwYsA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"VIP Experience That Wasn't

Purchased VIP tickets for New Year's Eve. The experience fell far short of expectations.

Tickets stated doors open at midnight, but we were told entry wouldn't begin until 1am. Security directed us to the standard queue without even glancing at our VIP tickets. Had to ask twice and eventually just walked to the VIP queue ourselves.

It was freezing outside, yet when the ladies in our group politely asked to use the toilets while waiting, a rude staff member at the door flatly refused. Security also walked through our group aggressively.

Paying for VIP should mean a better experience, not being ignored, dismissed, and treated poorly. The staff's attitude, from security to door personnel, was consistently unprofessional and unwelcoming.

Very disappointed. Would not recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jacob Stitz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5xicvQ6sY4OQQ_Fe8MgvRgkN8ITGUKPLTxla9R1IjTVMhz4wCQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Commercial nightclub that all the promoters and Sol wants you to go to. It’s a fair place and we had a good night but one of our friends got her bag cut open and got all of the valuables stolen. We talked to the staff but of course there was nothing they could do about it. Apart from the incident, it is still not my favorite club in Madrid but they have a lot of events for people who wants to go partying","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICcmpjEMw&fid=0x0:0x99807c2312ccc88"],"When":"2019-11-20"},{"Name":"Mika S.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXNjwZNslBuCccQONAP8_C1HVCxT9hob_VzrytyVLjJRluTo8mBg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Beatuful place & Nice atmosphere, enjoyable party - but some waiters could be more serveminded","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDB25KrFg&fid=0x0:0x99807c2312ccc88"],"When":"2023-1-29"},{"Name":"Adem Toujani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjD4QtZ8yZFB_WEa40iKVYxW7vwCCgpaPEF7V9hx8deWt1dSVlcA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A perfect place to party in madrid. A good music but drinks are a little bit expensive there a big dance floor . And it totally secured because they are selective so the place do get croweded with people like other discos","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICkjcKrTg&fid=0x0:0x99807c2312ccc88"],"When":"2019-3-6"},{"Name":"sameer sharma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFzgiDAInO2sEka0PL9MXJoJxPpAfbgZQeWuXqjUeG9pTyIJd3Wg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great club with a lot of space and great ambience. We attended a concert that ended at 11pm.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE1_6qMg&fid=0x0:0x99807c2312ccc88"],"When":"2017-11-19"},{"Name":"FFA Has","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWPsjwFUd3ptHn7wgjAYfHv7YfkadpzpNDv7IqnyY8Fo6dsJJfz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Music very bad and always go silent between each track.
Small space.
The location is amazing","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC4ltve4QE&fid=0x0:0x99807c2312ccc88"],"When":"2018-8-14"},{"Name":"Adrian Morris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLz0BvWUGqhmphTrKIkP-HBsqaLTW8I67DwMtqccpo3LjgL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Lovely venue. Saw Stereolab. Upstairs offers more viewing options. There were some seats upstairs , but you'd need to be queuing and up at opening to get them. The place is fully air conditioned too. Only downside was the sound upstairs ( for us) . The speakers upstairs on the balcony were so bass heavy, they odscured the rest on the on stage sound. The speaker near us cut out a few times and suddenly, you could hear the instrumentation and vocals more clearly. Please get the sound engineers to address this issue. • Type of working: SOLO and Couple | they have long standing tables facing the wall. Comfortable for a couple hour work either solo, or with a friend or two.
• Music: 🎵🎵 (medium) | The 2000s songs were a bit distracting as we kept singing each song 🙈 overall, it didn't bother if you have to do some admin work.
• Coffee: ☕️☕️☕️ (outstanding)

Overall: 5

* We still gave it a 5⭐️ review, because we understand that this place is not designated for nomad workers.

For the non-Nomad workers we suggest this spot for the easy-going vibes, the lovely customer service, and very tasty coffee. The price of the coffee is VERY reasonable compared to other specialty coffees in Madrid!

Give it a try!💃🏼
