user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Aimee Condon Nelligan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWiR4-FtYsAvHthz0nmE3oZug8uj86oZiCHQ5O4PFcqBuQRx65m=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just wow. No words to explain how good the pistachio latte was, I got it with almond milk and will be thinking about it forever more.

The owner is such a gentleman, and you can tell that he really loves what he does, so much effort and love goes into each cup. The pistachio Madeline was perfect too. He even gave us a complimentary lemon pie latte to try and that was also amazing.

Best coffee we had in all of Madrid, we even got beans to bring home! Cannot recommend enough 🫶🏻","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC76CxxUjeNC1FqAb_zYi-n&fid=0x0:0x84432a8f9d44d886"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"DILANA KOCAK","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJMUTZCAZRvsKaYc3BfI0PNhxmEhnXRG8RtdKhSlBFeDel7A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Naji and Claudia are amazing! One of the best coffee spots I’ve been to — you can really taste the care and precision that goes into every cup. The baristas take their time to craft the coffee properly, never rushing, and it shows in the flavor and consistency. The atmosphere is calm, minimalist, and perfect for slowing down and actually enjoying your drink. You can tell they’re passionate about quality over quantity here — every espresso, pour-over, or latte feels thoughtfully made. Definitely worth the visit if you appreciate real specialty coffee.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAbwd49pCoqogqRZBb8jTRs&fid=0x0:0x84432a8f9d44d886"],"When":"2025-11-5"},{"Name":"John de Souza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYUUPdXaxEVxOuRnuJyQZjc52PmG9ire4RF3bQ-6Ky8ZlC2fq3Rw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a wonderful cafe. The staff is super friendly and kind. The coffee is really well made and at the perfect temperature. The atmosphere is really nice as well and several tables. Really worth visiting.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhARv0eihpZFU3EUJjZquBe6&fid=0x0:0x84432a8f9d44d886"],"When":"2026-1-15"},{"Name":"Raquel Pereira","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-7K5jFlR7mCiOuhtyCk6UDOUwkME5h4UUFwkd5ZCfJ81m1zDk0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great specialty coffee. I had a cappuccino and it's was delicious. But apparently they are famous for the pistachio drink. I will for sure they it next time.

Update:
We went back and my husband had the pistachio latte. It was also delicious!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBZyDz4sgwqazhsbr5cftyK&fid=0x0:0x84432a8f9d44d886"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Niyati","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7Wk0qOUH1spkZvEtNKiVBu_IC-wc6A0yszJP88kvXzN6V7Diy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The pistachio latte is definitely worth the hype. My brother also ordered the vienna latte which had berry and chocolate hints as he was allergic to nuts. Even though it’s a smaller space the vibes are so lovely, staff are so helpful and friendly not to mention incredibly skilled!!! I have also heard coffee in Madrid isn’t fantastic but this place for sure doesn’t fall into that remit. Will have to visit again when I return to Madrid 😇","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDastC6dBg0039oUIjbxhMS&fid=0x0:0x84432a8f9d44d886"],"When":"2025-11-27"},{"Name":"Brandon Sims","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRKNsxCVhYb7vmegNulsjK-59VJEBfEuyJ4VRBhdB9GRooi9BD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Naji the owner boasts a great storefront and experience. Crafting the coffee, and flavor combinations is a true skill here. Even the small pastries served are quite good.

My first time having an Army latte, half matcha and half espresso. It works well. The pistachio latte is very robust and all the best qualities of the nut itself.

Hope to see your NYC storefront soon. Thanks!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDB5WF4y4W2hxa8j-kXK2mr&fid=0x0:0x84432a8f9d44d886"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"Yesenia P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVM7VjO6FFWS5TUCOXZvd1W-Os_-oWR_lK9Kenn8-jKQoOEfK-IRA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came for the coffee, stayed for the matcha. I love to try as many different spots as I can fit into a trip in a new city, but this place was so great we ended up coming back three days in a row!! The flat white and lemon pie latte were both exceptional but what truly stood out for me was the quality and flavor of the matcha. I would recommend this place to any matcha hater and bet they'd change their mind after. It wasn't overly grassy or bitter, it was well balanced and smooth
The owner was very welcoming and explained the different flavors to me despite being very busy at the time. We threw in the toast as a impulse buy and were so glad we did. I've never had anything like it before but it was the perfect balance for breakfast with our coffee and matcha.
Wish we had more days in Madrid just to keep coming back here!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAKN7LpBRKcA6T-UA3WzBKS&fid=0x0:0x84432a8f9d44d886"],"When":"2025-10-9"},{"Name":"Savannah W.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUyr8WTLMHJ5qYXt0W-LBxU5GOjbdaUwuOOgErfJ4Exw1OxQ4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"an absolute gem!
🍵known for their Pistachio Latte, but, out of all my visits and tastes, the Vienna is my favorite
💚Naji, the namesake & owner, is kind, welcoming, and makes every latte by hand and
⌨️laptop friendly (if there’s space)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDtHXwHzXTmx7vpNHZX2OZ3&fid=0x0:0x84432a8f9d44d886"],"When":"2026-2-12"}]

OUTSIDE: The outside space connects to their WiFi and the Umbrella comes with mist spray and outside lights.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID724DLjgE&fid=0x0:0xc2552da71c5f8842"],"When":"2024-8-28"},{"Name":"D L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-eH5mXQ7XU61BoA-pii92brDZoeEK_1LAM2uYtsoo1YIEe6U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is absolute best cafe ever. bakery is superb and staffs are extremely friendly, they speak English too!!! love it","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICB7qGlaQ&fid=0x0:0xc2552da71c5f8842"],"When":"2022-12-26"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Chris Kris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqoILO3vrzFpuTdhdrKzNZzvwqLheYqNSto7Gm8joeyXL6qV4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hemos comido de maravilla, desde los platos principales hasta el postre. Todo estaba excelente. Recomendable al 100 %. Además, el interior tiene una decoración con muchísimo estilo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBwwqquWcutbbUqM-k5rUZ_\u0026fid=0x0:0x606a8318c17df8c7"],"When":"2026-1-31"},{"Name":"Pedro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJrF3NP8BRXTy27cVAi9wZf30ACek3SsON-Q13Sdla1bXNGyA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Me ha llamado la atención este nuevo restaurante y acabo de comer. Precioso local, encantador, con techos amplios y mucho espacio entre mesas, también con algunas mesas en un sitio más reservado. Está totalmente reformado. La atención me ha gustado mucho, bastante personal y conocían el producto bien. Los platos bien preparados, muy rico. De aperitivo nos pusieron unos huevos especiales y humus de remolacha, pedimos un ceviche al medio y luego diferentes platos, entre ellos lubina. Todo viene acompañado de guarniciones preparadas al detalle. De postre compartimos una tarta de pistacho, un canel roll con queso y un brownie, espectaculares. También he preguntado y durante la semana sirven menús bastante elaborados y a buen precio.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDbAtpuqYAbLc1o4o3W_EeP\u0026fid=0x0:0x606a8318c17df8c7"],"When":"2026-1-31"},{"Name":"José Antonio Alcalá","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX64i5ps_opprY_OPAA3LnX1Qa6_eHC3n_R3W-2ycWmFUlSuiKgiQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"¡Una joya! Todo estuvo excelente: la comida, el ambiente y el trato. Cada plato se nota hecho con cariño y buen gusto. Ideal tanto para una comida especial como para disfrutar de un buen café.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB5LJdLLe_oyCZDZFUIH72I\u0026fid=0x0:0x606a8318c17df8c7"],"When":"2026-1-27"},{"Name":"Chechu Carrillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmp5lNVSmybGAF7o5WUMPdNcXcdAyXmpKVtV5IDaG9xAElB7De=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fuimos para desayunar y nos acabamos quedando 3 horas allí, la atención al detalle y el mimo con el que preparan todo no pasan desapercibidos. Sandra nos fue recomendando en todo momento que cositas probar y la verdad es que no pudimos elegir mejor sitio para nuestra mañana de viernes. El lugar es bastante amplio y el servicio rápido y preciso, no lo podría recomendar mas!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOVcuCmpDN669kC-rc8QG2\u0026fid=0x0:0x606a8318c17df8c7"],"When":"2026-1-31"},{"Name":"Irini B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0-wMHn2tbCK_2smLfuv07AZanzvQMWKiUe5y6xjifRGaxP6fa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"和朋友一起去的，从开胃菜到甜品都让人惊艳，食材新鲜，调味克制又到位，吃得舒服又健康。听说主厨旅居过很多国家，菜品里真的能感受到融合各地风味的巧思。环境很好很适合聊天，服务员也超级nice。原来就很爱旁边的little big cafe，这家更是直接放进一定会再回访的清单里。","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOj5Q_U4fo4u8AXs2xgYjn\u0026fid=0x0:0x606a8318c17df8c7"],"When":"2026-2-16"},{"Name":"RENATA Moreira","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJIx6_UDaVwAH7mH23PIa03kKTpQu0P7y54UZ9wiD-TdAMnLw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Si te gusta The Little Big Cafe, Bistró by Little Big Cafe te va a encantar: misma calidad, mismo cariño y sabores increíbles.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBezfnFF-ki4NkkHsRnkS1m\u0026fid=0x0:0x606a8318c17df8c7"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"Cherine El Khatiri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOssJsPZNi5CoUCRE4fuEonXAiOgSyavwQ6ODE3_B1LmeA5A_v=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Comida de calidad y atención inmejorable. It was interesting to see a slightly different café concept. We ordered two mochas, and they were OK, but they really needed a bit more sweetness. Other than that, it was a good experience overall.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD88cvv2XeaLZlLd5hqfnRR&fid=0x0:0x4276c2e87fc44d28"],"When":"2025-11-18"},{"Name":"NomadCafeVibes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJyQxTH9ZgnbyMXac7Ut1pZCtgF3uh7g1OH3N5lbUAaLB0DNdM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"For our Nomad 💻 tribe, here a few comments!

• Type of working: SOLO and SMALL GROUP | they have a corner table (fits 4 comfortable) and side table (casual seating no chairs - bench style, not so comfortable for long periods of laptop work) specifically for working on laptops. There are other tables but are marked for no laptops and only for eating. Also there is an upper floor but is not accessible for coworking.
• Music: 🎵 (medium) | it is a chill playlist that has some slow music that isn’t too loud  - perfect if you have to do some admin work or focus tasks.
• Coffee: ☕️☕️ (good)
• Dog friendly: with a small dog, it was no problem.
• Food: recommend the tostadas (in pictures) that are tasty and a good size for the price.

Overall: 4/5 ⭐️
+ The staff is friendly and service is quick.
+ Prices are reasonable for specialty coffee and brunch.
- The coffee was good, not amazing.
- The co-working space is comfortable if you manage to get a spot in the corner table.
*There are 2 locations, this review pertains to this specific location only.

Give it a try, cheers! ☕️

It was like a little hug from home. 🥰 The food was also delicious. One of my personal gripes is how overly sweet breakfast dishes can be. The apple and brie toast was just a perfect amount of sweetness. I discovered walking. The service is good and great atmosphere for someone with little knowledge of Spanish they made me feel at home .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBi3_wZ4s_BAf2PA3Oz5it5&fid=0x0:0xb920c5a6108aa8d6"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"Elizabeth S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLjZWs0tvj11Fn-k7tyv7Fkfm__qPKtbWum2PWV6wqkLAotJg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am an event organizer living in Madrid and I have now hosted group events for my company at 9 Lives twice. The 9 Lives team is warm, friendly, and responsive, making my life so easy. I'm also extremely pleased with their menu and can't recommend their pastries enough, especially the pies. Also, don't miss their arnold palmer (ice tea & lemonade). As an American, I can confirm that it's the real deal. Thank you Ric & team. We'll be back again soon. Photo credit: Nacho del Río.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhASPnbJ6khyORpvsnXMutZa&fid=0x0:0xb920c5a6108aa8d6"],"When":"2025-9-29"},{"Name":"Deborah Laks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI3grBV_SHuXFTJao3Rutge7Qtph1-vhD5tPBYjbJL4SV7esFjt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Quaint coffee shop in the center of Madrid. Delicious tarts and great service. Plus, they offer brunch on the weekends 100% recommend. Thanks guys!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQuBFOatDYGMEMQKQWbpbd&fid=0x0:0xb920c5a6108aa8d6"],"When":"2025-9-26"},{"Name":"Dylan Marshall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW24WlFHMScxFE3ncG_0XSePFzNZCXJ4L18xNsDomILjK_m9Dk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"- chia pudding  is very good and has homemade almond butter
- Apple pie is great, filling is really good, and not too sweet
- The pie had a little bit too much cinnamon though","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA9a1tWuqKq0nSIkRejaQuT&fid=0x0:0xb920c5a6108aa8d6"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Fedi Khayati","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW8Eb50jGPrcJ9Nbdhe5i5oxns1lTFKBPelN31pIY08FEyru2RL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Their American pies are incredible, and it's great that they're pet friendly!.
The atmosphere is cozy, and the staff is friendly. The space is large and perfect for working or relaxing.

Some tables are blackboards where you can draw with chalk, adding a fun touch. They also have booth-style seating and a big central table ideal for laptops.

The lime pie was the best I've ever had, and the chocolate pie was excellent too. The coffee is also good. Two pie slices and two coffees cost us just 15€.

I 100% recommend this place to any pie lovers. I'm definitely coming back to try new pie flavors and to practice my drawing skills!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDT0ca4KQ&fid=0x0:0xb920c5a6108aa8d6"],"When":"2024-5-25"},{"Name":"Igor Xavier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCm9QZJtvDlu_gJ0_1aVcl9vV6mBd9L5JMw17yi5af1MRkFIHtIA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"this have to be one of my favorite spots in madrid so far. spent the whole afternoon there working, and i couldn’t recommend 9 lives enough!

the place is quite big, with some large tables (with power outlets if you need to connect your laptop), booths and smaller tables for little groups/couples.

the staff was VEEERY friendly, and the service was perfect, literally nothing to complain about. i had the chance to try two pies — a lemon one with chocolate ganache and a coffee one. both were spectacular. can’t wait to come back and taste more flavors.

job well done, guys. i will def recommend the place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDgn_mORg&fid=0x0:0xb920c5a6108aa8d6"],"When":"2025-2-28"},{"Name":"Daniel Rast","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIerDiqDQs7HOmH0nJ80zHD0GY6mF4WkgofTr5JbTL4A7lQFG0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The space is cool, we’re coming here from time to time to have this different (comparing to all Madrid places) vibe and experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC5ze8AW_8V1BlGwo65yLaS&fid=0x0:0xb920c5a6108aa8d6"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"DM","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLn4AiTZ5y6yBsiJl2H5P6Jhb20OmSMH4j-sH0jWA2Jq8vs4_4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There’s something for everyone here. Love the variety of pies—from chocolate-based to fruit based—some traditional, some modern. Even savory options!

Love how open and spacious it is. That’s appreciated! Keep it up, team!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC7i6DDRrxcnL_zbVHAcMHs&fid=0x0:0xb920c5a6108aa8d6"],"When":"2025-6-28"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Harry Flynn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWboafIxq-HPXkwVB9sb5F74UTDuT__FQiES47tL-b-wCfGItryCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Normally not one for indulging in these tiktok trendy, instagram hype places but that’s my problem. The sandwich here I have to say was absolutely brilliant, though my supreme jumper took some damage from an unforeseen (and unwanted) pesto splash, ultimately culminating in a quite unappealing green stain that definitely doesn’t complement the white font, I really enjoyed the sandwich. It was the famous comer a casa (or come a casa - these European languages are getting to me). If you fancy quaint scenery, there’s a small plaza nearby where you can fully indulge and be at one with the local Spanish pigeons. I for one was a huge fan of the sandwich (be sure to add that additional honey for an extra euro, come on, you’re not iker casillas), it added an somewhat unexpected delight to my day, temporarily allowing me to forget the dread that accompanies existence (oh, and my forthcoming exams that I am totally unprepared for). Circumlocutions aside, please do come here, you won’t regret it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDGbDcDZupqC_mGKPxBs2lM\u0026fid=0x0:0x29761bf7f34e2b7c"],"When":"2025-11-26"},{"Name":"JJ Sanchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUj_EqmsttSZsuBJcIrj5ahZQ53YkoSw_XM8p50qhziEUkROs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Friendly staff. The sandwich was juicy and delicious.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michele Santos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNwVJlw5_07XJdzJbFW0q4FQehMP50lrZ_ipPMktwKTVyZTP4P=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pedí los sándwiches por delivery y me sorprendieron la presentación y la frescura con la que llegaron a casa. Todo estaba perfecto y delicioso.\n\nComo único punto a mencionar, la focaccia con rellenos algo pastosos queda demasiado blanda y tiende a deshacerse. Aun así, el resto estuvo estupendo; se percibe claramente el cariño con el que preparan cada detalle. 🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB4YY6kS7Hhzxyu5thIb9PN\u0026fid=0x0:0x29761bf7f34e2b7c"],"When":"2026-1-13"},{"Name":"Tasting Senses","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJRkpnUmKlkXGKX4kT47xoxB-jVMqOD-uKh7k_w7_LNzGopnw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Habíamos probado sus focaccias en otro local, pero pasamos por delante y se nos antojaron, así que compramos un par para llevar. Escogimos come a casa (con mortadella, queso stracciatella, pesto y pistacho) y chueca (con chorizo a la napolitana, queso provolone y albahaca). La masa está de diez, pero esta vez no terminamos de acertar con los rellenos. La de mortadella nos gustó (aunque menos que diavola, nuestra favorita), pero la de chorizo no nos convenció (se nos hizo bastante pesada, y no tenía demasiado sabor). Es una opción a la que recurrimos de vez cuando, y seguiremos haciéndolo cuando tengamos ganas de focaccia.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBGYI2P7HziHcG0V02yV7OO\u0026fid=0x0:0x29761bf7f34e2b7c"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Franz Jeremy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuDynjthYEkTfQERCJb7X5haH1W9zq8_OxT_3QfyhI5acvST5tHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pase por este local nuevo aquí en Metro Quevedo, la señorita Verónica me atendió y me dió una amplia información sobre los productos, una persona muy atenta y da un buen servicio. probé la Ñonna estába muy bueno 100% recomendado. Muy rico la verdad, ni foto le tomé 🤤 jajajaja","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBRYHNFJNYswFcE9L77vxG2\u0026fid=0x0:0x29761bf7f34e2b7c"],"When":"2025-9-24"},{"Name":"alberdry romero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXU9YNhYGkL68n9V1jORlTZXSetknC76m8dpixvDM2CxVkkRpI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pasé por este nuevo local de focaccia en Madrid, y de verdad que la experiencia ha sido única. Un buen ambiente, una atención 100/100 por parte de Veronica. Me he comido la focaccia Chueca y la verdad que tiene un sabor único. Sin duda 100% recomendada.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAbyoCvL7q1mYnkOS1WMYDe\u0026fid=0x0:0x29761bf7f34e2b7c"],"When":"2025-9-24"},{"Name":"Francis Aristigueta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKhcgvDbIsPrkn_qaleqsa3zpUtvcV5IpYk9G1N2nw1gzqNtA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Pedí una focaccia de mortadela y pesto para llevar, al mismo tiempo había otro pedido para llevar, la chica ha puesto las 3 focaccias y se confundió con mi pedido. Me di cuenta ya cuando llegue a casa que me había puesto una focaccia de trufa no siendo esto obviamente lo que quería, entiendo la confusión pero hay que estar más atentos ya que es molesto consumir algo que no has pedido!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCojj7fTLhhhyuHj6-t9fDG\u0026fid=0x0:0x29761bf7f34e2b7c"],"When":"2025-10-31"},{"Name":"Norma Llinas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLKIrbz01Votoy4IPophXIpIo_ts7fBAkDj5GBYnJVOM4iU1-4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fui a la nueva sede de DIVORARE esta vez en Fuencarral, y conseguí lo mismo de siempre, calidad, en el producto, buen ambiente y la atencion maravilloso, me comí esta vez la come a casa y una rellena de Nutella, excelentes en todo, sigo siendo fans, éxitos ❤️❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAODth193v8LzEOQlMMoF4f\u0026fid=0x0:0x29761bf7f34e2b7c"],"When":"2025-9-21"}]

After breakfast, they offer you a tray of sweets, and you choose among them. If you don't like any of them, they return with another tray with a different assortment of delicious sweets.  I love this branch, quiet and elegant, away from the crowded center, and the waitresses serve from the heart and their manners are beautiful. Thank you for your kindness 🫶🏻","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICB7Y_bsAE\u0026fid=0x0:0x1297983a0e049681"],"When":"2023-1-1"},{"Name":"All Things Spain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJNWBdUd-QKOqlHRq6tOv_P5FR-tafflR__jzjzTVgD5WN9JA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I found a rare treat at this place: Kouign-amann, a French-Breton butter cake, which is fiendishly difficult to make and which might be the worlds best pastry. Well done!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Comidas De Madrid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIoZn5CRehQrw9F8vs096ZAhgBM1aotgXiIbV1zvh9l4nOFwKI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"CREP NOVA
📍 DÓNDE: C/ Eloy Gonzalo, 4
🍽 RESEÑA: Junto a la glorieta de Quevedo hemos descubierto este restaurante que nos ha llamado mucho la atención por su gran espacio y su carta variada centrada en pizzas, pastas y crepes. Es uno de esos sitios al que ir cuando estás por la zona y quieres comer algo rápido y acertar.

Nosotros probamos:
-Patatas bravas (5,60€): No son las bravas que esperaba, pero me gustaron mucho. Muy buena ración para compartir entre dos y una salsa tipo alioli muy rica.
-Crepe especial (6,55€): Huevo, jamón york y queso. Su especialidad. La verdad que sin ser una receta espectacular o muy llamativa nos gustó mucho.
-Pasta con trufa (15,20€): De principal probamos su pasta. Cantidad moderada pero sacia mucho, con buen sabor y olor a trufa, un poco aceitosa y termina haciéndose un poco pesada, pero cumple con el antojo de comer una pasta rica.
-Pizza Mallorquina (13,50€): Tomate, mozzarella, sobrasada, queso brie y miel. La variedad de pizzas es enorme y esta nos gustó mucho. La miel tiene poca presencia, pero la sobrasada (aunque en la foto puede parecer justita) tiene mucho protagonismo. Masa muy fina y conjunto muy ligero, nos pareció una pizza diferente pero apetecible.
-Crepe dulce con Nutella (6,55€): De postre eligimos su crepe dulce a compartir, que nos trajeron directamente partido. Lo que veis en la imagen es la mitad. Muy buena porción y con mucho relleno de Nutella. Buenísimo.
⚠️ A DESTACAR: Tienen más locales en Barcelona.
💳 PRECIO MEDIO: 💵💵
🏆 PUNTUACIÓN: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐

*Invitación","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCvSs8bWA7i7abL378ISMR&fid=0x0:0x1cdc5f0fb0f22211"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"Paula (FoodByFoodies)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqjwLB7qGU-wTiWQIyAIYF4mXu1dk6wX7kNeDRrx77WKGFHj0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Su propuesta se basa en ofrecer pizzas de masa fina y super crujiente con base de crep.
Además, ofrecen servicio de reparto a domicilio a través de Glovo. 🛵🍕
Probamos un total de 6 pizzas siendo todas ellas espectaculares con mezcla de sabores super interesante!
Nuestra preferida sin duda “Nova 15”, con tomate, jamón ibérico cortado fino y un huevo en el centro ♥️
Trucazo: se pueden pedir medias mitades para probar más sabores! 🤪","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBF5VoBbwVMzozbnluIBr9o&fid=0x0:0x1cdc5f0fb0f22211"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"raulfoodie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWi_eJHsELyFroj9ADZKFjwBoeXrKUA1mEniYlFQPUiR4j_45M7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un sitio realmente bueno para cenar en Madrid centro. Nos encantaron sus pizzas, de masa fina y muy jugosas, sobre todo la de jamón ibérico y huevo es excepcional. La de queso de cabra y miel es todo un acierto. De entrantes os recomiendo sus verduras a la plancha y las bravas. Para culminar un crep de lotus muy rico. La atención al cliente fue excepcional.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_eVDBMAfSlhYcqwr3PiEw&fid=0x0:0x1cdc5f0fb0f22211"],"When":"2025-11-22"}]

Gracias por crear espacios tan bonitos.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAQA5iP8IpWoUY8GkAfrmYT&fid=0x0:0x915fe3ee8a3266f3"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Maks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwRy7HxaH-yZAF1fsFE-DbKomBXM6zz5R8iM6h17R-83TioVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Con mucho gusto visito este café tan acogedor, situado cerca de la Plaza de Olavide. Es elegante, bonito, tranquilo, con una música excelente y comida saludable. Se siente que han puesto el alma en cada detalle.

Me encanta el ritual de presentación de algunas bebidas, por ejemplo, el cacao (con flores o 🌶️). Además, hay muchas opciones funcionales (energía, enfoque, desintoxicación, control del estrés); es muy interesante probar algo nuevo cada vez. Y todo a precios accesibles. [{"Name":"Shonigal Galshoni","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAksMz7rF5kJ93o1v93Hzu40dLpnVlyMRYbkpnRcRy_2UHma4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great atmosphere,
Great salesman (barista),
Nice coffee (Madrid is not known for its fine coffee but this establishment serves its customers good ☕.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBKzrvMpw0mGcMQKuOKXipQ&fid=0x0:0x26ed851b9b6c56f6"],"When":"2025-10-9"},{"Name":"Catie Litteral","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIKb0Fx_n8kNokPuo3KysxYEJJnqiFUG5s3fG8OQbfvP8-EzQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cafeteando has by far the best specialty coffee in Madrid. No other coffee shop even comes close. Beyond the coffee, it's a beautiful space with an amazing community built by the owner and the baristas. It's a place of warmth, happiness, and friendship.

Recently, Cafeteando has been targeted by false, negative reviews for organizing an event to provide support to a Palestinian hospital. That's not politics, that's just humanity.

And pro tip: if you're visiting Cafeteando on the weekend, try the cinnamon rolls!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anne Dachs","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU22RAYLbfzihMESnMgpb9-xsEVVgYJ-ymFwMXKJLllwjDF9c8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am picky in terms of coffee….and this is an absolute treat!  They make by far the best coffee in Madrid, topped up by great service, homemade cookies and a cozy ambiance. It’s a small oasis and perfect to recharge during a busy day","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Teona Mikadze","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ1Ln3w9eaDnKnjjmOskBrqvEIitF6ojo93EtWu1k09AHH5pA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is my favourite coffee shop in Madrid, I have been going there for years.. it’s a coffee shop with a soul, not an average one.. really special specialty coffee and Hugo who connects people and has a big heart!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Negin H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYJ3EYusjbQFDz2GXB25QawwKOjS8brcVO9EooEkdufkKoJWE-dQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious, non pretentious coffee shop. Will be my regular. And I've tried many in this neighborhood.  Wish we had outdoor seating space but still this place is great.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alyanna Fabian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLsWv15tPfJFRzAGjIFCn8MWLl8RLXpWjHyCzJGHuF77w8yvpc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’m so glad we stumbled upon this tea shop while looking for places to go in Google Maps. We saw that they had good reviews and that the owner knew his tea so we decided to give it a try.
The owner recommended hot rooibos chai tea with oat milk to go with the perfect cold Madrid weather and it did not disappoint.
Definitely coming back here when we find ourselves in Madrid again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-kZ6giQE&fid=0x0:0x26ed851b9b6c56f6"],"When":"2022-11-6"},{"Name":"Michael Beauregard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUEngUd7ij9oEkGhQgrPnd6U_qxSIWkiG1ZXwF0CYZ5V403MeJo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As the name conveys, Cafe Te Ando is small enough to simply order and walk.  However, the service and coffee was anything but small.  Yes, I ordered my usual, in a to go cup.  The “filthy” dirty chai caught my eye and It certainly didn’t disappoint.  The chai had what I believe was a hint of Almond.  Nice.

Should you find yourself lost in the Chambri neighborhood of Madrid, I suggest you walk to Cafe Te Ando, but don’t plan to sit down.

Enjoy","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_3cfsDg&fid=0x0:0x26ed851b9b6c56f6"],"When":"2025-1-18"},{"Name":"Rania Elahouel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuBWQObW0syiokhYYN6MaAMNllH4VuMENKhtQF2HZlkf0T4ozq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really nice coffee and amazing dirty Chai 🤍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDmNvbV-G2hvkaU1itybsVS&fid=0x0:0x26ed851b9b6c56f6"],"When":"2025-10-19"}]

[{"Name":"Chiara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLrPN1-v5DBrfwtuZzhxappZYP8gwvVTGUzI0faFpAtQza1pg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of my favourite hidden gems in Madrid. I stumbled across this place looking for a decent flat white in the morning (kiwi coffee snob here) and was blown away by the kindness & top tier banter of the owners, which is an absolute cherry on top for the excellent coffee they serve. Mil gracias a todos, el mejor cafecito en Madrid!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZYVpp52ntEybOdyZecV-0&fid=0x0:0xcf4af329090909ab"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Will Shaughnessy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIkhPyTGpPViyxFK4Pk-20FkQ9UVVCLH74J-lRdmWPgxSYDQw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My friends and I stopped by here on our last day in Madrid and were extremely pleased with both the coffee and service. There were many different options for beans(all roasted in house) and the coffee was rich and flavorful. Our barista was extremely friendly and beyond welcoming. He took the time to explain the differences between the beans and clearly has a passion for the work. Hands down the best coffee shop experience I have ever had, I hope to return one day!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEPyLt5bK3MSgPA&fid=0x0:0xcf4af329090909ab"],"When":"2025-6-6"},{"Name":"Craig Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXEht8QVFjL3gST3Mt71KKwCCXJ2LcwOS1F8KiD0hAKcKYeYsg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Oh my. Wonderful, wonderful place. The barista was so helpful and friendly, and made me the most delicious filter coffee. Great espresso options are available too. The pastry was delicious to go with it.
It's small, and they spend as much time roasting as they do being a cafe. If you're in Spain, you should buy their beans to try at home.
If you're in Madrid and wanting to try good coffee, you're blessed with so many options, but this café should be at the top of your list.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICkic2F-wE&fid=0x0:0xcf4af329090909ab"],"When":"2018-9-13"},{"Name":"Anna Quinlan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXp_VD4zINntiOM_wcOv3kJbpyCOwei1CdqT_uhJn-UvW7G3Nhd7g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This cafe is a hidden gem in Madrid - Enrique and Reina are so passionate about coffee, and you can tell with the amazing product and space. I did the barista class and learned a ton about how to properly evaluate beans, prepare espresso, and steam milk. 100% recommend for either having coffee or taking a class!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICnqPTocA&fid=0x0:0xcf4af329090909ab"],"When":"2024-9-22"},{"Name":"Bryan Druhan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKjPPh0Fnnvc3M4ukK93F4Sq45uxmnP87_h3d2ZwoGjYnVQug=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A home away from home!

Enrique, Reina and Mateo are the heart of this wonderful artisan family roastery. The passion and tradition of incredible coffee can be enjoyed in every cup!

The coffee is expertly prepared, but moreso the love and passion for their craft shines through in everything they do.

Amazing coffee, but so even better people.

Come and experience the love when you walk through their doors. 10/10 experience all around. Todo perfecto!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tuğçe Küçüköner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLZkzbLkfSfvKcJbh8zQcMUCZujis-MgNzyA8QlHy8qHpw8_KQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best coffee experience that I have ever had. Recomiendo mucho las rosquillas de vino del desayuno!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"VÍCTOR VIRGÓS. ESCRITOR","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVeUloCkpr7xh5wdfBhSyxqxAc1QbMBes1xey8X0bQKtUMLeT4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Me gustan mucho estos bares de barrio de toda la vida. Bares sencillos, donde comen los trabajadores y los vecinos. Una cantidad más que notable de tapas, raciones y bocadillos. Los montaditos están fenomenal y el café me ha sorprendido. Mucho mejor de lo que esperaba. Atención al cliente muy amable, rápidos y diligentes. Me gusta también mucho la cercanía con el cine Proyecciones y la boca de metro de Bilbao.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Indix","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNuf5Xwx96QHUeQpJ0I91j5BLt7yA8RzVYMmLr_olRxgsPlpw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Mi experiencia con el bar? Voy en silla de ruedas, tengo esclerosis múltiple, con todo lo que mi enfermedad conlleva, me he acercado cinco veces a pedirles a su encargada, y a los camareros mal educados que tiene, los cuales responden en un muy mal español, con una falta de educación y empatía tremenda, a que por favor su clientela tenga consideración con la gente discapacitada y les dejen libre tránsito en la acera!. El bar no tiene derecho a terraza pero toda su clientela bebe en la calle.

No dejan pasar ancianos, mujeres con carritos o gente en silla de ruedas.

Los derechos de la gente discapacitada en este país están garantizados, para que la encargada se lo diga a su personal, aquí españoles y extranjeros deben respetar la ley, no solo son mal educados, son "MALOS CIUDADANOS", no entienden que una silla de ruedas necesita espacio, tampoco entienden que la acera no es para beber, y menos aún al parecer entienden que no tienen permiso de terraza, pero ahí están todos sus clientes bebiendo, obstruyendo el paso, y metiendo un ruido horroroso en la acera.

La actitud que tenéis, es denunciable, la acera es para la gente y no para vuestros clientes borrachos.

Deberiáis aprender a ser mejores personas, mejores ciudadanos y mejores vecinos.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Every class is a full-body workout that leaves you shaking, sweating, and stronger every time.

The restaurant was cosy and fresh with good energy. The staff were friendly and very helpful. Two waitresses serve outside and attended to the bar. This was good team effort. The food was delicious. It was fresh and very tasty. This restaurant deserves my 5 star rating. Well done!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"CRISTIAN JIMENEZ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJRWKsfGyeHsl5e7QL-wYYuV7vvKTmWAoN9m_J9NMftJX3TeA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Christmas lunch, so it's always something risky.....and the following happened:

1.-Menu starters included three dishes; one of them never came on the table.
2.-For the main course, one of the options simply ran out (and this was not the most chosen, btw), so some people had to change his/her preferences.
3.-The dessert was something ridiculous; you could be considered happy if you could take two small pieces of nougat, in the best case.
4.- Layout of the tables was simply not fitting the requirements (they knew og many people we were, and ensured in advance that we would be in two big groups; reality: six groups at the end).
5.-When some people asked for complaints sheets, they tricked and declared them that the organiser was actually not requesing that (which was not true).

Conclusion: if you are not prepared for a lunch with a big group, don't dare it!. And if things don't go in the right way, please try to satisfy the customer, not cheat it!.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shachar Ashkenazi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUEmUXzrsubhnR-rznmk2MY1VmlWrq70NlSqh4aWyW8euE8eL00w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Tasty local restaurant!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDI29Wj7wE&fid=0x0:0xf3d2635deda9dfa5"],"When":"2025-4-13"}]

Cabe destacar la atención inmejorable de Júlia: estuvo increíble, fue muy amable y atenta. Hizo que la experiencia de comer allí fuera aún mejor. La tarjeta tíquet Restaurant no me ha funcionado.

Pd. Recomendable llevar suelto si quieres dejar propina.

Ahhh y recomendable reservar. Tiene terraza","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA7P1dNKbwTXzY-73NI1Tju&fid=0x0:0xd4a395e06aa75a52"],"When":"2025-10-10"}]

El chico poco amable ante la pregunta de investigar qué cerveza sin alcohol era. Estaba vacío en el interior porque tienen una terraza y es para fumadores. Pero en general está limpio y la cerveza fría que disfrutamos.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDyIQpTip_A-w2xxh1w8ez3&fid=0x0:0x17a8dd789f705f98"],"When":"2026-2-8"},{"Name":"Manuel Mora","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL6d09PNUVsBHL1u8YiR-0RYz2so3hAZTlaiq3OwzFlHfX8sQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Todo rico pero nada reseñable.
A destacar las tiras de pollo las cuales estaban crujientes y buenas.

Tiene una terraza muy grande y con buen ambiente.

Los camareros son bastante majos","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAOFN-aorDyqKVQOz7Run7n&fid=0x0:0x17a8dd789f705f98"],"When":"2025-9-15"},{"Name":"Carlos Irala","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPQpUNtm1r6-bwFh-gOjijEYs7EQo7HpVzAP0HMSMqj6lLJ2qLRw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"El lugar bien para unas tapas y si les gusta el fútbol pueden mirarlo tranquilamente. Lo único es que deberían especificar el tamaño del zumo. Tenía mucha sed y ganas de tomarme una, me pedí de melocotón y me trajo una de 20 ml. Me quedé cortísimo y más por el
Precio que es bastante para el tamaño. Servicio de camareros bien.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDjuNCRZmNt4aHlbOHZtNE5&fid=0x0:0x17a8dd789f705f98"],"When":"2025-9-21"},{"Name":"David Rueda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVdvhy-rBIeEuYWy1tcR_RHwebIGVmFxLzxeUBAu0MESTFZH4_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Con mucho ambiente alrededor y tanto en terraza como en el interior.
Local muy grande, con mesas abajo y arriba .
La atención muy buena, amable y rápidos.
La comida con muy buena pinta y lo que probamos, estaba muy bueno... tanto la tosta de jamón ibérico con tomate, como el mollete de carrillera de ternera con mayonesa de pimientos.
Totalmente recomendable.
Se han desmarcado de otras cadenas similares, ofreciendo mayor calidad. Eso sí, a un precio mayor.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQ97OMtAE&fid=0x0:0x17a8dd789f705f98"],"When":"2025-3-8"}]

[{"Name":"Menasseh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWE6vt07huq865Wo0eXEem8QK-UUIlIx8SePpsi1SkKrt-3T3o=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a good experience at OSOM on Calle del Castillo in Madrid! The atmosphere is vibrant and modern, with a cozy yet trendy vibe. The menu is thoughtfully curated.

I particularly enjoyed their innovative twists on classic dishes, paired with their tasty coffee. The staff were friendly, attentive, and clearly passionate about providing top-notch service. It's a great spot for a casual meal. I’ll definitely be coming back to enjoy more of their fantastic offerings! Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDP2-igAQ&fid=0x0:0xe2ae6e7a1b976596"],"When":"2024-12-5"},{"Name":"Bartek Sposób","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0pW-eazk0_t2mCQlubU46uIVV7JGR0QvkTiQTbU12MPkDAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Unfortunately, the matcha was a big disappointment. It tasted just like plain milk with barely any matcha flavor at all. It was clearly poorly prepared, which you can also see in the photo – the texture and color were completely off. Really surprising coming from a specialty place where you’d expect much higher standards.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDwKNI4xVYL9YbU0XqMnHlz&fid=0x0:0xe2ae6e7a1b976596"],"When":"2025-8-1"},{"Name":"이채림","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzcy2zyPnvMeVw4Le68ddrbGX0Xtc9J7qC3N7fOknpoAqsqcYD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"It used to be 15€ minimum order to work with the computer. Today you have to pay 20€, and you can use only 15€ for your order. It is not enough that you have to pay extra 5€, they even designed the menu so you will not be able to reach 15€ excatly - either 14.8€ or 16€.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Caio Pereira","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJN1DmrCrAiD-jEQeKZQLErmw4RUZ7V4XZ73Yx7OYb1T4i5gz4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Great vibe and awesome coworking space. However, very poor service for the standards of comparable coffee shops in Madrid. There were 4 employees, one of them did 90% of the work and the others totally lost. There were 2 people in front on us in the line and took us 17 min to get a capuccino. Should this issue of staffing and operations be solved, this has the potential to be the best coffee shop in Chamberi.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICzm_HWqAE&fid=0x0:0xe2ae6e7a1b976596"],"When":"2024-6-5"},{"Name":"Hortensia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGn_ewtnpi8hlaVMaLW0-u1SUj7ymYZeRT8G0UGF50hvHdR7qm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An ideal space - cowork and leisure
The ambience and design is very soothing and at the same time inspiring.
Food is a-m-a-z-i-n-g - so happy that apart from being delicious, it is very healthy and natural (so many options for any kind of dietary restriction like gluten or lactose intolerance)
Must try, the spirulina bowl and the avocado-egg-hummus toast!
They offer grade A, quality and specialty coffee. I tried various kinds from Colombia, Africa and Asia. I tried an 'orea' filtered coffee with orange slices and it was something special!

Their staff and service is really incredible - (Tito, Nash, Bauti and Juan put all their love into every thing they do!)
Must try this place out! Love what they are doing!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZwL_59wE&fid=0x0:0xe2ae6e7a1b976596"],"When":"2023-9-1"},{"Name":"Mary Shelow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3NTzzo9rWw7u6ziWYqsDgwlzPexQtBmUDkEOsCsanFC58MShIPw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"this is my go to coffee shop in Chamberi. All the employees are so nice and take the time to get to know you. The food is amazing, from different toasts to yogurt bowls. They also have a large variety of baked goods. They have a coworking space in the back with wifi and large tables for laptop use. Oh and I can’t forget, the coffee is amazing!! Love love love this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID53KXlnwE&fid=0x0:0xe2ae6e7a1b976596"],"When":"2023-10-20"},{"Name":"Lena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKTrV-s_bM_FeIxVx4ToNjZIgTWqy_R0TqNBLZ5LwAu81tZLTPow=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience at Osom Coffee House—the atmosphere was cozy, the service friendly, and the food delicious. Can highly recommend the tostossom 🍳🤍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC3p6iL0wE&fid=0x0:0xe2ae6e7a1b976596"],"When":"2024-11-9"},{"Name":"Bryan Segers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlaosq8cqJCdptU8x3mIgzrhrxmL_6bsrBeAD7BNBGPcuF4s6h=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The staff are extremely friendly; amazing coworking space. The staff truly gives 150%.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBDPZrbUdF9WVnR7ImZA01R&fid=0x0:0x4af7c9246fc28380"],"When":"2025-9-28"},{"Name":"Mathi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVg_0JLH4Wz4zFKE79N_tAT9U8oUnNbs4r5zHlJLAXY5eBmtJ40=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If I could give a sixth star I would ⭐️

Highly recommend!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID37YzJ6wE&fid=0x0:0x4af7c9246fc28380"],"When":"2024-11-17"},{"Name":"Amanda P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIm74X1562bNlYmzWDXYv1cN0MKMzdcs_6LIP2MvrSKATeLxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent coffee shop with a very creative menu. The very friendly staff is a bonus.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ThomaS bouhier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJsvyfNFOdf0U2nBOiyTtDAUIHs70GC6RkWPjby7JANCHsANw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went there for bf. [{"Name":"Experimental Zeros","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJCSLpXb9XPzcKzkiPyG82W09VHzY6txjcSkN9eRRO_q6Natg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this place!

Great coffee, Cozy location, Great People!!!

Every time I come visit I am welcomed as a friend, they always recognize me first hand and know exactly what I want, no question: They know what they are doing, and they do it great and in a caring and professional manner.

Do please take the time and visit and support this local business.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daria","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWj9iGs2OpyJx1rq2lD2vRcMT9pfNl9qliWC547synsXfolCAwD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Recently visited this charming coffee shop where I enjoyed an amazing grilled ham and cheese sandwich. They have Nomad coffee, which was also quite good. However, the gluten-free cookies were disappointing, they were super sweet and tasted like pure sugar. The barista was very friendly and welcoming! I paid 10,40€.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICL5tvw9AE&fid=0x0:0x6d5d1e2ab4750271"],"When":"2024-6-18"},{"Name":"Carlos M.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUdwQYruzOkIqH0N8keYfke0iIbndAUmbjd6ag-cq1QIFolVXITUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best specialty coffee place in the neighborhood! One of the pioneers in Madrid. This is the place I learned to truly appreciate coffee. It’s also a place where neighbors gather and have a good chat.  Best quality coffee, and the best cookie of all: black chocolate, coconut oil, salt, and pistachio!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_uvvPew&fid=0x0:0x6d5d1e2ab4750271"],"When":"2025-1-15"},{"Name":"Jassim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpNyd9nAtqXIXjSumHpbR-6tqfLe03BhtV2Y9mhLBJ_o-pfvdz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I passed by this coffee shop by coincidence, there is only one man to serve and brew.
he is really nice guy we had a small conversation about football.
I ordered double espresso ☕️.
recommend to try","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCI2aHMkgE&fid=0x0:0x6d5d1e2ab4750271"],"When":"2025-4-3"},{"Name":"Joris Stinkens","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVW1wMXCY2_HFKojLVqpPULgAoeQGxHaTUDq2f5_TuGHbMGZ3xo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very good coffee. It’s not the biggest place to have a coffee but it’s very cosy. Friendly baristas and really good at what they do. Breakfast is possible here and looks stunning.

One of the best stops I have made for coffee when in Madrid.

High quality a must visit when in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICcyOmoZQ&fid=0x0:0x6d5d1e2ab4750271"],"When":"2019-11-20"},{"Name":"Oriana Serra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZWSBosszSpMkxrIZsp22imqhC5-hGaBhgHyVCTyWEnUjfbpqW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A charming coffee spot with a cozy ambiance and limited seating, ideal for a late coffee by the window. The coffee is delightful, and they offer oat milk for those avoiding regular milk. The warm croissant adds to the experience, and it is dog-friendly!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDlpbzd3gE&fid=0x0:0x6d5d1e2ab4750271"],"When":"2023-12-2"},{"Name":"Stefan Balasa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwJxKyx-743hK7HxfJlQ2a8YyVx1t6DontQpLigeRIch3SCNEg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Awesome coffee place! We served iced latte and cold drip, we enjoyed them, soft flavour, equilibrate taste. Very small place maybe too small.. it's really top ten coffee places in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICkx8PaWg&fid=0x0:0x6d5d1e2ab4750271"],"When":"2018-9-24"},{"Name":"Dane Brooks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXv0W_XI5GcUw7WeWzRmm7aK7MAvtry-SfiwfnBzM9_kNLaKlo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We found this place tucked away while visiting Madrid a few blocks from our hotel, quickly became our favorite spot to get our morning coffee and toast. Delicious coffee and food, very nice owners. Was the best cup of coffee I had while in Spain for 10 days! We bought some of the coffee they had just brewed it up at home and it was wonderful as well! Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICErNP5Hg&fid=0x0:0x6d5d1e2ab4750271"],"When":"2018-6-2"}]

[{"Name":"Selen Yıldırım","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUyVxaiO79VycvNRA6COaahMrNZ4AoBAiHmxphwUCPFOLI3oAZK=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I would never go again. Horrible service.  Made us move tables 3 times ,mid eating. Put us in way two small table (we were 7). Too crowded small tables music is so anoying as well. Hope you guys see this and better the cafe. Food is allright but noting was special or insteresting to order. Imagine the table in the foto while we were all eating, nothing fits so uncomfortable","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCKKvzRtw24gSvs5DpYEGTH&fid=0x0:0x8f5d398649b2e2f1"],"When":"2026-2-7"},{"Name":"ola khalifah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUEUhIGUVyTdgsmNY7652Lz9GCz3tJrQxTqk1UnKdZuWkTbir0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I really had the best experience here the staff was very nice and understanding we arrived 10 minutes before closing yet we told them that we came here by taxi only for them and they take our order and asked us to be comfortable and to stay as much as we like , they gave us the best coffee experience in Madrid. And also respected us as Muslims
Thx toma cafe for this great team you have 🫰🏻🫰🏻","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAU0HNNcARHrcINwA0GPOiZ&fid=0x0:0x8f5d398649b2e2f1"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"Vera Zhukova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYzaBa3AgVW0epqJr9X1SIFf6IvWD-jSUr3j21mtVoU8F8ynI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My big love for many years. Every time I visit Madrid, I come here for the perfect cappuccino. Time goes on, baristas change, but the quality stays the same. Every time I get a perfect cappuccino with perfect latte art. I really appreciate this commitment to quality.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZTq-AKNVANPT44NPzOu2N&fid=0x0:0x8f5d398649b2e2f1"],"When":"2025-11-5"},{"Name":"Anna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUgkSCcZcafqyJH3l0RxsbCcIyw5fY8OMtpryj40MBGDscY5o4Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I ordered a medium Flat White and received a small one. I told the barista (the long haired Argentinian one) that thats not a medium coffee, but a small one. He then perceived to tell me that that's a medium, and showed me a cortado cup saying that's small. I was late at work so I just left but it's unbelievable how some people just wanna scam you. Besides this when I first told him that the coffee was a small, not a medium, he started talking to me with a very bad and superior attitude, gaslighting me.
I bought coffee from Toma in the past three  years almost daily, but this is gonna end now.

---------
Answer to the owner: I was not expecting for you to say anything good after reading all your answers to other people's complains. It's very funny how, instead of saying "oh we're so sorry for what happened" you keep pointing the finger to those in the right. I explained which barista it was so you could know and talk to him for the future, but it's clearly you're just like him. A scammer between scammer. All those ugly answers to people's reviews... it's amazing how people still buy from Toma. Your attitude is disgusting. "No drama just coffee"? Yeah, when you won't be scammed on your own money. Until then, shhh. But don't worry, controls are on their way. Your business will be revived soon, or are u paying peple to be quiet? ;)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBsUo5UtaFV5-0m93mUEz7c&fid=0x0:0x8f5d398649b2e2f1"],"When":"2025-10-14"},{"Name":"Kristina Völk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKo4BA3vg-yrtcc0a3jvDrCCuucqXn5-e82jwAnflVygG3W=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent coffee!! The staff is friendly and knowledgeable and the coffee tastes really good. The breakfast menu is simple but delicious. It’s a great spot to sit outside. Also the music selection is great - good vibes in general. Shoutout to the Maradona trinkets.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCo8qvAQw&fid=0x0:0x8f5d398649b2e2f1"],"When":"2025-4-16"},{"Name":"Pency Lucero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvdoAahFIB1Fft6iiG5ERm8WsLfEX6obOl4OsVeX3XyPzAZyba=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My best day in the summer of Madrid consist of staying here late afternoon (6-8pm) outside drinking matcha and reading a book then walking all the way to Parque del Oeste to loiter on the grass and watch the sunset! This spot is so cool and perfect I wish I can take it everywhere with me! I love the fountain near this place and it’s just in a really cool location which is actually hard to find if you’re traveling enough. Other than that, matcha is on point! I’ve had 5-6 matchas here and probably only one wasn’t that good (their baristas rotate). Pastry is tasty, love the brownie. I 100% recommend this place if it’s not obvious yet.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC1-5NlK7NOWeZF_nrSYVQD&fid=0x0:0x8f5d398649b2e2f1"],"When":"2025-8-2"},{"Name":"KPH","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJVQBXWfVA-yxvVWfZjQHYz8MbBROtQLE2_ff5l9omaGhg9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good coffee and delicious granola, good portion. Friendly service and nice, vibrant atmosphere.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCtauGsrYAhUGF-fwvdtZAJ&fid=0x0:0x8f5d398649b2e2f1"],"When":"2025-8-6"},{"Name":"Teena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIK8s3ybc0jGboBtSP4-xqYl6GqR3PNAsgJgjaJBpIx6NAiTg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It was super crowded. I ordered a chai latte which was quite nice but I wish it was less sweeter. The flavour is good but i think sweetness can be optional. The service was very quick","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Sherry Meyer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUW8eChNNnOk076HD-9oJgouGQSvCGhcmmoUbCXb-3acvbJKf8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We just lived this food and cheerful, owner Ping. Everything was delicious, especially the soup and shrimp large dumpling. We thought it was going to be an average meal as it was just the most convenient place to eat nearby, but it turned out to be special. Also, the little dog named BonBon comes with the table. So well behaved and a dear. Also, the tea leaves were a special variety from China. Tasted so good. We really enjoyed!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDA-NGdlAE&fid=0x0:0x4a0c5180cacc24e9"],"When":"2025-2-6"},{"Name":"George P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3LZMuByew0QeIbs9C7ecCRX2a28bzjlMjoLKc1_tmT8E2n5pZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great noodles .. had the weekday menu... Spring rolls and curry chicken noodles.  Both were excellent. The noodles (homemade) were a bit light on the amount of chicken but not a big deal.  A good amount of food for the price paid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID10OaEKw&fid=0x0:0x4a0c5180cacc24e9"],"When":"2024-1-4"},{"Name":"mir P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKQ57z73654hB2qKSVHGVzb1sEuN6ckFMb5XGoDi0mcb_Vyyw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"very tasty noodles with vegetables and rice with chicken.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDfl5ubhwE&fid=0x0:0x4a0c5180cacc24e9"],"When":"2025-1-10"},{"Name":"Den Yanine","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVA8asG8elHCdYS4FJQxBtZZoVhhxwFbJ4DY_WoP2yk39C1xXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La comida es exquisita, la atención inmejorable y la locación es perfecta.
El tinto de verano especial que prepara Alex, es el mejor tinto en toda España y no exagero en decirlo, acompañarlo con los tallarines hechos a mano solo hace que toda la experiencia sea irrepetible.
De igual forma probamos varias cosas del menú y todo fue igual de delicioso y disfrutable.

La atención de Alex verdaderamente hizo que toda nuestra comida fuera un deleite. Un lugar infravalorado que no se puede perder en Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDD34DurAE&fid=0x0:0x4a0c5180cacc24e9"],"When":"2024-4-16"},{"Name":"Ana María Ramos L.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfg2omvoLPL2nTzZCZ9PH0JokmB4M1X_ckbvrCiaUpF2FP3bcE5g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un día, de casualidad, volvimos a encontrar nuestros tallarines favoritos. Éramos clientes habituales de sus dos locales anteriores y echábamos mucho, muchisimo, de menos estos tallarines artesanales. Es una opción perfecta tanto para comer allí como para encargar comida para llevar. Todo riquísimo y ellos encantadores siempre.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jorge sanchez suela","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZPbd5USGcQPcoEJWcP5xoErxxc1CvOX-ZvW7J84o_9qDK5g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"estaba todo increíble que bueno estaba todo !!!sinceramente de lo mejor que hemos probado en madrid lo hacen todo genial y los tallarines caseros se notan demasiado INCREÍBLE, el pato también lo hacen de diez !!👍🙏🥰
100% recomendable de lo mejor","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID73Zif9wE&fid=0x0:0x4a0c5180cacc24e9"],"When":"2024-8-27"},{"Name":"Miguel Angel Marcos Bueno","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtsBfletIB6-sgKEMpOS9VsBfTW7_J3zzpMvJwhkVDYSgi8I_H=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un local de comida Asiática de fusión muy aceptable,tallarines muy buenos,buena decoración y una gran atención,buen curry y buen producto fresco","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC3vL_JuwE&fid=0x0:0x4a0c5180cacc24e9"],"When":"2024-11-3"},{"Name":"Marta Cuevas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIzdmWjgWAcZ7hJFV9eLrLgooPyxP8ZhBP85IqmWjX9GtsKVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Llevo más de 20 años siguiendo a la familia que regenta este negocio, he visto a su hija crecer. Este es el tercer local que tienen desde que los conocí y en todos ellos la comida es excepcional y el trato excelente. Todo delicioso, pero para mí son un must los tallarines de cualquier tipo, el arroz (sencillo pero increíblemente bueno) y la sopa agriopicante.","Images":null,"When":""}]

We will definitely go back to try the other goods.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCgpQMzhNzzD5L-NZacaMxD&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2025-9-26"},{"Name":"Nati","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXenLgIdMJD6V8rf3H99PdOVRZKi7ChH-17vj_R9uQstGKIpxc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just moved to Madrid and went to go buy bread for the first time in the city and the lady working there kindly explained every bread option they had after I was a little overwhelmed. The quality is top tier and I think the prices are totally reasonable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA8fq9QS_Cz7o9ez4vDYzL0&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2025-9-6"},{"Name":"Chris Zhu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0lJsIExk_cqe015X5oYkXbbi8ru6wWAGifzzEP8p9q2tJFEhr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The bread there are fantastic and super tasty. Recommendation will be their big bread, monkey bread and Kouign Amann (very tasty even on the next day).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwh6zpBA&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2025-3-21"},{"Name":"Sonia T.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbQdlkXS_R_Yi5JrUXHnru1YKJ5ozMOJlyswx4zcApaxz0NX-bGQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dog friendly bakery with many bread and baked good options, and a few savoury ones too. It doubles as a tiny shop for some other essentials like milks.
The staff is so nice and the service is always on point.
I'm French and I thoroughly enjoyed all the breakfasts I bought during my stay in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDLw87DkQE&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2024-6-30"},{"Name":"Evan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3stz6TPpRlEtkamdF33adQZQBkXVxe2dzveqd9pl0ylW9_PA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This takeaway bakery and café specializes in handmade baked goods and quality coffee beans. The interior is bright and welcoming, though there’s no seating available. The staff are friendly and attentive.

We ordered two iced lattes, a whole Monkey Bread, and a Danesa Dulce, spending around 23 EUR in total. The coffee was well-priced and enjoyable, and the pastries were also very affordable.

If you're in the area, it's worth stopping by for a coffee and to pick up some of their delicious pastries and breads.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID7g4zvCg&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2024-8-27"},{"Name":"Anna Quinlan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXp_VD4zINntiOM_wcOv3kJbpyCOwei1CdqT_uhJn-UvW7G3Nhd7g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Divine bakery - easily one of the best I’ve been to in Madrid. Try their pistachio pain au chocolat or monkey bread!

They have a little counter outside you can stand and eat at, but I would recommend doing take out and sitting in a nearby park","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICnqMCvpAE&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2024-9-22"},{"Name":"Olivier Abella","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKkVxYvEn6DQVrsCX_jGHYdPiSrqbPhwzjz3DNmWW6TUe_cKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Although they churn out exceptional bread and puff pastry, the business feels a bit soulless lately","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB5eG6WalZNEJdWJek7rOcW&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2025-12-19"},{"Name":"Nina Liu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9hmUHjjBS1nrNNkzP024qy_M5YiDBJIbKFV4VaqoNOes6O0Fo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A lovely bakery which offers coffee as well.
Everything looks wonderful 🤤🤤🤤
I bought 1/2 sesame bread (the sesame smell and taste from the bread is awesome), monkey bread (first time seeing a bakery selling monkey bread ❤️)and a chocolate pistachio croissant (this combination and will never go wrong 🤭)- all of them are great 👍
The staff was very nice as well.
Will love to come back and try different pastry with coffee one morning ❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDTkI3rQg&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2024-5-21"}]

[{"Name":"Ahmed Ahmed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXzqMEcYgxi8Sk2FQ7sC016oKAIhG6suleRmzk5iHGL6ZJdhLoS=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stopped by MPWR in Madrid for brunch and loved it. Had a flat white and the Turkish eggs, both excellent. The eggs were super flavorful and honestly felt very protein-packed, which was a nice change from the usual brunch options. Great quality, great coffee, and a solid spot if you want something delicious but still fueling. Would definitely come back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAvpiz5ML6PdUTnkRPF6Y8A&fid=0x0:0xe80f68e1b7397f84"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"maria bg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJFFmV_3e52w62Gmqq_RIhix1pZ5khx8O7uihMvuYAs4-W9Eg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It’s taken me way too long to write this because MPWR honestly deserves all the love. The place is amazing, the atmosphere, the people, and the quality of the ingredients are just next level. I’ve tried almost everything on the menu, and it’s always spot on.

You can build your own bowl depending on your mood, so there’s always something that hits just right. It’s perfect after a workout, in the morning, or as an afternoon pick-me-up. Honestly, there’s never a wrong time for MPWR.

And the name says it all. You leave feeling uplifted, happy, and empowered. Always fresh, always delicious, always MPWR. Five stars aren’t enough!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDEykn_lnLF_jw-g-nd4d6L&fid=0x0:0xe80f68e1b7397f84"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"Giacomo Garibaldi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRY5oeflIPHmikl4K594e8icDSxWICAPZjneCVGeJlBPO0-Ojm=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best healthy snack bar in Madrid! They have the best yogurt bowls, the best toppings, amazing coffee and overall the best vibe possible. The minimalistic and modern decoration of the place just makes it better, and the always willing to help attitude of the staff makes you feel great. Special mention to their playlist. Will definitely return for more!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBJ2Ckvfanp7f640_wHlPT9&fid=0x0:0xe80f68e1b7397f84"],"When":"2025-11-27"},{"Name":"Abdelaziz Lakhdari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKCllTPErKmRK6YBCuwvOotE8HpKQUu296Bld6UEAFwydN9sw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely loved my experience at MPWR Café! The vibe and atmosphere are spot on minimalistic, clean, and full of positive energy. The service was genuinely warm and attentive, which made the whole visit even more enjoyable. every single product feels carefully selected. The Ethiopian coffee was rich and full of character, easily one of the best I’ve had in Madrid. The Greek yogurt bowls? Just wow creamy, fresh, and topped with high quality ingredients that perfectly complement each other. You can really taste the attention to detail in everything they serve.

If you’re into healthy, delicious food and great coffee in an inspiring space, MPWR is a must. Can’t wait to be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAlCOiO4837Xhl4YRboUudo&fid=0x0:0xe80f68e1b7397f84"],"When":"2025-7-19"},{"Name":"Morgan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXK44rJ4dMqrcbA0Pw4P9757OS6H52FihiePE4VgtmygfpqfU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Besttt smoothies in madrid! Also obsessed w the yogurt bowls, so filing and delicious","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBWIQ327uxuneYpxTz4Xh6h&fid=0x0:0xe80f68e1b7397f84"],"When":"2025-11-25"},{"Name":"Julia Cortés","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBKXWYAxc4kpccfacQO3j6-9_NWBQ_uzTwqyxpBU6MbAfjBT1G=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best coffee i have tried in Madrid. Its a must to visit if you are in the city. It has that authentic vibe of not only a specialty coffee but a whole experience and also the quality of the products. It was very difficult to find a place that combines both : the arquitectura space and the product quality. Added to this: the service is spectacular. How you are received from the beginning to end and how much caring on each gesture. It’s a truly luxurious breakfast quality experience .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tuli Laví","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdGF21WFg_Wl9zxhq_bDp2TQHR2K206qxSqoMKlvegIM4Xfb8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolute 6 star experience! Super honest/healthy yogurt bowls with amazingly tasty toppings and combos. The service is so kind and the atmosphere of the place is very special and cool. Fell in love with this place, I go everyday now! I hope to see MPWR grow internationally because there’s nothing like it. Thank you Seeham!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Menasseh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWE6vt07huq865Wo0eXEem8QK-UUIlIx8SePpsi1SkKrt-3T3o=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited MPWR Madrid. From the moment you step in, you're greeted with a vibrant atmosphere and a team that genuinely cares about your well-being. The staff is professional, knowledgeable, and attentive, ensuring that every need is met with a smile.

The facilities are modern, clean, and well-equipped, making it easy to feel comfortable. Whether you're looking to boost your fitness journey, recharge mentally, or simply enjoy a moment of relaxation.

I highly recommend MPWR Madrid to anyone looking for a top-tier wellness and fitness experience in the city. I'll definitely be coming back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDP3p_ZGg&fid=0x0:0xe80f68e1b7397f84"],"When":"2024-12-2"}]
