[{"Name":"Marco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-2vOmx_gYcTUN1FbBaFgSW-izsaWOsvy2EtTJIyXqd7R8_w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is a nice coffee shop in the heart of Madrid. The staff is very knowledgeable, friendly and welcoming. The quality of their products is superb, with a large variety of drinks/food to choose from. The space is also clean. Worth visiting and check when they are having medialunas (in my opinion, the best ones I’ve tried so far in the city).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDj-aTT0AE&fid=0x0:0xd39e657b8e792895"],"When":"2024-5-5"},{"Name":"A Gentle Supportive Soul","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXeDcebDCzS3cZclcJEGLiZirVHpSmYcheIwGVhuPl68YKu8N56cg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very nice building and location in the center of Madrid and near the Bilbao metro! The coffee and sweets that I had were all good. I appreciate the quiet in this cafe where many young people are working or studying. Strong wifi, nice view outside, available water for free. Friendly and helpful barista. I just wish they have more space for the sitting that faces the tall beautiful windows. There is a water bowl outside where your pet can have a drink.

There is an area downstairs where some paintings are available for you to see and buy. Nice clean toilet.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICN6ta9jgE&fid=0x0:0xd39e657b8e792895"],"When":"2024-1-13"},{"Name":"R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzeQZfwtopE_yIcLP-CdYW08MMhiZX-hfUI2h2cTX5CKsQPC31=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My friend ordered more than €16 (I paid my friend for half of it), which meets the €8 laptop-use requirement for two people. However, we were informed that the amount had to be paid by two different individuals. This doesn’t make sense, because the total amount we ordered, more than €16, was paid by both of us, each of us had a drink and a couple of sweets. Technically, I spent more than €8 at this café (since I paid my friend).

By that logic, if we used a €20 bill to order two €10 meals for two people, it would still be counted as a single order by one person, unless we first break the €20 into two €10 bills so that the two of us can order separately. I understand the €8 requirement for laptop use, but I don’t understand why it must be split into two separate transactions.

Again, I spent more than 8€ tonight, just so you know.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mikhail Suvorov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWj9HgYeSRMB0h4nmQjuscXkm7-bx3ieo94xAC5VRNmDZQOknMF2g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent place, awesome & friendly barista will definitely make your day with that perfect cup you are looking 👀 for at specialty coffee place. Lot’s of different preparation methods, different coffees with perfectly matching sweets (they have toast as well). Ordered several drinks out there (V60, AeroPress, Flat White) - thanks to barista all three were just perfect.
As always- just my opinion. ☕️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-nKWZbA&fid=0x0:0xd39e657b8e792895"],"When":"2022-10-29"},{"Name":"Angelo Timpanaro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLIynBQw5OE7_Z3W1RiN4Sm0Tn0KeQRgc4JkgrVczTC7unfTflm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"ÖSS Madrid is a charming café nestled in the heart of Madrid, offering a serene escape from the bustling city streets. With its inviting atmosphere and impeccable service, it's no wonder this café earns high praise.

The star of the show is undoubtedly the coffee, with the cappuccino stealing the spotlight. Rich, creamy, and expertly crafted, each sip is a delight for the senses. Accompanying the coffee are delectable sweets that, while petite in size, pack a punch of flavor, leaving taste buds longing for more.

While prices may lean towards the higher end, the experience is well worth it. The peaceful ambiance, particularly on the ground floor, provides the perfect backdrop for meaningful conversations and quiet contemplation. Whether you're catching up with a friend or seeking solace with a good book, ÖSS Madrid offers a haven of tranquility amidst the hustle and bustle of city life.

In summary, ÖSS Madrid is a must-visit for coffee enthusiasts and seekers of serenity alike. From the superb coffee and delightful sweets to the enchanting atmosphere, this café delivers an experience that nourishes both the body and the soul.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICdvZbwwAE&fid=0x0:0xd39e657b8e792895"],"When":"2024-2-17"},{"Name":"benaya simeon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBcN4UwkvZ-ExfwioX9tO9xBQYrCQyDXvty062x-s1Z82vp6M5vA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For me who came from Indonesia, I really could say, they have good coffee...
I satisfied having my afternoon coffee there, really out of my expectation!
Their basement was very comfort and interesting... adding more good ambience while enjoying my coffee and my brownies!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChiMDfCw&fid=0x0:0xd39e657b8e792895"],"When":"2023-2-3"},{"Name":"Bianca Pinho Casaes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJt1Tqp50vk5uO2EGX_8xlRSlhETKbqD3Ja_EOwMqTCehtsVA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"coffee takes a long time to be prepared and baristas are rude. asked them to heat my brownie, waited for 10 minutes and in the end had to go remind them about it again. Coffee was pretty mediocre as well","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"eduardo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLYgvVUKiC54CTDwu-kt8MmMBeu0aWzUJ2_odkivU_lbte3yg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Such a bad experience. The latte I ordered just tasted like milk, it seemed like it barely had any coffee in it. On top of that, the latte was small and the baristas were super unfriendly. 0% recommended","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Pablo Rubio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdIQPd3QhoBz98fPmQdWL9FJkAcFRIZPEyMBzD80GO84wITA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I came here considering the purchase of a moccamaster. The sales associate was very helpful showing me the machine and answering my questions. Unfortunately I went elsewhere to purchase the machine since they don’t allow refunds if I were to be dissatisfied with the machine. I do understand it may not be feasible for a small business to do this, but you may also get fewer sales if customers don’t have confidence. I wish I could have given them my business in this case, but I will return if I need something else as they seem to care about quality coffee and sell many things associated with the craft.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Javier Criado Nesofsky","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhzAf1E84FdEbyVHcat-lfh7PZSVbRhJ-5NYrr8hB1itfYma9B_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great coffee, coffee parafernalia and excellent customer attention","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tadeusz Muller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbrMTGYUHQ6w0wtix-bg7fKJb2U4FmKApuyNypxIpl0FlQFRRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"La vendedora con gafas me echó de la tienda. Resulta que con esta dependienta no se puede compartir la opinión de que tienen poca variedad de tampers para café (1–24 mm), porque lo interpreta como un ataque y no como una opinión. Pregunté si tenían cafés con una puntuación SCA concreta, es decir, la calificación otorgada por los Q Graders. La señora me respondió de forma indirecta, contando que muchas tostadoras honestas no compran cafés con certificación SCA porque no pueden permitírselo, mientras que otras tostadoras sí los compran porque tienen dinero para ello. Finalmente descubrí en la estantería que su marca, Dromedario, sí indica la escala SCA. Cuando intenté leer cuál era el perfil sensorial del café, la señora me arrancó los paquetes de las manos y me dijo que me largara de la tienda. Mi opinión de que no ponen fechas de tueste, sino solo fechas de consumo preferente, la enfadó. La señora se amparó en la ley que, según dijo, en España no obliga a indicar la fecha de tueste. Una conducta escandalosa por parte de la dependienta, que sin duda tiene multitud de clientes satisfechos, pero si eres un buscador exigente de buen café de especialidad, evita la ubicación de Vale Hermoso. Le doy una calificación de 2 debido a la gran tradición de la tostadora, que por desgracia está representada por una mujer muy nerviosa y conservadora.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Susana Ordaz Espinosa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0LQiHwL5Dm1tCyTpNXeZgbSqvN2xHy8QoLXQSFr2qta5GgQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Siempre compro el café allí para mi madre, está muy bueno ( es el q se ha comprado toda la vida en mi casa) y la Srta que te atiende es toda una profesional","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ANTONIO R.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCi-7mXkILWMuPUFd6GQGPXybDSgLP2c3jJOORiRY3G2HtouXJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Buscando una tienda para poder comprar un buen CAFÉ en Madrid-centro no pude encontrar una mejor: con más surtido y mejor calidad de producto, junto con la tremenda amabilidad de la \"dependienta\" y sus profesionales explicaciones...repito seguro y recomendable 100%!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIle-O3gE\u0026fid=0x0:0xa2c833624db04110"],"When":"2025-4-11"},{"Name":"Álvaro D.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWaAj_uN3hQQRsmczfAiIK5pNYF6Nu_anyhsByQ1vV4X7mnGa1sCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"El problema de Carmen es que piensa que Todo el que entra en la Tienda tiene que saber de cafés, de Marca y Todo. Y para los que nos gusta el Café pero no tenemos cultura del Café, Carmen ni quiere ni empatiza con ese público Objetivo que será nuevo pero que a la larga puede ser Recurrente aunque la tienda esté Vacía. Ella misma te invita a irte sin que compres nada. Entiendo que Carmen no es una profesora pero si podría captar nuevos clientes y no solamente vender a los que saben que es lo más sencillo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDtqJH39AE\u0026fid=0x0:0xa2c833624db04110"],"When":"2024-2-2"},{"Name":"Antonio Cruz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrwOHHtGnc609Pap9PHZ_aoVXEcuaLuX8JCImHoBj8mrZ4QOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tienes de cafés para poder comprar máquinas y cafés muy variados, los precios además están muy bien","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICv1NSexQE\u0026fid=0x0:0xa2c833624db04110"],"When":"2024-12-8"},{"Name":"VICTOR Cano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWw98ErssDiYDCEkaoeEsZSHptNJSGmEahQyoQNJ1W7dAc7zRk0Qg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Quería comentar que mi visita ha sido fugaz ya que no disponía de mucho tiempo, y Carmen la maravillosa dependienta aun teniendo bastantes clientes me ha dedicado el tiempo necesario para explicarme los diferentes tipos de café de los que disponen sin ninguna prisa. Acabo de prepararme una de las recomendaciones de Carmen que ha sido el café de la casa y solo puedo decir que brillante, mucho cuerpo,amargor y acidez muy equilibrados y un sabor profundo. Mil gracias por la atención y la calidad del café. Sin duda en cuanto se me acabe estaré ahi de nuevo 😊","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Dimitris Vg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvo4ueMVHNSDIUYy0pPeDrTqE3CVgMPn6Y6SYGEI6dj0yl2buf_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"A Mediocre experience with highs and lows. The ambiance of the restaurant and environment is nice.

The highs were the really good tarama, and the sea bass which was truly exceptional 5 star. The bread was really good and the cabbage salad was really inspirational.

But here is where the good stops and becomes disappointing. Huge gap in time between delivering the starter and  the rest of meals. How much tarama and bread can someone eat?  But the worst was the potatoes and the shrimp dish with the leeks. Especially the last reminded me of the failed burned mash food that I was making when I was a student. Really disappointing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Valeriia Svirska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3HAzbObIRLFlTxqaOA4b4Fo2mM1h2YraG-TgRVqZ0Vyd8TXs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We had a really lovely evening at this restaurant. We tried several dishes from the menu and shared a bottle of wine. Everything tasted great, and we genuinely enjoyed the atmosphere and service.

Unfortunately, later that night both my husband and I developed severe food poisoning, which has now been ongoing for almost 18 hours. This is the first time this has happened to us in Madrid. We did not eat or drink anywhere else that evening, so unfortunately we have to associate this experience with the restaurant, most likely something among the ingredients was spoiled.

This is especially disappointing, as our initial impression was very positive.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Evan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3stz6TPpRlEtkamdF33adQZQBkXVxe2dzveqd9pl0ylW9_PA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This French-Spanish fusion restaurant features a warm, rustic interior with wood and brick walls, creating a cozy farmhouse atmosphere. The space is divided into two areas: a bar section near the entrance and a dining area with a semi-open kitchen at the back. Dim lighting and candles add to the ambiance. The service is friendly, though at times the staff seemed a bit overwhelmed by the number of guests.

We ordered the Corvina salvaje, Salmón, Codorniz, and Mollejas, all of which were well-prepared. My favorites were the Salmón and Codorniz—the salmon was incredibly juicy, with a creamy yet refreshing sauce, while the quail was tender and infused with a balanced blend of curry spices, yogurt, and lemon. The Mollejas were also enjoyable, though I found the roasted radicchio overly bitter, lacking a sweet contrast to balance the flavor. For dessert, we had the Pavlova, which was decent but not as memorable as the main courses.

Overall, it was a unique dining experience, with a strong sense of style in both the decor and cuisine. The food was consistently high quality, though the pacing of service could have been better. The first two dishes arrived within minutes, but the next two took about 35 minutes, leaving us waiting for quite some time. Fortunately, the sourdough bread helped pass the time. At checkout, the waiter apologized for the delay and kindly waived the dessert charge, bringing our total to around 110 EUR, including drinks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDAztSuSA&fid=0x0:0xc1b303337f18588c"],"When":"2025-2-9"},{"Name":"Adolfo Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKn-HwuM_aOrIC7dOu12zIjCaX0FOkPoR7ZBsTsW7pkjoFedw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best restaurant we ate in Madrid. Unmatched hospitality and cocktails with excellent food. Make sure to get the quail","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBk5_JC5pe2vbbrpwlHtiJN&fid=0x0:0xc1b303337f18588c"],"When":"2025-12-5"},{"Name":"Anna Bablot","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0aGzPR3tv7TPAkWU4nZJXmefr0loqtFpMeeJvcsokrcLaYYFV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The plates were really good and savoury, 100% recommend it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDzoJrj9sPhmcULod9hCp9k&fid=0x0:0xc1b303337f18588c"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"paule reydet","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIjjBNbth1yupMW94_qojyWt1_wv9gSiHJo3Sa0IJ-BtP-laQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I wish I could rate it 6 stars. Amazing food, from start to finish, by far my favorite restaurant in Madrid. The dishes are extremely high quality and the attention to detail is astounding.
The restaurant is absolutely beautiful, a very intimate and cozy vibe.
You will see me back very soon!
🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID3gemS0gE&fid=0x0:0xc1b303337f18588c"],"When":"2024-11-15"},{"Name":"Eva De Hostos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPzxRd3XMfDuKKV7lxQrYzi0ZxnbR0a2nqiSpZgPfYAPXkU0-P=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pleasantly surprised by TonTon. The space is one of the most beautiful in Madrid. Great lighting. The food is seasonal and delicious, sourced from some of the best F&B suppliers in the city, and the wine list has a mix of french, spanish, autrian wines. Very yummy overall","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gabriela Kormann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXm3OWf9I4ymriuBFV1gmVNcPmbzZTShYMiMtaXQHKMzBzne7E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have no words to describe how fantastic Tonton is!
The wonderful Chef Alice (former team member at Celler de Can Roca) will baffle you with an amazing, seasonal, top quality, flavorful menu, which is always updated to bring you only the best ingredients at the market.
Charming Bosco will usher you through this experience with an attentive and friendly service, with great natural wine recommendations.
If you go to Madrid and don’t go to Tonton…. You did something wrong! Not to be missed!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICv1Mq1Rw&fid=0x0:0xc1b303337f18588c"],"When":"2024-12-8"}]

I think my servers were a bit confused about who was going to serve me and no neither of them can by the table for a while. Both of them were friendly however. I went inside because I saw a photo of the cachopower sandwich when passing by. I realized it was spicy and asked for it not to be. The sandwich was so so. Maybe the spice would've given it more flavor. And it was drenched in mayo, I had to wipe a lot off. My oreo shake didn't taste like oreo even though I could see all the ores bits. It was pretty thin and tasted like sweetness. I'd consider returning to try something else on the menu.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICRueDG3gE\u0026fid=0x0:0x562f471310b18be9"],"When":"2023-4-5"},{"Name":"Mo O","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWv5mjC6obS6nG9j4QSkcS4TydKVd61iZiU9Ej5tP1Tzfr8zho4OQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Average quality (think Denny's) but nice American and English breakfast options when you're craving that. Fair prices, fast service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDx_LX04gE\u0026fid=0x0:0x562f471310b18be9"],"When":"2023-6-4"},{"Name":"Henri Leduc","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIXqfVlAT5WcPareNuWyyifjtAoTQNKlnRZ6pLD0tDl-3reeg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The club sandwich was cold and a lot of things on the menu was not available.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDv-tj6Pw\u0026fid=0x0:0x562f471310b18be9"],"When":"2024-12-19"},{"Name":"Monika Dominguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgkvaTvhBBhu59wpaYpylf4DMOPGwF9zMPP8qTT0GEmKcgJ04=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yummy everything!! we will be back for sure!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICB_8KY_wE\u0026fid=0x0:0x562f471310b18be9"],"When":"2023-1-8"}]

[{"Name":"rated by maryam • food critic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV2rFU889_uyIosz_7bpffSFpmpz0-gKcaVKqZvHb7h1qD_qhXV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Tasty Poké Bar was a surprisingly solid stop—quick, clean, and genuinely refreshing. I ordered the salmon poké bowl, and honestly, it hit all the right notes. The salmon was fresh, the toppings were well-balanced, and nothing felt soggy or overdressed. You get that nice mix of crunch and cool without it feeling like fast food. It’s not trying too hard, which I appreciate. Just solid ingredients, good texture, and enough flavor to keep you interested. The portion was just right—enough to feel satisfied but not stuffed. Perfect pitstop before a flat white and a croissant. Would go again for a quick snack.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDHizejKsXmXJWcuvmyWqEL&fid=0x0:0x1a7d0e06aef4cbb8"],"When":"2025-7-4"},{"Name":"Karim Gomaa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWl2V1fXBx7xs9osNrBW4JzvdkJ2tr69aJjpPpdqqYvPCUddkDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time experience with poke bowl and was amazing. For sure will recommend friends and family to go there","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICkzY6_0AE&fid=0x0:0x1a7d0e06aef4cbb8"],"When":"2019-2-5"},{"Name":"Pilar Sanchez Labrador","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGaz37AQB-VX0S3AoTrjlxNkn68ytjm9zE1p_fapTU06mPZ6tR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great pokes!! At the end, no customers have no business.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTQ4vcliYMHeZeUkFTJ8rRRArDLAGnQ1uiV632ldtgcjcSj0Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Bread heaven! user_reviews:
[{"Name":"William Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKhOuOn_iucrQVf8lq38vHwQAOeGH79fjyXKWWTB3uwr9cxSmKEw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Yet another fantastic burger place in Madrid, this one near Quevedo.

On an extremely hot summer day in Madrid in August, while other places were closed for vacation or simply not a good option because of the high heat, Burnout Burger called my name. This burger place has a dining room below ground that stays cool on excessively hot days, and I was pleased to take advantage of that space.

The service was attentive and friendly from the beginning. And it was speedy too. The basement dining area is charming, although small.

Of course, the main attraction are the burgers. I ordered an IT burger, and “it” was fantastic. A double-smash-burger-patty burger, the flavors were bursting from this burger due to the combination of high-quality beef, house-made caramelized onion jam, and plenty of American cheese. And the bun! The bun was exquisite. The fries are a thinner style than some other places, which I prefer. Great burger experience.

It’s not quite good enough to displace what I believe to be the very best burger place in Madrid, but man, it comes close. Burnout Burger for the win!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCt7l5m9toe1vIcZL0i7yXe&fid=0x0:0xda49b615e6f16c31"],"When":"2025-8-17"},{"Name":"Gustavo Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWB4TUmwxiKUD1owiGBAY5xaQUS8pOpQnjnM6B0qH7hRMLVO17U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am a wing lover and they have great wings!
It is challenging to find spicy food in Madrid, their buffalo sauce was really good. Mild compare to US standards, but it did the job.
The burgers looked amazing, I will be back to try more of their dishes. Their terrace is nice, must have dinner in order to sit and they have a lot of reservations, best to make yours ahead of showing up.
Wings were on the smaller side, but the full order of ten plus some french fries with their burn out sauce was a lot of food for one.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZkeaMoQE&fid=0x0:0xda49b615e6f16c31"],"When":"2023-9-12"},{"Name":"Manuel O.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVK82KFgem6c10f3_FHdqWiTlPj0d_RwBZ8QFRrCuwUg6r4hJzS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Small burger restaurant near the Gran Vía in Madrid. Good location and service. Decent size of the patty, but the brioche bun is too small and it makes difficult eating the burger comfortably. Also, the put butter in the brioche (not mentioned in the menu), and I personally don’t like butter!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aykan Canbaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjRkw6SJP9G6pstZg0YBcj3TDdLCRfzAICE45RDvdZoJsCCoXi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tried IT burger (served with little salad). Cloudy bun together with Galician beef meat. One of the best burgers in my life.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELOkz8TcqpHvywE&fid=0x0:0xda49b615e6f16c31"],"When":"2025-5-10"},{"Name":"Stevan Jacovic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXiz2BljBMUAiscKNbehS0yTsGu26JQb4kVPULJY_te2_MXGWYOAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nicely cooked burgers, attentive staff. Got the temperature down correctly. Went for the doble of the bacon (woven)  cheeseburger. Nice beers to choose from and well priced..

Fries could be crispier. Kind of weird to walk in and see a bin of precooked bacon getting topped/plated. Feels like some flavor gets lost also it's not hot when I comes out of course.

Nice butter ratio on the buffalo wings (not overkill like other places) but could be spicier. Understandable for Madrid

Nice atmosphere downstairs","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICKjbG0-QE&fid=0x0:0xda49b615e6f16c31"],"When":"2021-4-14"},{"Name":"Gabriel Moreno Tovar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJb7EMUFxG8C2tNU7l97VMWO3XPcjPO0990M3e2bFf3BfdeuzI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great burgers, many options and non stop beers","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAVFRGFaokRvRTK07-zLNMU&fid=0x0:0xda49b615e6f16c31"],"When":"2025-9-14"},{"Name":"vassil stoimenov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVAWEz8x_LmgwDYC5AnQSfga-uDOqPTPWzRfeue-rz0cYhBnws=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place has the best burgers in all of Madrid. There are a ton of fancy burger joints in this town but this unpretentious “hole in the wall” type spot absolutely towers over them. Service didn’t disappoint either, as our waiter Rolando kicked butt!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ainho aK","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnWhK_6CAohc29rmyiGs7zXxQy0ttlnSkoAAGRMHqddCkqj47MoA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Burger wasn’t exceptional but really tasty! What was remarkable, was the service!super friendly and helpful.
Of course, the paintings and deco makes it  bit more fun if you like comic books 🤓🤪
Thanks!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICG2LupvwE&fid=0x0:0xda49b615e6f16c31"],"When":"2021-10-19"}]

[{"Name":"Clara Benacerraf","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIGu6qNPhMY9D6qi0BvMdGgx32AfJY5n4jV9LLKC6yLMRfH1Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We sat at the terrace. The atmosphere was good. We ordered different dishes, and they were all ok. Elizabeth, the waitress, was especially nice, attentive and patient.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aurore FG","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJQXu7fQFbRfQFLG-8vVMSTJYQAl5s6-XcOhBlt4pVAgFbtoew=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Good for drinks and tapas","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jairo Ochoa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgSnO9GWYL8eibIYjzCDzfNYTy0f7IXH2uMIpeL9x_LrFw7Z1v=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"En la calle Fuencarral, al lado de la Glorieta de Quevedo se encuentra ubicado un bar de tapas que cuenta con un pequeño recinto interior con dos mesas altas y dos puestos en barra pero que en la parte exterior cuenta con dos amplias terrazas en las que puedes sentarte a disfrutar del ambiente cosmopolita en esta zona de Madrid. La carta está basada en la clásica oferta de productos para compartir como: jamón, queso, tortilla, salmón ahumado, en plato o tapas además de diferentes tipos de tostas acompañado de bebidas frías o calientes. Buen trato personal por parte de sus empleados.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAFjM1BuSmNrkjIi8jphUQW&fid=0x0:0x914d3ef810774652"],"When":"2025-12-17"},{"Name":"Taty Campos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVq8rLLhES5roOMszMNk-alSDDOU2lhjgq84jOOoXub_coSuYw4OA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Sentarse en la terraza es muy agradable, para tomarse algo, observar el entorno. Pero el camarero a cada instante viene presionando para que comas algo. Soy vegana y alérgica al gluten, hay poquísimas opciones para comer, unicamente la ensalada de tomate sin ventresca.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBJqrsBOqTpP6Mxx4GTCSCT&fid=0x0:0x914d3ef810774652"],"When":"2025-8-29"},{"Name":"Javi Sanchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIwZqHaHGJFHU38cxZoeDSC-tFJFvIPvM0Gtc699NVMC-2Z-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Nuestra experiencia fue bastante mala. Tanto a mí como a mi pareja nos atendieron de forma poco agradable. Al pedir la bebida, la mujer que nos atendió nos cobró al instante sin mostrarnos el desglose del precio, simplemente diciendo el total, y ni siquiera nos dejó recibir lo que habíamos pedido antes de pagar.

Además, cuando notamos que faltaban 10 céntimos de cambio, no fue por la cantidad en sí, sino por el gesto y porque sentimos que se hacía la desentendida. Esa actitud nos dejó una impresión muy negativa. En general, la atención nos pareció poco profesional y no salimos nada contentos. No pensamos volver.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jaume Casals","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW4N9OkSJ-NrV2TR8OqOFILMoR0lgMgdCwkjjI4U0Gfw5QpRJk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Es una auténtica locura sus precios, hemos desayunado tres personas, casi 40€ 3 bocadillos de jamón, 1 cola, 1 café con leche. Te ofrece unos churros de cortesía y te los cobra. Una vergüenza!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"José Manuel B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJCIVCZP8b-bIHxIwN_f6XtdMo1TrIVvOQo8ve1jYhlKLVMA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Septiembre 2024

La terraza es muy agradable, pero con unos toldos negros que aunque te dan sombra absorben calor
La tortilla recalentada a microondas y como las de supermercado y el pan chicloso
Con el café te ponen una minimagdalena que está bien
Precio caro, café y pincho 6,50€","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICH3IT5MA&fid=0x0:0x914d3ef810774652"],"When":"2024-9-2"},{"Name":"db","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVGH4c8ssRqKWAa32Y3R4RS_tzYRBAs7y68AAuEh0fmmtX2Z-OB7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"3,5 ⭐️ Pequeño bar - tapería en la zona peatonal de la calle Fuencarral (una de las más transitadas de Madrid) pero con numerosas mesas en terraza que, con buen tiempo, se suele llenar. Cerveza bien tirada y vinos a su temperatura correcta acompañados siempre de aperitivo. De comida no ofrecen nada espectacular y los precios son exigentes, aunque tienen buen jamón.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJnJG42QE&fid=0x0:0x914d3ef810774652"],"When":"2023-6-22"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Anon Nymous","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ9z8twgRU9gmqyZWg05LVbGj-8-CrtrE6y3TKjba0rdiy1dg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yoga is not something I practice regularly; this didn’t matter at Casa Kavi, a wonderfully welcoming crowd, a brilliant instructor, a beautiful space: calming and yet engaging.  Really lovely social vibes after class too.  I cannot recommend Casa Kavi enough to experts and beginners alike.  Is this the best Yoga in the wonderful city of Madrid?  Resounding yes from me.  Try it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAARPSZDutseZ_gJSHxvriy&fid=0x0:0xcd429f06f9dd9faf"],"When":"2025-7-12"},{"Name":"Tiphaine Ollivier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLaWzh83jQP01Pe4CHm167KCRpNiewMJk_6OxKG3gNbkFoTEvm7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I'm not usually much of a yoga person, but this studio really surprised me, it's so much more than just yoga! First : the studio itself is absolutely beautiful, it's thoughtfully designed, with no hard corners, everything is round and smooth, it's such a cozy place.  Then : the classes... they are clearly very carefully selected, you can feel that the aim of this studio is to support ones well-being on different levels and to bring kind, like-minded people together. I used the trial-week pass to try out a variety of classes: dance flow, kundalini, movement & strength, theatre & creativity. And... I loved it! I’ll definitely be back! The environment they've created is warm, positive, and inspiring. Highly recommend checking it out!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBPiVC_aMROT5wqIkgj8Wrf&fid=0x0:0xcd429f06f9dd9faf"],"When":"2025-6-15"},{"Name":"Daniel Prandi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIBYfWF55YGbmt54p1FZUGImFGDH_1ICmuShhCdNk0BT36J2A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Traveling regularly for work, I find it hard to find yoga studios where I feel welcome and comfortable, in a relaxed environment that also meets the standards of my yoga practice. Arriving in new cities can feel challenging, especially when you’re trying to find the right place and you’re not a familiar face. I don’t love feeling like the new one in the room, or like visitors don’t really feel included.

Casa Kavi has become, over the last year, my go to studio every time I’m in Madrid. The attention to detail in the space, and the care from the instructors and staff, is genuinely amazing!
Classes are taught with clarity and respect, with options that make it accessible for every level without watering it down. I’ve also met many international people there, which adds to the feeling of connection :)

Every time I’ve gone, I’ve joined workshops or classes it’s always been a great experience. I would absolutely recommend it to anyone local to Madrid or visiting. You’ll find a welcoming, low key atmosphere and a clear respect for what a good yoga practice really is. You can tell they care.

I’m really looking forward to many more visits to Casa Kavi <3","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Iοanna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5pV1i2Yaj3F0U4VujPGdOz4PTZh6fIat6a8slVBsz0JiZig=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I visited this yoga studio while on vacation and had a great experience. I joined a meditation and holistic vinyasa class with Angela, and it was very calming and well guided. The space felt peaceful and welcoming. I left feeling relaxed and refreshed. If I’m ever in Madrid again, I will definitely come back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Charlotte Carey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUb16CCjmmw8rMte3peqrWjLVAd5p5wJE8KfyWg0BBFfWAt3uJE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the most beautiful yoga studio I have ever been to!

A really really special place that is perfect for taking you out of the hustle and bustle of  city life and transporting you somewhere else without even having to get on a plane. For me it felt like a little holiday.

I took a vinyasa class and the teacher was great! The teaching is top notch!

The facilities and studio are beautiful and there is a really lovely cafe serving up excellent coffee and snacks so after your class you can hang out with those who took the class too!

I can’t wait too go back again! Loved it!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anna Kachur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7yPT5UlaM6U-da1dVcac6OOoDIBNmhAR3OCSVlcXQUr-Y6APUtw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing oasis in the center of the city. I took vinyasa class with Angela, a pilates class with Soraya (was my fifth class ever and first time mat pilates), and Hatha & Fashia flossing with Synnove. The teachers all have their unique teaching style, very open and friendly. And bilingual which made it so much easier for me. The atmosphere is very meditative so you connect to your body fully. Thank you 🤗💛","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"sadaf m","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVT-5fwDupABKZKNt7Fk8RtzJUyVbm9d9EWAwCqFplXnj5yRVbxg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I stumbled here on my recent trip to Madrid, and I’m so grateful I did. The owner, Kathi, is an inspiring entrepreneur who has created a magical space: a beautiful Yoga/Pilates studio, meditation room, and cafe. The vibe is calming, grounded, and full of intention. You can feel the love and care that’s gone into every detail.

Casa Kavi feels like an inhale and exhale in physical form. Whether you’re looking to move your body, calm your mind, or just take a coffee break, it’s all welcome here. If I lived in Madrid, I’d be a regular :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBBsoXJIFJcqggoqvI5cXrD&fid=0x0:0xcd429f06f9dd9faf"],"When":"2025-8-8"},{"Name":"Dibya Chuke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlBbkHUgBw6S3nkzAR6OwGXJZ3Gip8_kaSKhnOv1ngQKD_G2Ls=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Studio that evokes spiritual tranquility! [{"Name":"Jakub M Ochab","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWeOsgMckABLzCjQG-D7kanzxb_tm5gLRx84U6XGHKPXlPU4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La Mexicana offers a delightful coffee experience with its delicious brews and exceptional service. The great atmosphere makes it the perfect spot to savour your cup of coffee. Their extensive selection of coffees allows you to enjoy your favourite blend at home, ensuring the quality and taste you love. Whether you're stopping by for a quick pick-me-up or browsing their offerings to enjoy later, La Mexicana delivers both great coffee and a warm, inviting ambiance.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICj77HzDw&fid=0x0:0xfc33a6daff7f53df"],"When":"2024-4-27"},{"Name":"Julian Gomez Castellanos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIMINbqGcbpmXgLdTBK-FE_ninpjinojHZYR2srOafr7RW9YuLE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Café La Mexicana…as a local is one of the best ways to start my day!  This cafe has been in existence for 130 years and prides themselves in selecting the best coffee beans around the world. They have a wide selection of high quality coffee beans at very competitive prices.

Also, La Ventanita is a great concept and it reminds me of Miami and Latin America where you can order your coffee and drink it outside if you’re in a rush.

Susana and team are very welcoming and extremely professional!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICj7YKulQE&fid=0x0:0xfc33a6daff7f53df"],"When":"2024-4-24"},{"Name":"Alberto C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3nPIUmjdvmWxGwX69tQjcrmoxzapjYTIUTOoB9whIm7FKi1Vj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Top chain. [{"Name":"Mike Evans","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKQeXXJz75Wr7J52m73hyovmTqg0AnNKyzCDtmLVOULNdMAtw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This place is great for COFFEE. It’s good quality and various options and they know how to make a cappuccino.
It’s a different case for food.  The menu is limited but regular, however the preparation is a little below par. The taste is good, it’s not bland. Maybe I was unlucky because my eggs on their version of what is essentially eggs Benedict were rather undercooked. I’m not a fan of transparency in my eggs.

So overall, nice atmosphere, good attentive and kind staff, great coffee, average food based on this visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCRwnzxfCjHoawllkGClWi9&fid=0x0:0x131a755e98447985"],"When":"2025-10-28"},{"Name":"Pixie Tomacruz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXaqMvziiktx0rAlI3KEvqfIMfPfZUtenXSkBVTx8uD-IFONtam=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"my fav coffee shop in Madrid. very quaint and warm atmosphere, and they always play great music. the employees here are very sweet! i got an oat milk latte and their salmon and ricotta toast, and both were phenomenal. a great place to sit and journal, or spend time with loved ones over a wonderful drink!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBoqtRCYhVdSDN_1yBkHzFP&fid=0x0:0x131a755e98447985"],"When":"2025-9-28"},{"Name":"Sarah Cook","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGTBmUAzI1pwwFqYdQ7_H_hacBZ-YB63zIiRvyZx1SVukQQ2Ug=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great coffee, lovely atmosphere! We came here for our first breakfast in Madrid and it set the bar quite high.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAJA5uM4EY7hls5uj3EEhWG&fid=0x0:0x131a755e98447985"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Joe Purnell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSaart9FSW7mtEICJHcaRZUamsxPJTigzLLjxAWc6gzrW_VK01=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good coffee - better than most in Madrid. Also not overpriced. I didn't try and food but the menu looked good. The environment is well thought out with different types of seating, and they actually have comfy chairs unlike a lot of the hipster cafes! I like the decor style and it's not too loud even when full.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Eduardo Rodrigues","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUdEhov0moGlMkVdtKrfaTQxGpg7ANyV_Sbo4MeVRut4kky7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very good specialty coffee and they also have Brigadeiro, a Brazilian chocolate ball that goes really well with an espresso.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA9BE81Ruo4BTCmqrz2Gz6i&fid=0x0:0x131a755e98447985"],"When":"2025-7-27"},{"Name":"Moshe C.Wollin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVwPan0rgU1mBdapNSaVZj3hAlKfY2r3BxLaumFvkPirTe-hIfyJg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We came to Madrid for 2 month and we start all our mornings at Nuna. Arturo, the owner is very friendly, the Peruan coffee is excellent as well as the pastries, sandwiches & brunch. Best cafe in Camberi.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICvsLuq1gE&fid=0x0:0x131a755e98447985"],"When":"2024-12-7"},{"Name":"Joanne cheung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlO32MPt5_OSHNHUBIaucSojMTZ0kACxzhlvPFPqxxmCcX1vCh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Always enjoy coming to this cafe whenever I’m in the neighborhood. They are truly passionate about their coffee, and explore in depth. The coffee here is obviously great, but more importantly it’s a really warm cozy place that people can relax. They have special events occasionally and managed to meet some incredible people here too","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daniel Silva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWl0mLhcR48OBRA8PSqTBe-JTjT39m4BdnClItjrx6-yoRz6tsq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"AMAZING COFFEE. Super chilled vibe.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAb3JiZBPIXIyiMGVSLV4Ga&fid=0x0:0x131a755e98447985"],"When":"2026-2-22"}]

Sin embargo, la última vez recibimos una indirecta bastante pasivoagresiva del camarero. Entiendo cansancio y agotamiento, pero no paso la mala educación. Ya no les molesto más, tranquilos. Buenas suerte.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luis Parres","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItQh2EkZXxMCJx69Z907gnCF43pVIVPFKDfz7jjK7Qsm48mA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Bar de los de toda la vida. No falla. Servicio en barra, caña bien tirada y tapa con colesterol. El camarero muy agradable.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pau W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLET2Z56gj1SWUveCPiBCXkh5Gbe1T0N-xA2hAq4KCklIbXH6e3g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hace un año exactamente hice una publicación diciendo que el señor fue muy amable cuando tomé un café aquí. No pensé que con el tiempo terminaría pasando gran parte de mis días en San Bernardo, disfrutando de un café o una copa en este bar.

Hoy en día, disfruto mucho compartir momentos con mis amistades en este lugar. La atención es excelente, tanto por parte del dueño, Manolo, como de su camarero, Ángel. ¡Los felicito de corazón!

Es un sitio limpio, con buena variedad de tapas, excelentes opciones de vino y un café americano bien preparado.

¡Gracias, chicos!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEL3OuL2C_p6yOQ&fid=0x0:0x2c023102c0a0e22c"],"When":"2025-5-31"},{"Name":"LP","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLT3SoE3kYMzq7zgM_s0lBMm7vMD2U3stDxumRrjfKVVPAu8g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Muy buenos precios, este bar es lo bueno que tiene calidad-precio, ojalá no lo cambie nunca. [{"Name":"Sydney Stelly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVwh2zTHY7UQgR0s3UvRQsQoJob7AEb2Bn9zjGjpAFfzvp5anvNPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My favorite coffee shop in Madrid. I wish they had something like it in Bilbao. There is always old music playing and it is so cozy. It’s one of the few coffee shops in Madrid that has character and doesn’t feel like an influencer zone. The owner is very friendly and patient. I can’t wait to come back","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBmo9aEKnA5FN9lD4_X7_dj&fid=0x0:0xb2a5a257a8a6ff49"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"cookie Cutter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0TncydC8EJoV5aNZe09pmjXSNdqIpcAMIj005qRCUqu5wsYU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Awesome place to go and have a nice coffee brunch or anything. Perfect place for esthetic photos as well and cute moments.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Garth Headley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLni7lUwPQaSrHBlDuzFeLsfu_i5u3LfHu76nF5GTYqH9azuA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Simply delightfully perfect spot for a slow morning that turns into a slow afternoon. Service kind and charming but efficient.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOvmi5G01KD2rwE&fid=0x0:0xb2a5a257a8a6ff49"],"When":"2025-5-20"},{"Name":"Victoria Gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6Jg5hvuOUC9TabNgjSAWK8Plr5xeglyu4bcgdjXPRcvp8svJe=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I guess you could say my friends and I are regulars - Cafe Miau is always the highlight of my week and I’m always excited to go back!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDlguOlDQ&fid=0x0:0xb2a5a257a8a6ff49"],"When":"2023-11-30"},{"Name":"I-Hsuan Liu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlyVRcrRXyDdTEtPqSKyj5aNGzmPzj4P2NjOH8DOQwn3aE4KdA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A fine little coffee shop that is Chewie friendly. [{"Name":"Ewama","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNSK3lee_LTHpKqJoqSezCCCn_KyqeMzAy3-54dvWM1OFbhJ94=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Been wanting to go there for a while and we eventually went for an event my partner found online. From the hand of Ketel One, we could truly enjoy that nights theme which, was espresso martini night.

Honestly very very good experience and would repeat !!! Besides this I will also try and go to the TOMA cafe itself as I have gotten very good feedback of their wines and vinyl bar 😋","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwv-fuwAE&fid=0x0:0x7238dcc4a9cb76d9"],"When":"2025-3-22"},{"Name":"Justas Bernotas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI28zdl9rP3JKsd0TXSO1Ojqfo9ysvFLFeC_0muVm3gV0npLQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Toma Café is a hidden gem in the heart of the city. As a coffee lover, this place truly impressed me with its unique concept.

The coffee at Toma is exceptional. The aroma, the flavor, and the presentation are all top-notch. They use high-quality beans and expert brewing techniques to deliver a perfect cup of joe every time. The baristas are friendly and knowledgeable, and they take pride in their craft (the cashier didn’t speack english, so she had to get some help from the barista).

The interior of the café is stylish and cozy, with a cool vintage vibe. The seating is comfortable.

The customer service is good, and the staff is friendly and attentive. They are happy to recommend coffee based on your preferences.

If you're a coffee lover Toma Café is a must-visit. The perfect blend of coffee and music creates a unique and memorable experience that will keep you coming back for more.

Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDRpIiwew&fid=0x0:0x7238dcc4a9cb76d9"],"When":"2023-4-18"},{"Name":"Ahmed Fawzy Elaraby","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGgAiw1bfurNvp3m6oKHE2uyRyGHhwgbkQ0bNDULfk03e_oJdk7A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had there the best coffee I had in Madrid so far. I tried Orange Capuchino (first time to find it in Madrid) and it was perfect. The coffee is not over roasted. The flavor of the orange is just enhancing the the coffee flavor overall.

Update: I really liked the coffee there that I went to buy coffee as a gift.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIClxvyHhQE&fid=0x0:0x7238dcc4a9cb76d9"],"When":"2023-11-17"},{"Name":"刘俊清","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUrNchjBx0aaN2jpVgv4u1UQO63sg7ht2rIyUCbUipra5yVK-jY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great natural wine selection, the very best coffee and music. Just a place you can stay and relax and don’t want to leave","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDq-PDXeQ&fid=0x0:0x7238dcc4a9cb76d9"],"When":"2021-6-28"},{"Name":"Sanath Kashyap","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJr0EZiTKVeD-5i7xHCZ8_gDnIRU5tESHr-T61vY1OKgrlz_P9xQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to enjoy some good music and good conversations. I would recommend coming here early if you want to get a seat. It's a small place and tends to fill up quickly. But the vibes are unmatched.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ollie Curtis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXEKXFR1AMkHOb69qwdLxzCVOC60zh-BfqM11knhQ2IycWeeE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The wines are stupendous and well priced. The vibe, immaculate, the host Juan was outrageously hospitable. 5 stars, loved it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kailey Ransom","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJfBSicdfWHhp4wTqRPLB6oQP4ixWusuRR1diDPLMnzvl-oPA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is one of my favorite coffee shops in Madrid! The avocado toast is fantastic! And they have gluten-free bread as well. I used to come here at least once a week just for the avocado toast. The coffee shop has an overall cool vibe as well with some laptop-free tables, but some tables you can work at as well.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James Stevenson-Cotton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVwif2r81flQVpl53fWTapksBv59LNz5wJl6CupFm-cTRYUuTPQqw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I'd avoid if you want a decent glass of wine. All are natural (usually meaning quality levels are low). I tasted 4 different wines here and some of them were the nastiest wines I have ever tried. Uncomfortable seating too. I like the effort, but why natural wines? If it is about sustainability then there are plenty of sustainable wines out there that are actually delicious. I won't be back, which is a shame.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Pedí uno normal sin que fuera a la plancha y creo que es por que los deja muy dorador por lo que la "corteza" queda dura y se cae la mitad del croissant al plato...que recoges las migas y te las comes, pero yo creo q si lo hornearan 1-2 minutos menos ganarian bastante. Y la atención fue buena.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBmRfQi8t-mwdDs1vMx9ukI&fid=0x0:0x800e977cf46d6612"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"Alejandro Carpinteyro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvy5hALAT5VZpiEZu-Twtn60iuJz_A0Y5IU8DAiZuzv-Rw7Sw6=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"El día de ayer, yo tenía 30 minutos después de haber acabado mi café y mi galleta estaba trabajando un rato mi compu, cuando de repente el gerente de la tienda me pidió que me fuera porque ya se estaba llenando el restaurant

Hasta eso todo entendible

Pero había mesas que llevaban más de tres horas, que claramente eran de la misma nacionalidad del restaurante

Yo soy visitante, vengo de México, entonces siendo sinceros era el único de tes morena y además a el gerente yo lo había visto atender esas mesas y cuando me dijo yo le dije “ hay personas que han estado más tiempo que yo, no crees que es justo pedirle a ellos que se vayan?”

Me dijo que no había visto y que por favor me retirara","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBvMb8xzI6Xvf9VQ1ptlhQx&fid=0x0:0x800e977cf46d6612"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"juliaccavia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-UFga9ommlGge2k9_OkDEtBq1SSByulJ6-xEc0uNx6FV7YeOG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hemos venido a desayunar y ha sido una buena experiencia. user_reviews: [{"Name":"María Clara Largacha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2jCvbngkFpwHnaFygfVnR1s0O2SXjzLxkleg4tiEMXv82I_dhMA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nino Ferreira is a great spot in Madrid with Portuguese owners putting their own twist on Galician cuisine. The place has a local and authentic feel, making it a great find for anyone craving traditional flavors. I’d definitely recommend the pulpo a la gallega, perfectly cooked and seasoned, and the meat with fries, which was a standout dish. The atmosphere is cozy, and the food feels homemade in the best way. [{"Name":"Jordan Miller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK2dXoAGbDdFXiDSHhvsrNxiYC-cuk7dJF8Z3V3ai8nTQgQEg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A new gem in Chamberi mixing specialty coffee, Chinese tea and minimalist design that totally works. Their menu is super unique (though I wasn’t fan of their popular eggs toast), but you can tell they care about details. The vibe, music were amazing especially for those who want a spot to chill, read or use it as a cozy coworking space.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD1su2XSAQdtnvxtImMwd4B&fid=0x0:0x788b63fbb16d4d84"],"When":"2025-10-14"},{"Name":"Evan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3stz6TPpRlEtkamdF33adQZQBkXVxe2dzveqd9pl0ylW9_PA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This newly opened café offers specialty coffee, baked treats, and light brunch options. The interior is simple yet inviting, with white tones, bare walls, and a personal, cozy charm. The owner and staff are warm and attentive, welcoming guests with a glass of water upon arrival.

We ordered an Iced Latte, Iced Matcha Latte, and a Financier. The coffee was well-balanced, the matcha had a bold and authentic flavor, and the Financier was soft and moist—pleasantly sponge-like without being dry. Most drinks and pastries are priced between 3 EUR and 5 EUR, which is quite fair considering the quality.

It’s a lovely stop if you’re in the area. Though seating is somewhat limited, the space feels open and relaxed. For the best experience, I’d suggest visiting during quieter hours to fully enjoy the peaceful atmosphere.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKeFgOjh3Kqzew&fid=0x0:0x788b63fbb16d4d84"],"When":"2025-6-2"},{"Name":"Samar Al Hashimi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIjYbyxmkfVgyrE4PnDb97uHzuA2SJppxvCrbYaU909kSa7tg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A hidden gem in the heart of Madrid.
This coffee shop is so much more than just a place to grab a great cup of coffee — it’s a full sensory and cultural experience. Every corner is beautifully decorated with incredible attention to detail, transporting you straight into the heart of China. The atmosphere, the service, and the flavors are all exceptional. Can’t wait to come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_61aXVw91a3VVoj-5OLwy&fid=0x0:0x788b63fbb16d4d84"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Sophie Rupp","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-FnIiLEoMTPdQgH1kptbRWQbPYoYhsfhBPEBV7toDudAXBw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been to this cafe about every week since it opened and I would give it 6 stars if I could! I personally am getting wary of overly “aesthetic” cafes in Madrid where the focus is getting in, getting an aesthetic picture of a watered down matcha for Instagram/tiktok, and then getting out. This is NOT one of those places, as the quality of the atmosphere mirrors the high quality of the food and drinks. The matcha is real fresh matcha and the baristas take extra care to make sure it’s made correctly, weighing out the grams and using the correct mixing technique with the chasen (whisk). Here you will not find fake matcha pre-mixes. It is without a doubt the best matcha in Madrid in terms of quality and flavor. Their hojicha lattes are also incredible (same here, the baristas know the correct way to prepare them). The food and desserts are flavorful and fresh. The staff is so friendly and will help you if you don’t know what to order. The ambience is very cool and inviting with a great mix of modern meets timeless antique. The attention to detail to all the aesthetic elements (cool art, vintage chairs, interesting light fixtures, even the light switches in the bathroom are cool!) makes you feel like you’re somewhere luxurious. It’s a great place to have a long talk with a friend or work with a laptop in a peaceful atmosphere. You can sit on the terrace or inside. If you’re wondering whether you should go here, the answer is YES!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKuGwoq5pNXujwE&fid=0x0:0x788b63fbb16d4d84"],"When":"2025-6-6"},{"Name":"Olena Zhukova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhSSG4HghqUFi_mWFB4hGxTrUeY5O05dQcxGQxPBprptELmoW0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is literally my fav coffee place in Madrid and I’m a big fan of visiting different places!
The interior design, the idea, coffee/matcha , desserts and everything is just superb!
Love their pain au chocolate! Definitely must-visit place for everyone in Madrid!
* every time someone comes to visit me in madrid , the first place I take them to is Jinping E Hijo","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA9APnh4l9OymhjlLjSQ3Lz&fid=0x0:0x788b63fbb16d4d84"],"When":"2025-7-11"},{"Name":"Ashley Vega","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJbkraCifuf5FwjZQRJRAtr9yokFQv7-c-qodnkhSdDwPYTjQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came across this coffee shop on TikTok and gave it a try. I can say that the aesthetic and ambiance is beautiful. The service was great. And the matcha was amazing!! Best matcha I’ve ever had. The almond croissant was delicious as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDo9fD-uAE&fid=0x0:0x788b63fbb16d4d84"],"When":"2025-4-27"},{"Name":"Aruzhan Konyrbay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvLthByDe6gYucEVcAwYiQbARFsX33gkL8N9suldHvjG0_tDZn=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had hard time searching for good matcha in Madrid and jingping matcha did not disappoint!! It had a smooth matcha flavour and the honey syrup compliment the tea. I wish for less ice because it did melted fast and diluted the drink. But overall price- quality is good. The interior is cute and the barista was really sweet","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAwoWD_aY5HyBikDCUFAQDM&fid=0x0:0x788b63fbb16d4d84"],"When":"2025-9-9"},{"Name":"Lena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKTrV-s_bM_FeIxVx4ToNjZIgTWqy_R0TqNBLZ5LwAu81tZLTPow=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jinping E Hijo is totally worth the hype. Their matcha is one of the best I’ve had in Madrid, and the coffee never disappoints either. The welcoming atmosphere and great seating options keep me coming back. Highly recommend! 🍵","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEODVpI30s7mTIg&fid=0x0:0x788b63fbb16d4d84"],"When":"2025-5-26"}]

There were a few that were open but didn’t look appealing. We eventually stumbled upon La Golondrina. The waiter/owner spoke only Spanish, no English. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Elena sofia Franzosi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhADSx0ilhDhX0HyNbYt2fCxaZiOCr_-RCHmSK3Tqq3zaiXkDt=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience doing some smart working here. The upstairs area is specifically dedicated to people who want to study or work, which makes it quiet, comfortable, and perfect to stay focused for a few hours.

The atmosphere is cozy, the food is delicious, and the drinks are just as good. I would absolutely recommend this place if you’re looking for a nice spot to work or study while enjoying great quality.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD9unc7out1LPl9aHrOrvO9&fid=0x0:0x15279b0481db7f1b"],"When":"2026-2-14"},{"Name":"Nati","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXenLgIdMJD6V8rf3H99PdOVRZKi7ChH-17vj_R9uQstGKIpxc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My roommates and I love GOD and are here all the time. The coffee is some of our favorite in Madrid, especially the cappuccinos & cortados, and the atmosphere is warm and welcoming. The staff are always kind, and it’s one of the few cafés where you can comfortably sit without feeling rushed. It really feels like a neighborhood spot, and we’re so grateful to have it so close to our home and also the ability to study there as well:)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA0g1MnYb2_w-0d0LYK3nll&fid=0x0:0x15279b0481db7f1b"],"When":"2026-1-18"},{"Name":"Ziara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUymTPA7YTW7GwZTMxsaNNhYF_wiibB7zkShwJBdrE72p6jNI0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I visited over 10 cafés during my two-week stay in Madrid, but this one stood out – I just wish I had found it earlier! The vibe is so warm and relaxed, perfect for being alone, with friends, or family. The Americano was the best I had, the burrata salad was perfect, and the service was always kind. I spent several days here working, studying, and even drawing. I really love the whole café concept – the atmosphere, design, and spirit. If I ever come back to Spain, I’ll definitely come here again. ❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENvlru7ax_nvMg&fid=0x0:0x15279b0481db7f1b"],"When":"2025-5-28"},{"Name":"Arielle sturk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJqFKQH74DvVJhdmxJ7Q_8Hw2i_EzFGZJi235gsLkC7eHY72A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worst customer service EVER. I wait in line to order and after I order the lady working said “oh if you’re going work here you can only work upstairs so you need to check if it’s full” I said ok no worries, I go and put my bag down upstairs and go to the counter because she was in the middle of my order. A big group comes in and she keeps ignoring me off to the side so then I asked her “excuse me would you like me to get in the back of the line” she said with an attitude “is your stuff on the couch?”I said yes, she said “you can’t work on the couch upstairs there’s signs everywhere I don’t need to tell you that” which she should have told me that to begin with after I put my stuff up there (it was very obviously it was my first time there). It was her attitude and how she acted like I shouldn’t even be in this coffee shop, the disrespect and not wanting to serve me was crazy!! You guys really need to work on how you treat people. My first time there and as of now my last!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Savannah W.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUyr8WTLMHJ5qYXt0W-LBxU5GOjbdaUwuOOgErfJ4Exw1OxQ4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"☕️I got a vanilla latte - lovely, plus it can be difficult to find flavored lattes in Madrid
🥐variety of food options that looked yummy, but I didn’t try any
🖤cool vibes & good music
🪑plenty of seating - two floors
💻laptop-friendly tables on the second floor - very popular, would be a great place to work for a couple hours if you snagged a spot","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maya Florian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAxKQb6PHl7lBfApssgYfMmGeEE93NecYLVUjejYdlOPMCpIwW=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Terrible experience.
At first everything was fine. Then we were rudely told to move because “laptops aren’t allowed downstairs,” even though we weren’t using laptops at all. On top of that, we were told that even the way we were studying/working wasn’t okay — which makes absolutely no sense. So studying is not allowed either now?

What makes it worse: the person sitting right next to us was actually using a laptop downstairs, at a table where laptops are supposedly not allowed, and nobody said anything.

Upstairs was cold and uncomfortable, with unstable tables and chairs, despite a 25€ minimum consumption.

The coffee was awful (and I drink specialty coffee): extremely bitter, badly made foam. The chai latte was basically water.

Rude staff, terrible attitude. Never coming back. Not recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carlos Rubio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUHsDdHkmXEwbmd9Ah0kXIzlHCy5s-EJ9KT0KS6YlcwVXDfXeg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best in the area for sure. Staff super friendly and vibes couldn’t be better","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBRHaahlAAFQuUDjqqmCsfM&fid=0x0:0x15279b0481db7f1b"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Dora O'Donnell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSpsMR4xySRuvdQLQwR2S4ewCB8Fe5x8l3akXFbkKJ8j0P1Nk-cg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our coffees and food were so good (avocado and tomato toasts). The atmosphere is vibey and fun, we hung out for a while. It seemed like there were a lot of people studying and hanging.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENqu6pX_s-LkMg&fid=0x0:0x15279b0481db7f1b"],"When":"2025-5-22"}]

[{"Name":"Maija Keil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLMRy3LVgpnTH2p8TAjOMxxwxJEsDiOFh2h-aQMPV3I9sJ8Qgha=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came here for a Saturday coffee and study session with a friend and we really enjoyed the atmosphere. I ordered an iced latte and una tostada con tomate, both tasty. I really appreciated the interior design, everything from the art on the walls to the plate my food was served on, was cool and thought-out. The music was good too. It is laptop-friendly, but we did get kicked off our table in a bit of a rude way when it “got too busy and they needed the tables,” but no one actually ended up sitting at our initial table and we were shoved in the back on an uncomfortable high table.
Great atmosphere and vibe though, would recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAeU05WKysH163FFqgcvAwO&fid=0x0:0x75a6064a16601665"],"When":"2025-10-20"},{"Name":"Jessica Bello Salguero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjf3k_eq67JiyzvMCplcIKm_dc9S8kBYqfrvEsScxxHPWqrFPlOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I really appreciate the answer by the cafe to explain why I was unlucky with the food. Great to see places listen to customers which is not always the case. Unfortunately I will not be able to visit this month to share about the food. Once I do, I will update the review.

I reiterate the service was very good. The barrister was very friendly and professional. I also liked the decoration of the place, minimalist and with style. It was comfortable to work from there. Ideally prices could be adjusted (I prefer when cafes charge the same for any milk). The toilet and the soap could also be improved","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQ2J7Gfw&fid=0x0:0x75a6064a16601665"],"When":"2025-3-1"},{"Name":"Alicia P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVKK6ndByQpDCnSd35Pa_SWe-T3ztE6BRZWzxIzcwWVbkQz47s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a cute coffee place! El menú está bien, bastante normal, con comida muy normal pero esta bueno.

Mi nota negativa es por el servicio que dan. Da igual el día que vayas que siempre te recibirán con malas caras. Da la sensación de que siempre están de mal humor. El último día hasta me quitaron el menú de la cara de malas formas mientas lo estaba mirando…

No lo recomiendo teniendo otros restaurantes mejores y con mejor trato en las inmediaciones.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDR_9Lq9QE&fid=0x0:0xe88bb431f676362a"],"When":"2023-5-7"},{"Name":"Angie Angie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ4QY8qoQT15EcShosxKa-u28zaO8htyB70tk6AfwlXTxgiKg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Pésimo desde el servicio hasta la cara de las camareras que les llega al suelo. Vamos que da gusto entrar allí para salir con disgusto. Con la misma mano que cobra y recibe los cacharros sucios la mete en la caja de las patatas y te las sirve así sin más. Te acomodas en un sitio a tomar tu bebida y te empotran los platos sucios de las mesas habiendo más espacio en la barra. Vaya que íbamos a comer pero se nos quitaron las ganas de la “buena vibra “","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juan Gabriel Robayo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMZYpdNYgHaEk1Hc2d286wF5nJQrdlmLwJGTeKKRKU-AQ5g9PN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La mejor tortilla de patata del barrio el trato es agradable pero hay que ser inteligente para entender el rollo familiar del sitio no se fíen de los comentarios de otras reseñas el sitio siempre está organizado y limpio y las chicas que atienden son muy agradable y por cierto no necesitan ser familiares del dueño por son ellas la dueñas así que mucho respeto con los comentarios.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"HELENA CARVAJAL GONZALEZ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgtYKWAYhBY1yxPAP1NF-khwwrPQdXV5rUG5Lgvq9XhqEm0m5g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"El único atractivo de este bar eran las tapas que ponían con la bebida pues las camareras son super desagradables y siempre parece que están molestas. Ahora que ya no está el señor de pelo blanco ponen patatas fritas de bolsa así que no tiene sentido volver","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Antonio Heredia Morante","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUk5fAVR2xr35trchwU6CeyBZmpojmPv6iKDoX-P8dooXoF_Anh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cervecería de toda la vida, buen ambiente, buena calidad","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leonardo P.M.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWELrGNWeVroaZyl63W2aS31mLUYRdIBbKXY2C74Aj9qwoNS7Ad=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"La camarera joven con tatuajes te pone caras muy desagradables, piensa que te está haciendo un favor por atenderte. Es incomodo para el resto.

Parece que no se dan cuenta que la atención al cliente es importante en este sector... Por todo lo demas, bien .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alberto Lorente","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV1may_K_FkyOkozJs41XBvkbuE8z70nmLhUtHDGGip-JR66PzHbg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Buen menu del dia.  sencillo y bueno","Images":null,"When":""}]
