[{"Name":"Damian Górecki","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjWLDRXc1JuFSMvpNelNtyYTDZLUXwEbiWO7Hy3jWNppmZUNnL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It's an interesting place, I like the concept of an open kitchen. Unfortunately, the staff didn't speak English, so communication was minimal. But that's ok, coffee is a universal language ;) Breakfast was simple but tasty. The batch brew coffee was good, but it's a shame they didn't offer pour over. Only hojicha was average. Well, I drank better, even at home. Overall, it's a cozy place, good when you're in the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDGO7G3wK99CzsUnuXUdn8I&fid=0x0:0x46e43714f833e192"],"When":"2026-2-18"},{"Name":"Anastasia Yevtushenko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeaueEG_uLlj8eUjWcyUq9MR7pj1n_PcxuF75ybQCym2R_14YTvA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I didn’t really like the ice latte because it was too bitter for my taste. But the carrot cake was tasty!

The barista wasn’t friendly but in general I liked the vibe of this place. And the music was nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCJapfVuIrQ8RvvqzUAH3W6&fid=0x0:0x46e43714f833e192"],"When":"2026-2-22"},{"Name":"Olena Zhukova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhSSG4HghqUFi_mWFB4hGxTrUeY5O05dQcxGQxPBprptELmoW0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"spent a rainy morning here, and it couldn’t have been a better choice. The ambience is warm and peaceful — perfect for reading, meeting a friend, or just relaxing. And the coffee is truly top-tier. A place I’d happily return to and highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCiNIt3AvefP0akrlsNnGB1&fid=0x0:0x46e43714f833e192"],"When":"2026-2-3"},{"Name":"Janine Negrin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVKEZ3laaBympGpdCwX4h0q4jmKGPA2pT_eV9PFX4Ciyn495pNBeQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to stop for quality coffee and a toast. We loved the mocha orange. The matcha was fabulous too. The bread for the tomato toast is high quality. Friendly staff and perfect vibe.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA7HK1bnYJC6q-vJg2wLHT9&fid=0x0:0x46e43714f833e192"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Eric Cruz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRzx0OhbyJw0H7jexR7CqvUGAtflmQXK1FhAx3MDLhRxmeceg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice little bohemian find in Madrid’s Malasana district. Good coffee. Nice neighborhood feels. Creativity community Artist hangout. This must be the place. Love finding places like this.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBQ6W9lHoHN0-PUzeuctdao&fid=0x0:0x46e43714f833e192"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"Martin Ti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKI9UeXSNiPylX1fBMwVHUBmUEA9litKJrxcajOZDlcWU_SFA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious coffee & food and a beautiful cafe. The coffee machine is set up so you walk behind the bar. It feels like you’re walking into somebody’s living room. So you do feel at home.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD9vR89ZhNGTtb2EJo70VLQ&fid=0x0:0x46e43714f833e192"],"When":"2025-10-24"},{"Name":"Ohia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXmTFx5Xsc4Yedf08_kAuAubIDY-IKtUuZ1uRHEZD5Fw56FEDwz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"SUPPORT THIS BEAUTIFUL BUSINESS.

While visiting Madrid to see Chicho Trujillo, the bad-ass revolutionary Cumbia band from Chile, I happened upon this gorgeous cafe. After a quick “Que onda?”, conversation with the owner felt like we had known each other forever.

Everything about this place made me want to stay all day. The super smooth coffee, queer photography books, cinnamon rolls, eclectic cozy ambiance, 90s hits playing at the perfect volume, and witty bilingual conversations with the owner make this place more than inviting. It kinda felt like home.

Whether you live in the city or you’re just visiting take a minute to stop in and grab a cortado, or cafe con leche, or whatever your favorite caffeinated drink might be, you won’t regret it.

If possible bring cash. Support small businesses.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA9KifgphvZWe2H0cwf3zTv&fid=0x0:0x46e43714f833e192"],"When":"2025-7-16"},{"Name":"Gelo Petsvona","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLkT-pEJm2WFUVOh__yE0AURAx59esaN3Xe3HyZCfse6vl7Zw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Awesome little cafe, great for getting morning coffee, reasonably priced, good coffee. Interesting menu, we had three different toasts and they were all good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAuwx-zoZHh8bflOYnbMGrw&fid=0x0:0x46e43714f833e192"],"When":"2025-10-8"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Xabier Granja","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWDBDFY79QSrweqnDBGDgTlRL0DAkGQXKPseySaZAr3w6G4dTyVqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great coffee, likely the best bagels I’ve had in Madrid, and fair prices! This is the most NYC-style bagels I’ve found in Madrid, everything else just doesn’t compare. Staff were nice, you can get some work done or just hang out, and the place is chill. I’ll definitely come back and I recommend you try them out!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCVWyGv20l2bL9SkzcLoEt_&fid=0x0:0x2927f26810764dc4"],"When":"2025-12-11"},{"Name":"Lindsey Golden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlYP-4D7mExmvKnnF5eGg7ZhuG_JbNXj8C-kuu_HWDmMOpNgyT=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"WOW!! If you are traveling to Madrid and enjoy eating bagels, YOU NEED TO GO HERE!! I am currently visiting my boyfriend in Madrid and we decided to try Nopa Bagels this morning so I could get my bagel fix (I eat a bagel at least once a week). I got a plain bagel with chive cream cheese and my boyfriend ordered a bacon, egg, and cheese on an everything bagel. We were BLOWN away at how good the bagels tasted just by themselves. I mean ... just look at how beautiful the blisters are on my plain bagel for yourself! Gorgeous. The amazing taste and beautiful presentation was likely because they are sourdough bagels - like Apollo Bagels in Brooklyn, New York where people will wait in line for more than 30 minutes just for the delicious sourdough bagels. It all made sense when I met Nopa Bagel's owner and learned that he literally lived Brooklyn, NY for a long time! Nick was easily the friendliest restaurant owner I have met since arriving to Madrid and the atmosphere inside Nopa Bagel mirrored his hospitable demeanor. Further, as a testament to how good Nopa Bagel's food is, I believe I was the only tourist in the shop. It really seemed like a gem for locals and it will continue to be a gem for me. I can't wait to go back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhASyld7hejUA0kK5VlU2Icu&fid=0x0:0x2927f26810764dc4"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"Andy Cohen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7-l1UTqxdE31RVD5aulQz-Zn-l28rs5coaD_zM-zdKsOe6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I was ready to like these bagels, but they’re simply not good, and the sandwich preparation is poor.

I was drawn in by the beautiful blistering on the crust (this is usually a good sign that the dough has been properly fermented, allowing the bagel to develop its distinctive taste). However, the bagel I tried had a bready, unsatisfying texture: a bagel needs to be chewy! It should be a bit of work on your jaw, this bagel just fell apart like regular bread. This is the single most important feature of a bagel, and sadly they missed on it. Moreover, while the crust was beautiful, it was actually too crunchy rather than lightly crispy as it should be - this also messed with the texture.

My other big problem is the lack of sandwich making skills. Take a look at the picture of the pastrami sandwich. Verrrrrry little pastrami (the taste of which was also just okay). 90% of the sandwich is cabbage. If this happened in Brooklyn there would be riots.

Speaking of New York, i would not typically be so harsh if they weren’t charging New York prices. I come from a long line of NYC Jews, and I was looking for a little taste of home after moving here. Unfortunately the only familiar feeling I got was in my wallet.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCMBYdrBRS0QjVfe9rRJvqa&fid=0x0:0x2927f26810764dc4"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Alvaro Nunez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI9ua_z7YWGh8Oh8OFuREWO9vePa0qdoxnrJs-ZjYnCDjEsbg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After living over 10 years in NYC I have finally found a place in Madrid with bagels that are as great as the best places in NYC. I was so excited to see they had bagels with cream cheese and lox on the menu and it surprised me how delicious it was. They also offer an excellent barista coffee in a great chill atmosphere which rises the level of the experience. I will go back soon to try more products on the menu!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ross fitzgerald","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJba69iWZv8Wu30CIahyssWCrWpe-SG5roSX6Xkyq-P3QYDmg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Super friendly and helpful staff while also a buzzing atmosphere.

The bagels are sensational, we got turkey and the pastrami. The bagels themselves are made to perfection","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCVMmTbmPaTzlhCUjbEHOdH&fid=0x0:0x2927f26810764dc4"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Michael Simon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXoztomQr8vY5y2JQ5-dbZ44adoM4Tif2yfC10WlwCG5DAhl-FN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From a Brooklynite: This is an absolutely legit bagel and lox. Had a sesame bagel, the perfect crust and chew. The salmon both tasted amazing and had the right texture. So happy to find this in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBItKOJH_ZT249xrEhfHdmS&fid=0x0:0x2927f26810764dc4"],"When":"2025-12-6"},{"Name":"Anne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXu5FVk5svAcp4qfjYsX4hhWsdsLNDUeTneWkh_s27ckuyqH9az=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was my second time trying Nopa Bagels, and both times have been great. This time I ordered a Sunset Park Bagel (made with fresh scrambled eggs, cheese, and avocado) - the bagel was lightly crispy on the outside, and soft and chewy inside, the egg fresh and fluffly, and the combination of everything simply delicious. The coffee (latte) was good. The place is very comfortable - plenty of tables, and my friends and I sat and chatted for over an hour. It's also spotlessly clean. I also bought cinnamon rolls to bring home - they get those just right, too - tender, with the perfect combination of cinnamon and sweet (I do not like overly-sweet cinnamon rolls!). Definitely worth a visit, and I will be returning!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alhassan Migaybil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUWtI_TlxNHJfVWdYWZlWEq0XKe4bd8WvqBNzDls0zXzss9GTM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I mean.. where do I start?
The owners were very welcoming and friendly the moment we entered the place. They gave us a little about themselves, the place and the bagels they offer. Great couple and I wish them all the best.
The food was too good. We got the brunch offer with an additional bagel.
Sunset park sesame bagel and turkey zaatar bagel. Really good options. Very filling. Very tasty. 10/10 would recommend.
The atmosphere makes you feel like you’re chilling in Brooklyn even if you haven’t been there.
Best brunch place I’ve been to in Spain so far.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICXkJfl8gE&fid=0x0:0x2927f26810764dc4"],"When":"2024-10-12"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Sergio García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI8cplwJp-RIcoWMDEalkPfmMNXzH4adoFnBwzKohLstignAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Algo tan sencillo como un desayuno se ha convertido en una experiencia tan agradable que he tenido que poner una reseña. Es la segunda vez que vengo a esta cafetería restaurante y si la vez anterior disfruté de un excelente café y una tostada de aceite con tomate, en esta ocasión y al ver la buena pinta que tenía la de otro cliente al entrar, me decidí por probar su tortilla de patatas y aquí es donde debo hacer una pausa para aplaudir a este establecimiento porque es con diferencia una de las mejores tortillas de patata que he probado, ni muy poco ni muy hecha, en el punto perfecto y si a eso le sumamos que el café es buen café de verdad y la excelente limpieza del local junto con la correcta disposición del personal, pues lo dicho, comenzamos el día con un momento redondo. De corazón.. Gracias por hacer que existan negocios así, porque así da gusto.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB7C_l3yhQ9Su2uvIlDPI-X\u0026fid=0x0:0x314c1e1a999519d2"],"When":"2025-10-3"},{"Name":"Javier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUy-Cin4G8i9xmzs-6TECysleK0bbWZxy9dbA09_1wMZGmBINkS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Mi experiencia: unos espaguetis que parecen hechos por un niño. Un poquito de cebolla y/o carne picada, orégano, queso rallado....","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDUAOy0iYMAxNtfPg_mgl3z\u0026fid=0x0:0x314c1e1a999519d2"],"When":"2026-1-31"},{"Name":"Erica Rivera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ2bW-yynpaqDYCAIqoAx4ddOVd5gmvsBRj4dMWg7xR8B3q_w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Menús y platos combinados de los de toda la vida. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Grayson Steinberg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0FM-DTGeRq-ekiimGFBlFHH05AKAAIJzcPJgJV79ZCQwiCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Before I get into why I've left a three-star review, I'd like to point out that the service was excellent. Absolutely no complaints there.

My issue has to do with the false advertising on La Desayunería's new menu.

Context: We've always been big fans of La Desayunería, particularly for their pancakes (which are or, at least until recently, were the best American-style pancakes you could get in Madrid) and their marvellous skillet potatoes, drenched in cheese and sprinkled with generous doses of onions and peppers.

In fact, the first photo, taken back in August 2021 during one of our first visits to their Chueca location, features these very potatoes. They were so delicious, the skillet potatoes alone were enough to convince my partner to pay numerous repeat visits over the following three years, with and without at least half a dozen friends who we also converted into loyal customers.

Fast forward to today, about six months since our last visit. Besides the fact that prices of most dishes had increased an average of $2 to $4 in the interim, the skillet potatoes we ordered today did not remotely resemble our favorite dish (exhibit B: the second photo I've shared). Can the real skillet potatoes please stand up?

Not only were these alleged "skillet potatoes" a sad, microwave-reheated attempt at home fries, they were a world away from what La Desayunería had previously advertised as skillet potatoes.

I never imagined you guys would stoop this low, but I'm afraid that today I was deeply disappointed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDoyPmVfg&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2025-4-21"},{"Name":"Anna P.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7WcsQL-_YjeB8ikBAzP5P--Xr9uZHDVblH8z78yaEZTujZulB-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I like this place a lot. Visited a couple of times with family. Children friendly.
Generous portions, good prices. Friendly atmosphere.
I really like jars with cold water that are served directly when you sit at no cost!
My daughter enjoys pancakes so much! Last time we try those chocolate brownies - yummy 😋
Fries are tasty. The burger is good, especially the bread.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDZ7qCU_wE&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2023-10-1"},{"Name":"RC","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJlKVKTxDPdnEjvP8YmcYdXkT1KBu0mDRTwyMd5NwPqlZxCSg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I ordered the grilled cheese sandwich with fried chicken!! The sandwich was nice but the fried chicken could be better ... it looked as it was re-heated... dry and hard to chew.

The place is well located in the restaurant area and tables available without reservation required.

They could have a lunch deal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICPwKXqiAE&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2024-11-20"},{"Name":"Lily Fune","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLl_Nd3Rk9TemDO5HAFBYBfC7yOxBhtbYOSS5LE1Bpet_x7-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our server name Islam was extremely nice and approachable.  He spoke English, which made our experience much less stressful and very helpful throughout our visit. His friendly attitude and great communication really made a difference. Excellent service!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Montse Aroca","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzgqSuZc3XOaq0dJtpI7NoIw6Scv-M9mhCfK9mYdEfhrlz0xFZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great service and amazing food. I love that they served the food with a glass of tap water","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB6nCYiMVvCZ_QFkOQVdDsN&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2026-1-6"},{"Name":"Amanda Donnelley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI8InSUuIi1XDi6HdPNsvA5PbUmWTZuF3UUM0Ol9_In8dX2gQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Only go for pancakes everything else sub par.  Service was slow, grilled cheese and fries were cold, fries said hand cut but they came from the freezer.   Pancakes were delicious and fluffy, huge plate of food.  The table was sticky and the tables were packed into this location so made it hard for families to get to get to tables.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICxr5OGYg&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2023-5-29"},{"Name":"Lorenzo Solis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkg6bjGMNoP_8Y-DXy7p0TtXTe2VEANXFKMEShZlC4sjHCf7GnBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Of the coffee places in Caliedo, this is my favorite. They have good coffee and cake. It was also not too crowded, while the playlist was awesome. I can't wait to comeback for the pancakes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwzPvMdw&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2025-3-17"},{"Name":"António Ribeiro Lima","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiXNy-z8DnPA3Ry_rM-vu5gz7taDMlJUFJ_jas4EzJpjuTQWXr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Avenger is known by smashing and destroying pancakes, reason why he told me, the storyteller to pick a pancake place and let him know, that's what I did.

He wants to throw a Divorce Party for his Divorce Tour in Madrid, and in his last podcast episode, "How to Throw a Divorce Party and Ignore being Alone" he told about the power of pancakes which he started liking by watching The New Day, a wrestling faction composed by Kofi Kingston, Xavier Woods and Big E. He feels the power of positivity and how people are happy by consuming them.

If you're looking for healthy pancakes this is not your place, I was looking for that, but on the other hand, if you're looking for diabetes and sugar rush, this is your place, the service is pretty fast, which would let The Creator happier than ever, it would be even quicker than he would get back to "action" , and they keep you hydrated by giving you a glass of water, the only non-sugary thing.

Ventilation system is quite good, if you wanna work there's space, and music is from your God's playlist, of course! The bathroom it's mixed but big, you can relax inside while changing your diaper.

In general pretty good, and in an area with a lot of options, Throw your party and have some calories","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICRz8jNxQE&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2023-4-13"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Anna Malczewska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI9yJCRmCgyTQhowzmOMPQyusjMkRpVj8jwFMImib510PalD3s=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a lovely café with amazing coffee! It’s been a while since I visited a place with such a great vibe. I ordered a pour-over and asked if I could choose the beans myself — the barista smiled and said yes, then told me all about the coffee I picked: where it’s from, the farm, and its flavor profile. He asked if it’s okay to brew it with a V60. He was absolutely wonderful — his energy, kindness, and smile lit up the whole place and everyone in it ❤️ The coffee itself? One of the best Kenyan brews I’ve had, served with a little info card. Truly a 10/10 experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB8cycp8Waj7mjqj7acFOA1\u0026fid=0x0:0x5b44186e9365ca07"],"When":"2025-12-2"},{"Name":"Ángel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULTsQNtaaWdNK_X35IfAs7Av_J2d1XmN-KLNDaBy1UY6QarWE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stumbled on this place by pure luck. Best avocado toast of 2025","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAHYj5mw3lF9Iy8ZvM1cWnh\u0026fid=0x0:0x5b44186e9365ca07"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"Rachel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLaLM_WNZyuR1PIx00iYk9GbavHcSYUmzKj1NNbgya2Hgc-Ng=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really nice ambiance and servers. No food photos bc we were busy eating it! The place is really nice but i didn’t liked that you have to seat in specific tables if you’re reading with an ipad or kindle or working. The assigned tables are uncomfortable so can’t even see how someone can work on them. The matcha is expensive and i’ve had better ones for the price. The carrot cake wasn’t that bad but was dry as it looked old.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBNPOy8d2pClFYZivKT0IDK\u0026fid=0x0:0x5b44186e9365ca07"],"When":"2025-7-6"},{"Name":"Nataly Amezquita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlVvaFblqIBHco_wWXjXQ1Ya5nxAR0ijeOPcS1GyV0msUj9dks=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I have been here twice the chai latte is good.. but one of the wait staff was rude which it doesn’t make it a good place. We see two people whose came in and saw and round table available  he wanted to obligate us to sit at a table where all the people are on the laptop tightly squeeze. I feel his approach could have been a different.  We also saw him be rude to a father and a baby who sat for two seconds before leaving and asked him to get up from the couch because people will come in and not see a table available, meanwhile the table next to us was empty.  It sucks that this happened!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wilmarryme","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7ormXQ6hUzWDMU8fLeI_bA8QCvui8iFYf5AHbSpmLRnOfrLM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I absolutely love the coffee here, it's rich, aromatic, and easily one of the best I’ve had in Madrid. [{"Name":"Nikos Gkekas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJN3C01iDzOo4jHsOUqjcjowoBrQjZNgAzWHYiwpxxYw7ttCg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Perfect place for breakfast or a fast lunch in a family business. The tortilla with the caramelised onions and cheese was tasteful.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICGhNSznQE&fid=0x0:0x659d272c4372f082"],"When":"2021-10-20"},{"Name":"William Molina Gener","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjdmjb7BIPBDkvvq7ktW31djOulnPtkV9_GMJ18BAHbX0U0UNb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pasé un día por casualidad y desde entonces se ha convertido en mi cafetería de referencia para desayunar. Tienen, sin duda, los mejores pinchos de tortilla de todo Madrid: he probado el clásico, el de trufa, el de picadillo de chorizo y el de jamón… ¡todos espectaculares!
El personal es amabilísimo, te atienden con una sonrisa y hasta te preparan el café como te gusta sin que tengas que decir nada.

Un sitio de 10. Totalmente recomendable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB3BwM1kFx1y28vNBPvY0zs&fid=0x0:0x659d272c4372f082"],"When":"2025-10-20"},{"Name":"Roberto R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnE3JqOttVYEFozmpGZ7YxDa_zWt-98ASB5ma2y1SnToBT3avt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Cafetería clásica situada cerca de nuevos ministerios , un local no muy grande con un barra larga , bastante gente a la hora del desayuno.

Yo fui a desayunar y pedí el pincho de tortilla con cebolla , un pincho bastante generoso , pata cortada en trozo irregulares , bien frita , buena proporción de huevo y patata , muy jugosa , sabor correcto , punto de sal ok y pan normal.

Resumen : Bastante buen pincho de tortilla

Puntuación : 8.2

Precio : 4.75","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAC8GxdUpUpRNB8doZkEYv0&fid=0x0:0x659d272c4372f082"],"When":"2025-12-20"},{"Name":"vicenta sobrino bolaños","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3mG5-YUfzRzqoixCF0xxMDW70QLoVJoEFmZY7oaI9gT1F0TGAcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Bar muy bien ubicado en Madrid. Carta de bebidas y tapas muy completa. Tortillas de 10, varios tipos. Muy sabrosas y bien elaboradas. Los dueños lo mejor. Atentos y muy profesionales. Obligatorio para tapeo. Recomendable 100 %","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCrkcWQoxkSptgU4RpD3RIn&fid=0x0:0x659d272c4372f082"],"When":"2025-11-14"},{"Name":"Manuel garcia sevillano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKgtaACk7Ij0HWIovKp3KDv5e5umTWgogD5WkQbWj-0fLP2JA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un sitio con encanto , donde podrás degustar entre una de ellas la tortilla de patata , para todos los gustos
Gracias por el trato recibido .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCeFZbx45sfFi90n6TaYsi7&fid=0x0:0x659d272c4372f082"],"When":"2025-10-24"},{"Name":"Pablo Fernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiaKNiP2P7xsrZ1_UQvCZ2d4ytiuItke9-TrIlRAiR28tGOtSB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El mejor sitio que he visto para tortillas, con mucha variedad de ellas, local pequeñito.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAGhymZKIr5wkkjcV6vjC_k&fid=0x0:0x659d272c4372f082"],"When":"2025-10-2"},{"Name":"Cristina GP","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlIOY4bphMbFMv9W7XzsV9tOKXv68xV0ont6zjJ_SxPYJeog=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hoy he descubierto un nuevo lugar justo al lado del centro de salud de Espronceda, y enfrente de el centro de especialidades de Modesto Lafuente. Se llama cafetería La Pepa. Leticia, una artista en la cocina, no para de salir de la cocina con tortillas espectaculares y una sonrisa, con cebolla, sin cebolla, con cebolla caramelizada, con queso de cabra, con chorizo y 1000 variedades más… todas ellas cuajadas por fuera y blanditas derretidas por dentro. El ambiente, debido a su proximidad, Está plagado de médicos/as, enfermeros/as, celadores, etc. Ruben el Camarero, una carrera de fondo en escasos 10 m de barra, alucinante. Tiene oídos para todo el mundo, y una contestación amable para cada uno de ellos. El café buenísimo, yo que lo tomo solo y sin azúcar, puedo dar fe que sienta bien y tiene buen sabor…  Sin duda es exactamente recomendable para venir a desayunar, o para venir a tomar un pincho de tortilla en cualquier momento del día.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICPhbuhjQE&fid=0x0:0x659d272c4372f082"],"When":"2024-11-26"},{"Name":"Irene Guzmán-Benito","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7bj6hFmnsKbddas1oGhTY-3xLO8dJUjCwyTJlSIPIzDI-9YhtUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Realmente tienen de las mejores tortillas de patata que he probado nunca! Son muy amables y te hacen sentir bienvenido, además son tremendamente rápidos y eficientes. Siempre que viajo a Madrid me paso por allí. También puede pedirse para llevar!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDfqdCvaw&fid=0x0:0x659d272c4372f082"],"When":"2025-1-7"}]

Lovely and quiet location","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ramon Guerrero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWDQWusJOCfUOjRZOyzPe-egLd2Uv-UAEkTHfOIkFdbPY-rqjJ-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice coffee and pastries!!! Lovely crew as well","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Francisco Wu Lin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVNYd_xmwgK8TR9LmhvO5Z2rre53GloIhLMBvii_4t0iXwnKF3g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Like a cozy oasis in the chilly morning. Everything I had was delicious.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Javier Barco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmkeb4wWr-AdZ-zkehcwX5qLm97wF7IPJHCAcZFvnrxvMGng3x=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Quiero diferenciar bien entre ambiente, comida y servicio. Vaya por delante que el local es espacioso, agradable y decorado con gusto. El café y el té estaban bien, así como unas pastas que tomamos para acompañar que estaban buenas, aunque algo subidas de precio dado que eran más bien pequeñas. Con la bebida ponen una palmerita de cortesía, lo cual es de agradecer. Hasta ahí lo positivo. La palmera recubierta de chocolate estaba especialmente seca, más parecida a pan duro que a la masa tierna y suave de las palmeras (adjunto foto). Algo que no debería ser aceptable es que un local no tenga precios anotados ni en carta ni en mostrador. Cuando se lo preguntamos a la persona que nos atendió hizo oídos sordos y nos salió con otro tema. Lo único que sí tenía precio de todo lo que vimos era una porción de tarta Red Velvet; esa la pedimos, pero nos la cobró más cara y en el ticket aparecía como "bizcocho zanahoria". Cuando le indicamos esta confusión nos comentó que el precio marcado era incorrecto, que era anterior y que justo acababan de cambiar; retiró el cartelito delante de nosotros. Cuando nos preguntó si era para tomar en local o llevar le indicamos claramente que para tomar en local y cuando ya tenía las bebidas servidas en vasos de papel nos volvió a preguntar "me han dicho para llevar, ¿verdad?", a lo que respondimos que no. Por lo visto no le sentó bien y su actitud hacia nosotros cambió negativamente, aunque tampoco había ningún drama en beberlos en vasos de papel; nos lo cambió a tazas, aunque con un tono que no teníamos por qué aguantar. Lo dicho, aceptamos los precios por el barrio que es, pero al menos la calidad del producto y atención a los detalles deberían haberse cuidado más.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAO9UjY9jjKfyOB7RUh-eFW&fid=0x0:0x1fae7a2fa481721f"],"When":"2026-1-23"},{"Name":"Isabel María Payán Martín","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWfclV1MmLc1u2Jt75ZGRgUXSphNP62uV3BRe6jI513pTOAwo_cgQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Gran experiencia en este local acogedor. Camelia me atendió de inmediato. El desayuno muy bueno y se agradece el mini croissant junto a la taza.
La atención de las camareras Michaela y Andrea fue estupenda.
100 % recomendable. Volveré.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCLhen-It4ff5uyitgEqV8_&fid=0x0:0x1fae7a2fa481721f"],"When":"2025-10-17"},{"Name":"Celia Falcón","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEORkTErlav_F5zdcOy1y-WJMqpxQQeo4mzfsumGk2aD9s3Sg0Ew=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Me encanta esta cafetería. La decoración es original, siempre hay gente porque todo esta riquísimo.
Con el café te regalan una mini napolitana siempre y además las camareras son encantadoras.
Súper recomendable!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCykPGJNVXhE1JEIH-ZRgPb&fid=0x0:0x1fae7a2fa481721f"],"When":"2025-11-26"}]

[{"Name":"Abdelilah A.C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXKFUMlEJsmCkxqk2SA9BNtpbjKKZ6YLsU4zWUctlU1ZI0PFdY5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious Arabic and Middle Eastern pastries with authentic taste and fresh ingredients. The variety is impressive, from baklava to maamoul, all prepared with care. The staff is welcoming and helpful, and prices are very reasonable for the quality offered. Located on Bravo Murillo, it’s easy to reach and worth the stop if you want real homemade-style sweets in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCz8QMgt2W873XB58-Paple&fid=0x0:0xa642a4c36ddca57c"],"When":"2025-8-28"},{"Name":"Xabier Granja","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWDBDFY79QSrweqnDBGDgTlRL0DAkGQXKPseySaZAr3w6G4dTyVqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Quite good baklava bakery! They have a ton of variety, and buying a small box with like 10 different little types of baklava is very well priced. Personally, I'd like them to have a bit more honey, especially the more layery/nutty ones, but that's personal taste. My favorite was the bigger baklava triangle, that one seemed to have the best pastry/honey ratio. The small ones I bought were very good, just a bit too dry for my own taste, but plenty of people like them that way. It's a nice establishment to enjoy some baklava with a coffee. You should definitely check out this place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICLxPmv8AE&fid=0x0:0xa642a4c36ddca57c"],"When":"2024-6-15"},{"Name":"Goknil Senel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKcLb7tcg8T16RKgYiw2tyKYbHo3YPJ8bv-kqjjc4xdxJXB5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great baklavas and great delicacies from the Middle East. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Evan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3stz6TPpRlEtkamdF33adQZQBkXVxe2dzveqd9pl0ylW9_PA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is a French-style dessert store specializing mainly in éclairs. It also offers a variety of cakes and cookies. The decor is elegant and atmospheric, and although there are not many tables, the seating is very comfortable. The waitstaff are very friendly and enthusiastic.

I tried three different flavors of éclair: mango, raspberry, and violet. All were rich in flavor but lacked the traditional texture of a crunchy crust with a creamy filling. Together with a cup of coffee, I paid about 8 EUR, which is a very good price.

This French dessert cafe, located in a residential area of Madrid, is suitable for take-away and home use. The quality of the desserts matches the price, so it's worth stopping by for a taste when you're in the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICzn8ix_AE&fid=0x0:0xc87f5092fe860df9"],"When":"2024-6-6"},{"Name":"luca","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLk9PX58pFLIukSqhfVy22baUzjtDff0OaijM-VMWIDlMmJi5E=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I popped in to have a quick coffee and a post lunch sweet. Had the best eclair ever. Really recommend this place","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anko Kor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZIHUz5lHb8lMyMYYZcbRJ7cKpwHcbtJa58cmSotlXvP0cug=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very tasty ) good service","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICl05eCSA&fid=0x0:0xc87f5092fe860df9"],"When":"2023-11-26"},{"Name":"Amando Sanchez Falcon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVSUz4DScC6AveW5uAHjruqU-eSk15mKjc_H-GmEChXLZ7KCStY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Larraya entra directa al top de las pastelerías de Madrid. Los eclairs son simplemente deliciosos, y con una variedad que no encuentras en ningún otro sitio de Madrid. La bollería dulce es fantástica y el ambiente cuidado y agradable. La nata es simplemente perfecta, de las que ya no se encuentran en Madrid. Un 10.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB6e-s-4SxESrb57z5k_-4v&fid=0x0:0xc87f5092fe860df9"],"When":"2026-2-20"},{"Name":"luis manuel quiroga López","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVbBqcpmIpyzctpa5CmtAjh0iyG9UsAhjOBKALD02WcEHvOF77_zA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"No soy de dulce , pero salía del médico y he buscado un sitio para desayunar,  ...caminando por la calle Galileo he visto la Pastelería Larraya , muy buena imagen [ he cruzado de acera ] , tenía todo una pinta increíble.  He pedido el café como a mi me gusta y he optado por dos pastelitos , me han preguntado si era más de dulce o de cítricos,  un acierto total.  Todo recién hecho , muy amables Milá y Dora . La decoración actual y muy fresca . Tiene un baño amplio y moderno.  Los salados , el pan , tartas , pasteles ....todo muy bueno .Un acierto total , volveré.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEK7GyM_smImvuQE&fid=0x0:0xc87f5092fe860df9"],"When":"2025-5-9"},{"Name":"Stephan H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVeai_cY3NnU7B6A02oIKEaEkmCyI-MZCfRCE2U8Sem6lR2YnI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Un desayuno con pinta bonita… pero no todo lo que brilla es oro.
El choux relleno grande estaba bien, sin más — bonito, pero sin un sabor que sorprenda.
La tarta de limón, correcta.
Y el otro choux (el pequeñito) ni lo subo: la masa blanducha, sin gracia.
La verdad, daba la sensación de que todo llevaba un rato hecho.
Eso sí, el café y el zumo, muy bien. Y el servicio, de 10: muy amable y atento.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCI9uuSsAE&fid=0x0:0xc87f5092fe860df9"],"When":"2025-4-1"},{"Name":"Antonio Rico","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLPyPdYFbW437FqdRQz3RYBEvFM--9XxkJVKn9psHYGN8l-mUI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Es una pena que haciendo un roscón tan bueno sean unos rácanos. No puedes servir a los clientes una porción de roscón que está duro porque tiene tres o cuatro días. Y tampoco puedes decirle al cliente - cuando te dice que el roscón está duro -que es verdad, que tiene un par de días y después quedarte impávido , ni disculpas ni no cobrarlo, nada. Así no se trata a los clientes, hay que saber cuándo tirar un bollo porque  está duro y no mentir como un bellaco cuando hasta el empleado reconoce que no es del día.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alina Alexandra Cotoi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqVauiLw4aODybL9pdh26epjORl8yGZKbX12zaQVP8uvhwyCY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Estábamos de paso y compramos dos galletas y unos buñuelos. Nos ha encantado , no son nada empalagosos . Volveremos , muchas gracias","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCZHr0Ymz16zf15xagzH-sA&fid=0x0:0xc87f5092fe860df9"],"When":"2025-10-31"}]

I recommend the napolitanas but everything is grade A. Worth it to go out of your way to stop by.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ignacio aguilar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFnOz4md1Biueot1io9os7h4d2UtkO_CHofD1r67xkocp61dXD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I tried the ham and cheese croissant, it was amazing!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Edgar El Hage","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLlwvFSsfnrAet_4Yd1PG-Ua_R8emzxENrHspwE4TOUp8cbqw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Todo artesano!!! María es un encanto, tiene un pequeño obrador, unas buenas manos y un corazón enorme para ponerle mucho cariño a lo que hace. Desde muy temprano empieza a preparar los hojaldres y las masas: brioches, croissants, bizcochos, galletas de todo tipo, palmeras, napolitanas, pan, tartas… Todo lo hace ella y es capaz de personalizarte cualquier encargo como no te hace nadie hoy en día. También hemos hecho varios cursos de repostería con ella, aprendimos y pasamos muy buenos ratos. Por supuesto todos mis desayunos y meriendas se los encargo a María, es éxito asegurado.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCac_AduO1fKFIy07l-Coge&fid=0x0:0x4542feb3216edc86"],"When":"2025-12-10"},{"Name":"Luis Jiménez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJ7lNJR3ArZpHu8lZ9CkfFJHDuCquv09VXreOjK8XAOsahfKM32w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Las mejores napolitanas que he probado!!
Tanto la de chocolate como la de jamón y queso estaban increíblemente rellenas y los sabores, espectaculares. El trato fue cercano y encantador, y la tienda no puede ser más bonita","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEIWEu7njtdjUdA&fid=0x0:0x4542feb3216edc86"],"When":"2025-6-1"},{"Name":"Eli C. Beret","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkO8NKmqjvnKvzgi9Sf6ZoH2Hf06on6Ko0ONIq5vtrvMU3XYDT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"María ha hecho la tarta de cumpleaños de mi hijo conforme a las especificaciones que él le había dado. Ha quedado muy rica, y además, preciosa. Sin duda ha sido una buena decisión encargársela a ella. ¡Muchas gracias!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEM65yMS1-vbAHQ&fid=0x0:0x4542feb3216edc86"],"When":"2025-5-24"},{"Name":"Lorena Bonet","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlAGjs25i_TnNUOPcR33DcF8v8xSF4CyeNJS7aGb1IobwsqiAe=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"De repente estábamos dejando el coche en el taller y nos llamo la atención este pequeño local en El Barrio de chamberri y decidimos entrar a ver qué podíamos encontrar. Sin duda un gran acierto el cual más tarde volvimos a repetir. Tienen todo tipo de bolleria salada y Dulce para comprar. Lo regenta una señora muy amable y por lo que pudimos leer para quien se anime también tienen talleres para realizar de repostería. En nuestro caso nos decidimos a probar un cake de limón y semillas de amapola, es el mejor cake de limón que he probado hasta ahora y un croissant también delicioso. Estuvimos preguntando un poco que podríamos degustar y tenía napolitanas de chocolate, muffing, napolitanas de verduras, Roscóncitos de reyes, cakes de todo tipo, tarta de zanahoria, tarta de chocolate... y un sin fin de cosas deliciosas. El precio de la porción del cake son 1,20€ y el croissant 1,40€. Si no me equivoco tiene bolleria desde 1€ como son los chuchos y tenían una pinta.... impresionante. Totalmente para recomendar es más volvimos a recoger el coche y compramos otra porción de cake para merendar, no nos pudimos resistir. Os animáis a probarlo?","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDC9fyo6QE&fid=0x0:0x4542feb3216edc86"],"When":"2020-10-6"},{"Name":"Pedro Aguado Arroyo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI0Dl3Yq5jWVRVD6KG5_shMsHwvw5DJapxW5Y6YKdYM9-KiHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tienda regentada por una mujer profesional muy agradable que te responde cualquier duda sobre los productos como una sonrisa. Productos espectaculares de primer nivel. Relación calidad precio buena. Ayer me llevé una porción de tarta de muerte por chocolate y casi la palmo de lo buena que estaba y dos ensaimadas de nutella muy ricas. Se nota lo artesano y la calidad de la materia utilizada. La tienda rezuma ese olor a pastelería y pan con decoración mezcla de antiguo y moderno.
Volví a pecar con una porción generosa de  tarta de zanahoria espectacular y una porción cremosa de tarta de queso para perder el sentido. No me queda más que felicitar a la repostera por su mano para el arte del dulce.
Tarta de cumpleaños de mi hija de muerte por chocolate sencillamente ESPECTACULAR. Gracias por todo","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDT7ufzBQ&fid=0x0:0x4542feb3216edc86"],"When":"2024-5-24"}]

Debe su nombre a que el fundador tenía su pastelería en la calle Santiago 2 muy cerca del palacio de Oriente.

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Matteo Dumas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJlfJVlLnMI1RZV_JhZMK670FwgeckShc0oh_aIq48wJCGxgSU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The cheesecake is delicious, the cookies generous and the coffee great, wholeheartedly recommend !!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"A F","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZ8NQ9Yq6mq4Vw3McOFfkpr1_gK4QZSB4gFoAGz5VA5IZtOnJK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Una fortuna contar con ellos en el barrio.
Los 2 chicos son muy amables y muy atentos. En esta primera oportunidad hemos probado el café, una mini galleta, un brownie y 2 pan de hamburguesa.
El café está muy rico, buen tueste de hola coffee, con baja acidez. La mini galleta estaba muy rica también.
El brownie nos lo hemos llevado para más tarde y Wao, está INCREIBLE, la textura es bastante suave tipo fudge con nueces y chunks de chocolate dulce que contrasta con el fudge del brownie que es ligeramente salado y le da un contraste maravilloso. Me enacntó ese balance dulce salado, de verdad maravilloso.
Los panes de hamburguesas tienen muy buena textura y se conservan bien de un día para otro.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDhrTckjnOSBfeCZ2dMBFmg&fid=0x0:0x48cd3d0849c4f749"],"When":"2026-2-3"},{"Name":"Jose Tamargo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXNs_6_vYF-vo4BQuFdPc305e3L-L60Pe3zBqHEafx8P_ty8aD=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Espectaculares galletas y tartas de queso! Sin duda de lo mejor que hay por el barrio, tanto por el trato como por el producto.

Ah, y el café increíble también, de especialidad y de gran calidad

Mi obrador de confianza, de verdad que se lo recomiendo a todo el mundo!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDDouwYohLuYMPR8bXmERga&fid=0x0:0x48cd3d0849c4f749"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"Marisa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIg_xm83zfbjBYsJl8uk_JJJmU1vP6A_49Jyukkw-ZlgJDFhQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Me ha encantado el sitio. He probado el brownie, las cookies y el café. Todo buenísimo. El brownie muy rico de los que están un poco crudos por dentro con trocitos crujientes. Las cookies, sobre todo las de red velvet y Nutella, espectaculares (eso sí con 1,5 min en el micro todavía mejores). Y el café de especialidad buenísimo. El sitio muy acogedor y bien decorado. El dueño David un encanto. Se nota que todo es artesano y hecho con mimo y pasión. Espero que le vaya muy bien y podamos seguir disfrutando de esa repostería tan casera y rica mucho tiempo","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOql31Q23Y5iK4fOTj4xZW&fid=0x0:0x48cd3d0849c4f749"],"When":"2025-12-18"},{"Name":"Bea Román porres","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJUaFhp7RR5qGJUtyZTZKZeisa2rVJn_MYf_PBZVedCoxheTw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El sitio está fenomenal por dentro y el café, las cookies y tartas están increíbles, la de pistacho mi favorita un 10, repetiremos 100% muchísimas gracias!!!!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB7bJZ2ze6T51IhUD13aLPF&fid=0x0:0x48cd3d0849c4f749"],"When":"2026-1-31"},{"Name":"Ariyan Mottaghi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIRx3wX-2MVweSnWIohYeQ2CGhxR8ZBS3QuV75KvrSsCBRRNw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La mejor tarta de queso que he probado. [{"Name":"Alexander Knebe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW50CrGCLnFy274Hke1QEObGjkYAVQx1pIaVxCfbxZRsw8ElnmU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"best bread and most friendly staff ever…","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sonia Muñoz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL2ANzdULN1os-9fkdLQVhXmSZYAIYMwOtpGKE_z7qitdMnbQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Totalmente recomendable! . Con Inma y Noelia da gusto, son muy complacientes y resolutivas. Hoy, x mi cumple me han preparado una tarta especial " a la carta " en menos de 10 min. ha sido una suerte😉,  xq normalmente se tienen que encargar, la he llamado "SELVALMENDRA" Estará riquísima como siempre. Muchísimas gracias!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Demadridcarlosjuan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwFVQnQOCgZ5tO76SFWu-eb48I-b6LGloY4ZP9kK0Ajgflmqxn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Todos los años encargo las tartas de cumpleaños allí porqué son de muy buena calidad. Pero no tienen carta de tartas enseñando productos y precios, y eso es imperdonable. Su pastelería es exquisita, aunque echo en falta algo más de variedad en  bollería. Con un buen surtido de pastas y unas tartas de manzana riquísimas.
La atención es buena pero mejorable. Local amplió y muy limpio. Los precios buenos tirando a altos.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIClyZuSoQE&fid=0x0:0x81b0e405c7a9816b"],"When":"2023-11-21"},{"Name":"Morelia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZa4sL6lqeXxi-iGAoktYbzkZqi2rxEKaQDy7p9_uiKoStxEg0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Año 2022. Mi hermana nos obsequió palmeritas de este lugar, hemos quedado maravilladas con el sabor, la textura y la presentación. Está claro que repetiremos. Recomiendo este sitio 10/10

Enero/ 2025. Vuelvo a comentar y solo para decir buenas palabras. Hemos reservado un roscón de reyes de 1 kilo, mitad trufa y mitad nata. Cabe resaltar que ha sido el mejor roscón que he probado en mi vida, el bizcocho estaba increíble, nada empalagoso, todo en medidas perfectas. Además de que las personas que atendieron a mi hermana (quien fue a recoger el roscón) fueron bastante majas. Hemos encontrado un sitio de confianza para próximas ocasiones. De verdad que lo recomiendo 10/10.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDW1d3mJw&fid=0x0:0x81b0e405c7a9816b"],"When":"2022-3-30"},{"Name":"Ana Maria Vallcorba","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLuGwtw6hxQ-J-2omtB3SOW6KLgCB1R_Y35btLUJXaCdQ1lMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hicimos un encargo para el baby shower de mi hermana y todo genial! El encargo super rápido y todo buenísimo como siempre! Siempre estoy por allí por sus cruasanes reciéntes! No hay Pasteleria más buena, aparte te atienden siempre de 10❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCglrqfqQE&fid=0x0:0x81b0e405c7a9816b"],"When":"2025-2-16"},{"Name":"Sara P.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-L9Z5Ta07DUUhS997St8s5e2gXUmYBYEGI4fS2pQw8sj00D7vzA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Si te gusta el dulce, es un sitio que no te puedes perder. Tienen gran variedad de dulces, pan, empanadas... De todo un poco para el desayuno y el postre. Y las chicas son súper majas y atentas. Es genial tener una panadería así tan cerca de casa!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID6u8ix-QE&fid=0x0:0x81b0e405c7a9816b"],"When":"2021-10-12"},{"Name":"Esteban Blazquez Amor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpzweSbD84OBhzNNwAUCvDom9xDxm9F07nneMiaipFuZtiqxsSjw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"De lo mejor del barrio, tanto la pastelería como el pan, solo hecho en falta alguna hogaza, pero lo compensa la calidad y el equipo que lo lleva... enhorabuena a todos","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mila Loizaga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7OKSzHI-flf5SWNmCAuNvJheDAtE9fuZiSoVd-1OnpLi0TEv79A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ayer sacó un postre para el día de los enamorados y nos quedamos sin el, voló. Hoy hemos ido a primera hora y nos han hecho uno en el momento. Tienen siempre para las ocasiones, cosas muy originales y muy ricas. Os recomiendo si no la conocéis comprar alli","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChkaG45QE&fid=0x0:0x81b0e405c7a9816b"],"When":"2023-2-15"}]

[{"Name":"Ada R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXGcYh083lzXAW0ilCMBiIadWH4R69ao0BviCf-vmYL2Dwx20Y9w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very stylish place with various products.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJ5PORDA&fid=0x0:0x66a0ad3a391dcec4"],"When":"2023-7-11"},{"Name":"Andrea Arria","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLyi1f6IDPVV3lqiC3KW9na56DL22dAf9pK04-lnHmywt_F7b0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Pido unas tortitas como las que muestran en la imagen y lo que me sirven no tiene nada que ver. Unas tortitas frías, de bolsa, mal servidas con ningún topping. Eso sí se me han cobrado 7, 70 euros por todo. Le hemos dicho y ni una disculpa han pedido. No vuelvo más. Por ese precio voy al VIPS y pago con gusto las tortitas.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCPxMMz6d2mHOaxjLrAeZbs&fid=0x0:0x66a0ad3a391dcec4"],"When":"2026-1-9"},{"Name":"Patricia Vera Paparoni","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWtAMnhfa78QgOCCvosrJcWkBFsTxaGYaBobBEzXxA2w-CjnhE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Fuimos a desayunar ayer y si bien el café y lo que pedimos nos gustó, el que nos haya aparecido una cucaracha en el área de mesas deja mucho que desear de la limpieza del lugar. Aparte el personal no hizo más que limpiar. Fue realmente asqueroso terminar una experiencia así.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBARDvyIC2B_AOviE9KKZMe&fid=0x0:0x66a0ad3a391dcec4"],"When":"2025-9-1"},{"Name":"Charo B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxLV6Hjn6UwJx25-CqNWfdLmXEBPfvrkHhWVW2XY6JZyIxoEd_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Fuimos a merendar ayer viernes y la verdad es que el sitio es fantástico, muy tranquilo, bonita decoración, amplitud de mesas y con buen hilo musical. Para ser las 17:30h de la tarde, no había mucha variedad de productos, eso nos dio bajón y la chica que nos atendió bastante mala. Deberían de poner a gente que tenga ganas de trabajar. A lo mejor volvemos para darle una 2ª oportunidad, porque lo tenemos cerca de casa. Ya veremos","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICHiLb9bA&fid=0x0:0x66a0ad3a391dcec4"],"When":"2024-8-31"},{"Name":"Carlos Gil Soriano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLD8cmqjo7FVjxReZDc75GTaYGd_YMKn3tf05WhUaLKMQVMTg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Tas el verano, han subido todo aún mas y la pastelería va a peor. Vas con las peques, el rejón es épico y la calidad mala.

Los vigilantes casi al doble que cuando inauguraron, 1.70. Las palmeras son más pequeñas y e industriales, ya no saben a mantequilla, por 3.5 es un atraco. Las palmeritas pequeñas son industriales y no merecen la pena ya. El café torrefacto al máximo, a dos euros. La pastelería la han subido un 15% y es de Europastry, todo industrial... La terraza está para no sentarse de lo sucia que está.

El pan ya no compro, sabe a plástico, no es un pan de euro y medio para la barra normal y corriente. El pan de hogaza de centeno o pasas, con unos sobreprecios tremendos para la calidad real del producto.

Una pena, cerrarán a este paso.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Miguel Angel Madrid Rangel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFS5rvAcNsVD_y7r25XXg4Tk_NTs-PJffW2nBLDLCCJhBrbPk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Los precios son carísimos. Ayer volví a caer en comprar una barra de pan, una gallofa. Les di otra oportunidad. El pan me costó 1.50,  ha subido de 1.30 de golpe a 1.50, encima chicloso. Las palmeras que llevé pequeñas, caras y malas. Compré también una hogaza y me costó 5,30. Chicloso!!!!! Pan sobrevalorado, los camareros desagradables, antipáticos. Les molesta atender. Nunca más volveremos a comprar aquí. . Es un sentir de todos los vecinos de la urbanización, aparte de carísimo,, mala calidad y nada amables. Afortunadamente tenemos el supermercado Día al lado para comprar. Nunca más, pan malo y carísimo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Miguel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0Eym3R7l2FqsZkjiyWGXD7cT_KMc9wVAD9OF3n1A-7KjEN7BL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Unos churros con chocolate que no le serviria ni a mi peor enemigo. Los primeros churros recien hechos blandegues y calientes que me he comido nunca.
El chocolate ademas aguadisimo y malo, podría ser un nesquik o colacao mas oscuro pero liquido total.
El café correcto.

Ademas que ponen 3 churros.... a ver la ración cobren lo que cobren.... 3 churritos??bueno no se.

Eso si el local muy bonito y el personal muy amable.

Todo 6,10€
Habré elegido mal pero no repetiría ni repetiré.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCTMBpN3OOkt6R6n9VaSxEZ&fid=0x0:0x66a0ad3a391dcec4"],"When":"2025-6-12"},{"Name":"victoria velasco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFU9nab6DmZDITz5tKcQagOvugEO70DP-lq387ZcAZT3-4Bkmg4A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"El deterioro de este sitio desde que se abrió es evidente. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Riccardo Dg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3Q4rAuhA-1MqOzMEuKHnJ8W8uwEBTAhQLBeLaM2Yo13Vrgzna=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The cake was very good, but I am disappointed with the service:
The online form on their website didn’t work at all (submitted multiple times but never got a confirmation), I contacted them on WhatsApp and I had to message them multiple times before getting a simple order confirmation.
I also asked to add a personalised decoration (name of the birthday person) and they forgot to make it.
Again the cake was very good, but I wouldn’t recommend the booking experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIClipDEWQ&fid=0x0:0x714c28f85b1a9673"],"When":"2023-11-15"},{"Name":"Miles Mbo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTFoZb3eEV5zZpYfTddzq7UAa7G03dHBw-7REhPagxBH9cPfHr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An exceptional service doubled with amazing treats. This is what awaits when you stop at Glassé Bakery. I am leaving Madrid with a remembrance that will last long due to the friendliness of the people that work at this Bakery.

This is a family owned and operated business. One thing you can easily spots is happy they are to work together. That is before they even turn to serve the customer. This joy easily translated in how they attend to you. I stopped by this place 3 times in a row. This tells about the varieties of treats you can find here. The taste is on the high end of expectations. The service complements it well to the point that lift it to exceptional.

In this Bakery, you will find the Grand Ma, the baker, with her attire, making all the pastries you will try soon. In the room, the mom. She works the counters and share the joy with you. Next, the brother who works the room. He is the one with the most knowledge of English and makes you ease catering to all your needs as tourist. If you stop by at the weekend, you will certainly see the Dad. He works the room and he is always chatty even with his limited English. Got to love the old chap courage. And the daughter helping him around in the room.

No, not even once, I saw any of them bothered while serving. You can't ignore the fact that they have been doing this for long but yet still find joy in doing this.

I stooped by here 3 days in a row. I discovered this place randmly when the bakery I wanted to go was closed. Arounf the corner, there this place was. I decided to stop by. Came back the next and following day. I got a different crew cathering for my needs but I got the same energy. I encourage anyone to stop by here when visiting Madrid. This is the stop for all breakfast lover. And this place is open almost 24h!

Oh, have I mentioned that this place was a 20 minutes walk from my hotel,and yet I looked forward this?

The price is good! I encourage to tip. This is not corporate America. Lol. This is a family business.

Next time in Madrid, I am stopping in this place again.

Ps: The Orange Juice is pressed on the spot upon request. What are you waiting for?","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDxmvbavwE&fid=0x0:0x714c28f85b1a9673"],"When":"2023-6-6"},{"Name":"Hyeun Su Ji Cha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI9bHF4nY19vjdPWBWuqGs6gHVXGCbzIdgyMnlGilAO_bXx=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best Chilean bakery you’ll find in outside of Chile. They even delivered to us from Madrid to Sevilla! Will order again :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kate Schaeffler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXb-BySjXVQ9YLczASOt4A2C-l6hclxUsN8sUkmrVR-HM5Cx3hH=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you for a delicious, beautiful cake! It was perfect and we truly appreciate it. [{"Name":"Dr. Gabriel J Martinez-Diaz, MD","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0n7svt7EIVBYr4eN8wgw2qkgCN01Gx6KXbrC2yLpYzNW9VVKA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La Duquesita is everything a historic Madrid confitería should be—elegant, consistent, and quietly excellent. Founded in 1914, it delivers tradition without feeling dated.

We enjoyed a beautifully curated afternoon selection: crisp sparkling water, perfectly prepared café solo and café con leche, and an outstanding lineup of desserts. The postre de queso was balanced and refined, the pistachio dessert rich yet elegant, and the crujiente de avellana was the standout—textural, nuanced, and expertly executed.

Service was warm and professional, with attentive pacing that allowed the experience to feel relaxed and intentional rather than rushed. Everything felt precise, from presentation to flavor.

La Duquesita continues to set the standard for classic pastry and café culture in Madrid. A must-visit for anyone who appreciates craftsmanship, heritage, and understated excellence. Would absolutely return.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD-jN89dClY6SanEhAaM6S1&fid=0x0:0xe4731ea8954b8d2f"],"When":"2026-1-7"},{"Name":"Denis Papacosta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVEMK47ubeB8RJLvFj2j1wYHnwkZV6PM8BQiUcVWImKtAfy6CfI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Beautiful place with a sophisticated atmosphere and pleasant vibe. Service was quick and kind, although not as refined as the setting suggests. We ordered two café solo, one bottle of Agua Cristal, one Cuatro Texturas dessert, and one Pistachio dessert. Everything was excellent — both desserts and the coffee were outstanding. The total was €24.60, which I found fair considering the quality and sophistication of the place. Overall, a great experience with nothing to complain about.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDhw_TFbhvwpavUrIOyeJpI&fid=0x0:0xe4731ea8954b8d2f"],"When":"2025-11-12"},{"Name":"Josh Tennant","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUVbaMKaMQOUhZ3Lwngm00jZf9DeLKkCkNkF_Ad5JOLUUZJ5WCdnA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best palmera (elephant ear) I've had. Buttery, flakey, delicious. They have an assortment of pastries and chocolates. Very chic seating area to have coffee or tea. I come here every time I'm in Madrid and the quality is consistent.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB2_sFTVkArOXOF06TQQ8d0&fid=0x0:0xe4731ea8954b8d2f"],"When":"2025-9-14"},{"Name":"Michelle Taube","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocITRub_u8yEBcfHbyTEvRi7P1PUcWyXmuqUUiBkXMuYPFktgQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a charming little bakery with delicious pastries as well as coffee and very rich drinking chocolate! We were greeted and helped by Arnol who was so friendly and very knowledgeable about everything on offer. He added to small cookies to our order for us to try. I bought some chocolate to take home as everything there was so good!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Magdalena Béjar Cobo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2DJmJQab3NHRvDAWdJNnJnUjMbieVoZVlmjvoylf9uj403CHU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
I had an amazing experience at La Duquesita in Madrid! I ordered a latte and a gianduja croissant, and both were absolutely delicious. The croissant was rich, flaky, and perfectly balanced, while the latte was smooth and comforting.

The staff were incredibly kind and attentive, making the visit even more enjoyable. The ambiance of the place is stunning—classic and elegant, with so much charm. It’s the perfect spot for a treat and a bit of relaxation.

I can’t wait to return and try more of their offerings. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICPopG8bA&fid=0x0:0xe4731ea8954b8d2f"],"When":"2024-11-22"},{"Name":"Sarah Harvey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5JCrVLGIWJkYyOhx3XawxPm-t2zrBg29DFIw0KGsjih1IKSrB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A very beautiful place with beautiful sweet treats. Plenty to choose from and quick to receive your order.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD3NK4vrwZw7wUIrSliRKOH&fid=0x0:0xe4731ea8954b8d2f"],"When":"2025-11-26"},{"Name":"Kenny Yap","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXcPvs1ZpGoEXYjKq_FFRgFMieeHCw9D8043R8OsUqM_5Tcxisr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I don’t speak English so after I ordered and wanted to sit at the back in the nicer part of the cafe, she seem to be indicating that the area is for some special order and I can only sit in the front. Nonetheless, cake is nice but rather one dimensional aside from the outer shell which adds to the crunchy texture.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID7rpynWg&fid=0x0:0xe4731ea8954b8d2f"],"When":"2024-8-24"},{"Name":"Gerard Sendros","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUs3dK0cJmzIPdVj2wcwbxZs-AejDTclZPXf5pSK15bka6GpbVpcg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A very beautiful place with beautiful sweet treats. [{"Name":"Esther Ibanez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPWuVcu99c9Qe_D_a1R3n0LdpWdWMp3lNs6KQPxiTXL3PuIZY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lovely place with very friendly service. Worth the displacement from central (easy access from Gran Via o Sol with Line 1) to try the Duas and the brioche lollipops. If you are in Cuatro Caminos, this is a must. A beacon of specialty coffee with a unique offering of Duas (a wafer styled bread) which they have different ingredients to served with. We tried the chicken cream and it was delicious. Very nicely balanced, perfect for a brunch or breakfast. We wish we could have stayed longer in Madrid to try the other sweeter offerings. The brioche loaf lollipops were incredibly good and we order repeats both times we went there.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"NELSON ARLEY ZAMBRANO ORTEGA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVa5Qk7UIv8_OvTJ6zAuyuDrxPCiie5iLhBO81uMqXoNn56z8gx=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I could say is the best pastel 🍰 I have taste in Madrid. Would recommend this place to anyone!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yuka","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWD0ppPm_4beUxFRoziLqfl5DfJhX_3glQVPEWM-8O9Lyt0YU-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good bakery, every time I pass in front of the place I have to take something.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID42v3_VQ&fid=0x0:0xb6aca18de55944e5"],"When":"2017-1-2"},{"Name":"Pablo Rubio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdIQPd3QhoBz98fPmQdWL9FJkAcFRIZPEyMBzD80GO84wITA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Update: the last few times we bought the fried rosquillas here they are very different from before and have less of a fried oily taste and are a little bit drier, and we also just found a hair inside one of them. We would love it if the quality could return to what it was before as the last few times have been a little disappointing.
We came in here since we saw they had rosquillas through the window. We went inside to inquire if they were anis since we have been searching for a good source near home for a while now. They told us they were anis so we took home half a dozen. If these have anis, it is imperceptable, although they did taste good. They have a mild lemony and oily taste with a texture that melts in your mouth, they are good, but not anis rosquillas, hopefully they will consider taking the flavor up a few notches, because as of right now, these are very good lemon donuts.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alon Eder","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKAw__ydLXW3I_86azg2uv6qI-W9pRQWCjns4yiyxpabEHgrr0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great local coffee and pastries place. Friendly service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"E V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVGagZRJ-SkSizpfJHGZBpa1bOQbYK4HjbnvEtZtVt5wL78q6Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"not great don't expect much","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocInllfh_VBA_1gZ9jX31x9bgd3AXnfwPL5LKDuQSmqRenOHoQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Panadería gourmet lo que más me gusta es el pan de espelta pero los pasteles están buenísimos y ahora el roscon de Reyes igual, lo único el precio pero va acorde a la calidad","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCXCELRZ0u-WcAU_P5f5hqy&fid=0x0:0xb6aca18de55944e5"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"Fran Martinez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocITbbXp5R_1rlbPOaV836Yd-Fxrc8DtV5lgoJSVU6wuhsFylA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Visité esta pastelería por primera vez y la experiencia fue tan buena que no podía dejar de compartirla. Desde el momento en que entras, todo transmite cuidado y dedicación: el aroma irresistible de los dulces recién horneados, la vitrina repleta de opciones tentadoras y una atención al cliente cercana, amable y muy profesional.

Probé varios dulces y todos estaban exquisitos. Se nota la calidad de los ingredientes, la técnica y, sobre todo, el cariño con el que están hechos. En especial, me encantaron [aquí puedes mencionar alguno: “las milhojas”, “el pastel de zanahoria”, “las tartaletas de frutas”], que estaban realmente espectaculares: frescos, bien equilibrados y con una presentación impecable.

Además del sabor, valoro mucho cuando el trato es cálido y personalizado, y aquí eso se siente desde el primer minuto. Me asesoraron con paciencia, me explicaron los ingredientes y me hicieron sentir muy bienvenido.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEPrEuMzMuIyMjAE&fid=0x0:0xb6aca18de55944e5"],"When":"2025-5-7"},{"Name":"Víctor García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUA6LIZlcDHJBCSkeLypU6iOjpLYzllGxOmuzgk3QLN_GD3-vAj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Fantástica, panadería y pastelería, entramos porque nos llamó la atención sus empanadas y palmeras de chocolate. Nos llevamos un poco de cada para poder probar. La bollería está muy buena, pero lo que más nos gustó fueron sus empanadas. En este caso de atún. Probamos tanto la de pisto con atún como la de atún (redonda) ambas muy buenas","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAhWxk9mYuf2GWaipwWQjti&fid=0x0:0xb6aca18de55944e5"],"When":"2025-7-25"}]

Opté por llevarme una caja con  un surtido de algo más de medio kilo de baklawas, todos muy buenos. Sobresalientes los de nueces, me gustaron mucho también los nidos de chocolate y pistacho. Seguiré comprando pan aquí, sin duda, y probaré más tipos de pan y los dulces que tienen también :) Servicio muy amable y tienda con ambiente limpio y acogedor :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"clara dominguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUEbYGw7Wf5bxR7fX146AUoYRdRilBH6q-80jZ28nEWzfkB1qO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Como pastelería para un antojo no está mal, tampoco son los mejores bollos de la zona ni mucho menos el mejor chocolate, incluso algunas cosas como las setas de chocolate se nota que están un poco pasadas. Tampoco es que las personas que atiendan sean gente agradable. Hay bastantes mejores opciones como el super o el carrefour express de esa misma calle.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"El Justiciero de Google","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwHwsuDb1UJSrCsVBsJnfI8pVqwt0SewnyfnfR2Ogna5DCUW4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Lamentable atención al cliente de esta cafetería. Ponen un mínimo para pagar con tarjeta alto, y aunque no tengas efectivo les da igual. Te echan de malas maneras de la pastelería, porque lo único que les interesa es blanquear dinero. Lamentable que haya establecimientos así en España en pleno siglo XXI. Evitad este tipo de sitios a toda costa.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Esther DC","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkUYqFj6t5H_KQjuAciGhcYgf2wYg5E0HALbjcyuyqydHwPTe6sA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Además de ser CARO CARÍSIMO, la guinda del pastel ha sido la sorpresa de hoy que hemos comprado 10 buñuelos a 7€ y los 3 de trufa que había estaban ácidos, increíble, un familiar ha sufrido una intoxicación a causa de un buñuelo. Me hace pensar que a día 4 de noviembre los buñuelos están desde el día 1… en fin.

Reedito la reseña:
Cuando hemos pasado por el local a advertirles por salubridad de lo ocurrido nos han acusado de estar mintiendo.
Qué poca vergüenza.
Espero que los clientes que estaban en el establecimiento se lo hayan pensado mejor y no vuelvan a comprar ahí.","Images":null,"When":""}]
